disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
As Minnesota families continue to struggle with the rising costs of daily life, Gov. Walz failed to offer solutions to get Minnesota heading in the | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=bbfc3cb287&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | |
Dear Fellow Republicans,

As Minnesota families continue to struggle with the rising costs of daily life, Gov. Walz failed to offer solutions to get Minnesota heading in the right direction. The State of the State was a thinly veiled attempt at a campaign speech by Walz. Instead, we need to focus on getting kids back on track following the pandemic, ensure safe streets with investments in law enforcement, and permanently cut taxes to give Minnesotans relief.
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=6bc41453bc&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
Together we can fight to create a Safer, Better, and Stronger Minnesota!

We have a long road to get through the state convention next month and the general election in November but we can defeat Tim Walz and put Minnesota on the right track.

**If you can help please donate by making a secure donation today at [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=8b480adab3&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=6d0703402d&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson
[Candidate for Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9b4e28a591&e=9d6926af69)

PS
Don’t hesitate to visit my website at [www.michelle4mn.com](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e99fdd65a2&e=9d6926af69) or to reach out via email: [Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com](mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jenni=2C=20Team=20Perdue?=
subject: David Perdue WINS WSB-TV Debate
body:
David Perdue exposed Brian Kemp is a weak governor who divided our party. | | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
APRIL 24, 2022
---
**CONTACT
[PRESS@DAVIDPERDUEGA.COM](mailto:press@davidperduega.com)**
---
| **_STATEMENT ON PERDUE’S WSB-TV DEBATE VICTORY_**
---
| **ATLANTA, GA** – Perdue Spokeswoman Jenni Sweat released the following statement after David Perdue’s victory in tonight’s WSB-TV debate:

“Tonight, David Perdue clearly demonstrated that Brian Kemp is a weak Governor who divided our party and cannot win in November. A clear difference in this election emerged: Brian Kemp believes Joe Biden won the election fair and square. David Perdue is a bold leader who will make waves and knock heads if that’s what it takes to get things done, and tonight he held Governor Kemp accountable for his numerous failures. As Governor, Perdue will secure our elections, eliminate the state income tax, crush crime, and stop the indoctrination of our kids. With President Trump’s endorsement and an army of grassroots supporters, Perdue will win this primary and defeat Abrams in the fall.”
---
| ###
---
| _**Trump-endorsed David Perdue**_ launched his campaign for Governor of Georgia on Dec. 6th, 2021. As an outsider, Perdue’s bold, conservative vision includes fighting for election integrity, eliminating the state income tax, empowering parents to make decisions in their children’s education, and making our cities and state safe again. Perdue is taking on incumbent Brian Kemp as the only candidate who can unite Georgia’s fractured Republican Party and defeat Stacey Abrams in November. Perdue grew up in Middle Georgia, the son of two public school teachers, and paid his way through Georgia Tech by working factory and warehouse jobs. He has over 40 years of business experience, leading the Reebok athletic brand and Dollar General stores, where he created thousands of jobs for hard-working Americans.
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=21045c7cba&e=89fb4d5220)
---

| | [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=d3aa51fd19&e=89fb4d5220)

| | [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=65eb5c1403&e=89fb4d5220)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ][IMG]

Sorry to bother you on a Sunday evening, folks, but we wouldn’t
be reaching out right now if it wasn’t super important.

Yesterday, Donald Trump came to Ohio to rally his right-wing base, boost
JD Vance, and attack Tim.

We set an emergency 72-hour goal to raise $30,0000 to be able to respond.
The bad news is our fundraising has significantly slowed down and we need
a surge of grassroots support.

With Senate control and the future of democracy on the line, the whole
country will be watching what happens here in Ohio. With that in mind, we
have to ask:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Will you chip in $25 right now to help us fend off the GOP attacks and
expand our Senate majority? Anything you can give makes a difference
during a critical time like this.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11120?t=1014&amount=28&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]Other Amount

We’re sorry to be making this ask so late, folks, but this
really can’t wait.

—Team Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=3408%2E3611125%2E0ofmDo ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Munson?=
subject: Last night's convention was a success, here's why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
We are now best positioned to receive the Republican Party’s nomination on May 24th and take our America-First movement to Washington, but we are... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9010169?e=f4c2e54596)
---
|
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=e806bb3ae0&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter,First and foremost, I want to thank the delegates who came out on Saturday and dedicated their entire day to supporting the proven conservative fighter in this race for Minnesota’s 1st congressional district.

The convention proves that we are best positioned to **win the Republican Primary on May 24th** and take our America-First movement to Washington, but we need all of the support we can to secure our victory next month.It’s time to retake the House and send a Proven Conservative Fighter to Washington who will carry the torch of liberty, fight for our Constitutionally protected, God-given rights, and limit the overreaching role of the federal government.I’m prepared to be that candidate.With your support, Peter, we will regain control of our Republic and keep our country safe from the establishment leaders in Washington who are quietly advancing their anti-American agenda. Please consider making an urgent donation to my campaign today by clicking the following link: [**JeremyMunson.com/Donate**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=4c52e40c36&e=f4c2e54596)
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=2db7667a20&e=f4c2e54596)
Last night was evidence that the people of Minnesota desire change. We are tired of the same old, Fox News conservative talking points on repeat. We need to elect the Proven Conservative Fighter who understands what is currently at stake and has the experience of taking a strong conservative stance, especially when being pressed by leadership to vote against our principles.I received support from **more than half of the delegates** at yesterday’s convention because Minnesotans are starving for the truth, and they know that I am the candidate who will deliver.We need to be honest with the American people. Our country is suffering from inflation, not because of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s failed leadership, but because we are **more than $30 TRILLION in debt** with no signs of spending slowing down in Washington.Minnesota deserves a Proven Conservative Fighter who has a record of limiting government spending and will continue to fight to restore fiscal responsibility in Washington.
[**Join Senator Rand Paul in supporting Jeremy Munson’s campaign for Congress by making a donation of $20.22 or more today >>>**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=b2ec44168f&e=f4c2e54596)
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=827024a8e2&e=f4c2e54596)
Senator Rand Paul endorsed my campaign prior to the start of yesterday’s convention because he knows that I am the only candidate in this race who stood strong against the government’s lockdowns and mandates during the pandemic, took action to ensure that our elections cannot be stolen in the future, and vowed NOT to raise the debt ceiling once elected to Congress.I am looking forward to joining Senator Rand Paul and Representatives Thomas Massie, Jim Jordan, and Scott Perry in draining the Washington swamp, holding Anthony Fauci accountable for lying to the American people, and protecting our freedoms from the DC socialists.
[**(Click here to watch my convention speech)**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=eaf3a9f978&e=f4c2e54596)
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=24d27c2346&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter, your continued support puts us in the best position to win next month and take our fight for our Republic to Washington. If you believe that I am the Proven Conservative Fighter Minnesota needs in Congress, then I strongly urge you to use this link and make a generous donation of any amount to our America-First movement today: [**JeremyMunson.com/Donate**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=69ccf4e1a4&e=f4c2e54596) Thank you for your continued support,
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=3806b59774&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=84fac4b893&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=4e133d7c1c&e=f4c2e54596)
---|---|---

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f&e=f4c2e54596&c=0f10daf6f9) or [unsubscribe](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f&e=f4c2e54596&c=0f10daf6f9)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The Left is targeting me…again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: The Deep State is trying to kick me off the ballot. Despite donating millions to my opponents, they know they can't beat me in a fair election. So, they do what Deep State Elites do best - they try to change the rules to benefit them. They're trying to prevent me from winning before the election starts! All because I supported the right to peacefully protest the election stolen from Donald Trump in 2020. Frankly, I'm worried that without your help, they might succeed. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today with a donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222828:6Kea2vouN:m:1:3317145305:D1C36846541577B909AC35BAD19E5B3D:r "That’s why I’m asking for your help today with a
donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress.")** Believe me when I say this is a coordinated effort from the D.C. Lobbyists and Washington elites who fear that I'm encouraging freedom-loving Americans to question every spending bill, unconstitutional mandate, and the socialist program they try to force upon us. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222828:6Kea2vouN:m:1:3317145305:D1C36846541577B909AC35BAD19E5B3D:r "Video")I'm fighting to stop the border invasion, their defund agenda, and their new gun control measures, and this is how they intend to stop me. The deck has been so stacked against me that I had to file a lawsuit to stop this charade. I will probably have to take it all the way to the Supreme Court to win. **Fighting their fraudulent lawsuit could cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars.** That's money I won't be able to use to get my message out to the voters in my district. And I'm worried even if I'm successful in stopping their charade, I won't have enough to ensure victory at the ballot box. **[I'm not going to lie - the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That's why I desperately need your help today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off this new attack?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222828:6Kea2vouN:m:1:3317145305:D1C36846541577B909AC35BAD19E5B3D:r "I’m not going to lie – the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That’s why I desperately need your help
today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off
this new attack?")** It should worry you how hard they are trying to keep America First Conservatives like me off the ballot. These Leftists know we're making a difference in Congress, and it frightens them. Other states have blocked this type of ridiculous lawsuit, but I'm the Left's number one target, so I have to keep fighting. **[If you value the work that I've been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I'm going to fend off this legal challenge AND win my election, it's going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222828:6Kea2vouN:m:1:3317145305:D1C36846541577B909AC35BAD19E5B3D:r "If you value the work that I’ve been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I’m going to fend off this legal
challenge AND win my election, it’s going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000.")** The one silver lining I can see is that if they're working this hard to stop me from returning to Congress, then they're scared of what I might expose next--like how much Joe Biden is indebted to China. Our America First agenda is resonating and will bring true change to our country which is why I must continue to remain a Member of Congress. But it's only going to work if I can stop this legal challenge IMMEDIATELY. **[Please help me today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222828:6Kea2vouN:m:1:3317145305:D1C36846541577B909AC35BAD19E5B3D:r "Please help
me today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**
---

subject: I bet you'll want to read this

body:

| | |

As President Trump's former campaign manager and Senior White House Advisor, there's been a lot said about me these last five years by the Fake News media.

But now I'm telling my story, in my own words, and I think you'll want to read it. From the 2016 campaign to the halls of 1600 Pennsylvania Ave, I'll give you the true and uncensored account of my time working for President Trump.

But these are selling out fast, we only have **100 books left! **

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: DC Cabal just launched a New Attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: The Deep State is trying to kick me off the ballot. Despite donating millions to my opponents, they know they can't beat me in a fair election. So, they do what Deep State Elites do best - they try to change the rules to benefit them. They're trying to prevent me from winning before the election starts! All because I supported the right to peacefully protest the election stolen from Donald Trump in 2020. Frankly, I'm worried that without your help, they might succeed. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today with a donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222962:6LmHVvoNo:m:1:3253819041:0A51853960CB731A12D3563B819EA42C:r "That’s why I’m asking for your help today with a
donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress.")** Believe me when I say this is a coordinated effort from the D.C. Lobbyists and Washington elites who fear that I'm encouraging freedom-loving Americans to question every spending bill, unconstitutional mandate, and the socialist program they try to force upon us. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222962:6LmHVvoNo:m:1:3253819041:0A51853960CB731A12D3563B819EA42C:r "Video")I'm fighting to stop the border invasion, their defund agenda, and their new gun control measures, and this is how they intend to stop me. The deck has been so stacked against me that I had to file a lawsuit to stop this charade. I will probably have to take it all the way to the Supreme Court to win. **Fighting their fraudulent lawsuit could cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars.** That's money I won't be able to use to get my message out to the voters in my district. And I'm worried even if I'm successful in stopping their charade, I won't have enough to ensure victory at the ballot box. **[I'm not going to lie - the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That's why I desperately need your help today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off this new attack?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222962:6LmHVvoNo:m:1:3253819041:0A51853960CB731A12D3563B819EA42C:r "I’m not going to lie – the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That’s why I desperately need your help
today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off
this new attack?")** It should worry you how hard they are trying to keep America First Conservatives like me off the ballot. These Leftists know we're making a difference in Congress, and it frightens them. Other states have blocked this type of ridiculous lawsuit, but I'm the Left's number one target, so I have to keep fighting. **[If you value the work that I've been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I'm going to fend off this legal challenge AND win my election, it's going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222962:6LmHVvoNo:m:1:3253819041:0A51853960CB731A12D3563B819EA42C:r "If you value the work that I’ve been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I’m going to fend off this legal
challenge AND win my election, it’s going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000.")** The one silver lining I can see is that if they're working this hard to stop me from returning to Congress, then they're scared of what I might expose next--like how much Joe Biden is indebted to China. Our America First agenda is resonating and will bring true change to our country which is why I must continue to remain a Member of Congress. But it's only going to work if I can stop this legal challenge IMMEDIATELY. **[Please help me today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60222962:6LmHVvoNo:m:1:3253819041:0A51853960CB731A12D3563B819EA42C:r "Please help
me today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**
---

[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ooefd3tnhnge4nfe86p0kmiv9cpoqc44876rl0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o72c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t70clpj1dj0c9r30phie4r38p9imuq35cr5eupn8sr4eopracbje3h7cd316qoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30phmcsqj0ptnc9j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgheb3sju20ol5bje3bstrgf0t3vu5r94srokl98_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o72c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdjjb014f8fmh31kg0k84m81rqqtspcvn0n91noo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o72c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd1nrnf4chi7ubpcnufmqnc8p805ea0qntl7ml1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o72c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

subject: A loss to the Chinese
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Todd for Montana******
body:
My son Shane gave his life protecting his country. As a PhD in Electrical Engineering, he took a job with a telecommunications c
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd70l1e80acbg8427e72os3rs821gst1du8bils0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9gmhi60shie1oe0srgelpm4cr5ccr7at9icmrbat1lckpr4t9ie6oecc33c3jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30phmcsqj0ptnchj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

---
| | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zckbeqn8v4p5iqg2k87kgn9qgcl887ekpd3j02hg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh2bs)
---

| Greetings! [**My son Shane gave his life protecting his country.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znnnl1v77ubeeab6rqunem9mpddcaimcvtnfbg08_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh2bs) As a PhD in Electrical Engineering, he took a job with a telecommunications company in Singapore. What was supposed to be an adventure became a tragedy. Shane was concerned about work he was doing for a Chinese company, Huawei, the largest telecommunication firm in the world, owned by the CCP. He knew the work he was being asked to do violated U.S. export laws. Shane refused to go along with the illegal transfer of technology to China. He resigned from his job and found new work back in the U.S., but on his last day Shane was murdered. [**We were told that our son committed suicide. Despite all the evidence of my son’s murder, Singapore, China and the Obama/Biden administration refused to investigate. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmltu761lec5ik133ctl5j40hic3v42r30mdhudg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh2bs) As a Montana mother, grandmother, small business owner, and unapologetic America First conservative [**the loss of my son Shane only strengthened my resolve to defend and serve the American people and End Government Corruption.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z36bfrp9ahmacn4maj6s36qhid0jopous4jdgkj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh2bs)

| | | [**SUPPORT MARY TODD**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvpe2u0mdd5kcfvkm6dcechaf6c71lqeavc0gfu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh2bs)
---

[**My opponent is a well funded, entrenched government bureaucrat and it will take a full team effort to bring in new representation for Montana.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znalbi7kahjoo6afikiaevm8ua1ckkuk59ptra98_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ge0o71chh2bs)

name: Leah Cole Allen
subject: Conservative Corner
body:
Hear about My Campaign for Lt. Governor!
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Friends,
I joined the hosts of Conservative Corner this week, to talk about my candidacy for Lt. Governor and the Diehl-Allen ticket. Listen to the interview here: [Leah Cole Allen on Conservative Corner](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AZolXzUKC2kRoaa2q1A2FyrlsecJuZyQ09imOTruzEbArjtJ5qP77vYv3dAh6ZO2_aDuSMAiMg7ResT87cQaimVXul_8cqSqN2rTbLPvaJ2wPzFkoHVE0rOKzfSpDLJk5v55UGzZVjck_EVopliGxelYyYrqGsKsrMUmIrF1jAUdf7u2-JDX55SrEsQRo9nA9ftgI96im9_IXqrUjHp7GBlklsw4rqsHYLssJJtbRY2hnfV51tAMCKjAv0ZthI7B_Y1HRZpOubwscQ3MdOK_sJrD13UKQ8uZ&c=fcEbxqc2mmuJ6bJMYxc0raAIZqRiIsTiO03NwIy6ilWY8oHboiO2KA==&ch=fFQ_HTvuSXGxHQ0NDyjYyo8Wg5u-7cj6PT0zogUfLHn1wcocbvGcwQ==).
This week, I'll be at the following events:
4/26/2022 from 7-9 p.m. Holden Meet and Greet, 1130 Main St, Holden
4/28/2022 from 6-8:30: Log Cabin Republicans Meet and Greet, The Bell In Hand Tavern, 45 Union St, Boston
4/30/2022 at 10 a.m. Rockport Republican Town Committee Meeting, Rockport Police Station
I hope you'll come out and meet me on the campaign trail, and learn more about my plans to restore individual liberties in MA; restore parental rights over their children's education and health choices, and remove mandates which have stripped away our ability to run our businesses and our lives, especially, over the past few years during Covid.
For more info on me: [Leah Cole Allen - Lt. Governor for Massachusetts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AZolXzUKC2kRoaa2q1A2FyrlsecJuZyQ09imOTruzEbArjtJ5qP77vWwRRS_fKuy8xobDm24sKR_kKN-UokBiGC7AdVQzwFzZR3Qk501lKJy9FoWgsa5heSO54Mi214u1SwX1FTTAfzWg0Dr8F1n2Q==&c=fcEbxqc2mmuJ6bJMYxc0raAIZqRiIsTiO03NwIy6ilWY8oHboiO2KA==&ch=fFQ_HTvuSXGxHQ0NDyjYyo8Wg5u-7cj6PT0zogUfLHn1wcocbvGcwQ==)
If you like what you read and hear about me, please support my campaign with a donation. You can send a check to "Allen for MA", 6 Main Street Extension, Ste 615, Plymouth, MA 02360.
or online: [Donate today! (winred.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AZolXzUKC2kRoaa2q1A2FyrlsecJuZyQ09imOTruzEbArjtJ5qP77kDANVj1YLZm1QCr2s97xjQLmwXzZWJ-qY9I6MwRlsjSlTeGaQG9JTJwPN7sZWFEfLCxKN9GGh-pnTPCM97EMjfv6mgnAJloSBZUtEu3W5a3difxZtNxby6DxKhfSYaRww==&c=fcEbxqc2mmuJ6bJMYxc0raAIZqRiIsTiO03NwIy6ilWY8oHboiO2KA==&ch=fFQ_HTvuSXGxHQ0NDyjYyo8Wg5u-7cj6PT0zogUfLHn1wcocbvGcwQ==)

| All my Best, Leah Cole Allen

name: Team Barnette
subject: Televised GOP Senate Debate Tonight
body:
Be sure to tune in!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hCFGMVEi9KtSpaDB_tRPXwmeM05ag1cpGeADag8Vt6ErA1jSRkND0prU-HqGwqv73HPl9boGx5Caswu4JyaI-I5V59IVNffYkwXe6MFAiTqBJ3kEG7KBVuQQrng8Cd_B_uKz4hJ9jzqN3585U2hVh3urS1ZJlfA4WAvomLUMOvmMN9UYYdJP4w==&c=V2tCNTK7F_OqB94riOdKtTnZBKLhMz3oj1KuLZMETm2HlGBfc15zKA==&ch=H_wigNKEyQp5lPAsAitRpk3PM_GHKHkIjWyJg48fsF1WJLMOVImaLw==)
---
| Peter \-
Clear your plans for this evening! A televised GOP Senate Debate is happening tonight, April 25th at 8pm. This event will be broadcast to all 67 counties and live-streamed to millions more.

---
|
---
|
I will be sharing the debate stage with Jeff Bartos, Dave McCormick, Mehmet Oz, and Carla Sands.
As you know, the most recent Trafalgar poll has me in a statistical 3-way tie with Oz and McCormick, despite them spending millions of dollars out of their own pockets. In addition, the poll shows many Republican voters remain undecided. But, this is only because they don't know me yet. This televised event is an excellent opportunity for everyone to see me debate my opponents on a wide variety of issues. Tune in and learn what sets me apart from the other candidates and why I am the best choice for Pennsylvania!
Help us spread the word about this event by forwarding this message to everyone you know. There are 22 days until the Primary. And there's still time for people to register to vote and to change their party registration so they can vote for me! In order for me to take your voices to Washington, I need to get there!
The debate can be viewed on various TV stations and live-streamed via multiple websites. Plenty of ways to watch! Click this link for additional information: [https://barnetteforsenate.com/event/prime-time-tv-gop-senate-debate/ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hCFGMVEi9KtSpaDB_tRPXwmeM05ag1cpGeADag8Vt6ErA1jSRkND0nGhM5I4LrMByTsAIplI8nTGsLX9IbVdE3MpaIEOf67Zavm1rQMHx1kDKK8peQKY0vsE15cD8GHvT1mSbGfFBElJSSATlPb_CFrpco5WyU7ntmnjMzMfJ2s8WO4ydNQisEu13Tf2OUfr2URuRnJLhAJpbEvgiYtTXQ==&c=V2tCNTK7F_OqB94riOdKtTnZBKLhMz3oj1KuLZMETm2HlGBfc15zKA==&ch=H_wigNKEyQp5lPAsAitRpk3PM_GHKHkIjWyJg48fsF1WJLMOVImaLw==)
Participate in online commentary with other like-minded supporters during the event on the campaign's Facebook page [(facebook.com/BarnetteforSenate)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hCFGMVEi9KtSpaDB_tRPXwmeM05ag1cpGeADag8Vt6ErA1jSRkND0oo7QGrG5EnOW8Ytg2hc2Ci10UA6lBXCYqG4OKtuFED6RqxTEbbiv03sgiedtNc96aw_LobA86_QkZX4t0wF1Wd8YmZtYTWTd0i0A2xXPnrjvjxPxy3swK4=&c=V2tCNTK7F_OqB94riOdKtTnZBKLhMz3oj1KuLZMETm2HlGBfc15zKA==&ch=H_wigNKEyQp5lPAsAitRpk3PM_GHKHkIjWyJg48fsF1WJLMOVImaLw==) and Twitter account ([twitter.com/kathy4truth](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hCFGMVEi9KtSpaDB_tRPXwmeM05ag1cpGeADag8Vt6ErA1jSRkND0mks1guwZqsyZO7nio4h_sKsnKVHXhL_V0fOzbjX1cR9zPi11u9GtGi7hQ9MzcYGb9Pw3cu1Kktfa5o1hM5LEMH8adyzU3Qzpd3EZYhUzitw&c=V2tCNTK7F_OqB94riOdKtTnZBKLhMz3oj1KuLZMETm2HlGBfc15zKA==&ch=H_wigNKEyQp5lPAsAitRpk3PM_GHKHkIjWyJg48fsF1WJLMOVImaLw==)).
Blessings!
Kathy Barnette
---

---
| Kathy Barnette for Senate

disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44511167/341947756/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220425_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTc3YTZlYy04ZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVoPyad9HthJmvz9BQDF9ac9LTOrTONfusNB21sDMQw=)

Friend,

We know this race is going to be close.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis only secured a victory by **_less than half a percentage point._**

And now, multiple recent polls have shown Charlie Crist and Ron DeSantis in **_a dead heat._**

But these polls have also shown that huge numbers of voters all across the state are **_still undecided._**

And with several months left in this race, we have time to win over those undecided voters who will determine the outcome of this race.

**Running ads and voter outreach is really expensive, but given Florida’s history of close races, we have to do it all. So, we need your help.** [_Will you make a contribution right now to help fund this campaign so we can win over undecided voters and secure a November victory?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44511169/341947758/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220425_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTc3YTZlYy04ZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVoPyad9HthJmvz9BQDF9ac9LTOrTONfusNB21sDMQw=)

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: I was attacked for serving in the military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44512153/341952423/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDgyMjhhMC05N2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTOegh3Fqqpz6D6-vN0SczZ31Oeroc2RRiqafydPHe8=&emci=5d982b30-67c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d48228a0-97c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44512154/341952424/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDgyMjhhMC05N2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTOegh3Fqqpz6D6-vN0SczZ31Oeroc2RRiqafydPHe8=&emci=5d982b30-67c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d48228a0-97c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $500,000 before our end-of-month deadline, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**

clean_body: Hello, When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful. People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened. They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service. And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other. This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue. In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $500,000 before our end-of-month deadline, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = All the Super PAC money in the world can’t defeat grassroots support from people like you. I’m so grateful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Former state, 6th District GOP chairman back Jake
body:
Former state, 6th District GOP chairman back Jake
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rXgBC1yS-jSJH3I0VylTwnntO33D4hJLNhXSJxTgTRFbctZbgfN8a3nMjM4UFImS9rYDKYPeGGoRrovpAQoLRkvtcQ1ll9wh94MY0KWW2wmwYw02N-AmC0p-nkctKq9xd96o-ybpP7M=&c=wT3VjwtrXcCZjQXRAP7JQdo3g2PQv7Wc8TFTb56Bx_QvuiAUFvc0BA==&ch=1BRCV4GrhsXXhyy5MCp6KEPUJhS5xxzcmUbpjIwUe1YrMAOFqp2jbA==)
---
| Former state, 6th District GOP chairman back Jake
---
| For immediate release April 25th, 2022 Adding to an already long list of Republican grassroots leaders to endorse Jake Evans, Bob Shaw, a former Georgia Republican Party chairman and legendary leader of the Fulton GOP, and Darryl Wilson, former 6th Congressional District Chairman, announced their support today, saying Jake is the conservative fighter we need in Congress. "I see in Jake not only a principled conservative but also a worker who's not afraid of a challenge," Shaw said. "That's the kind of leaders who built the Republican majority in Georgia. Now, we need the next generation of conservative Georgia leaders to step up and fix this mess we have in Washington. Jake Evans is the man to do that, and I proudly support him." Wilson emphasized Jake's stance on our military and national defense. "Now we have a Woke Pentagon that's more interested in left-wing indoctrination of our fighting forces than it is in promoting the security of our nation. Jake Evans will fight for our soldiers and veterans and make sure they have the resources they need to keep us safe. He'll put a stop to treating the Defense Department like a sociology course." "I know Jake, and there's no one I trust more to fight for common-sense conservative principles that will promote our national defense. I'm voting for him. I'm working for him. We must put him in Congress to fight for us." Shaw and Wilson command deep respect in their communities, Jake said. "Bob Shaw continues to make a positive difference for Georgia even after decades of his amazing service, and he's a true legend in Fulton County," Jake said. "And Darryl is an American patriot that served our nation in uniform, but never quit working to Make America Great."
---
| | DONATE
---
| |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rXgBC1yS-jSJH3I0VylTwnntO33D4hJLNhXSJxTgTRFbctZbgfN8a9Aet4T-X8ATQP__kLq1pwd07r8KpKWtNbep2HoDYPRKi1sjr_Kx3vO9cLvvcgVfTUhDLJB-CLD9KPkVm69SIPVV_OjzQ65Eh2sjFbn7W1K9&c=wT3VjwtrXcCZjQXRAP7JQdo3g2PQv7Wc8TFTb56Bx_QvuiAUFvc0BA==&ch=1BRCV4GrhsXXhyy5MCp6KEPUJhS5xxzcmUbpjIwUe1YrMAOFqp2jbA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rXgBC1yS-jSJH3I0VylTwnntO33D4hJLNhXSJxTgTRFbctZbgfN8a9Aet4T-X8AT5LpVvdIduEupdFtRvHqG2-s-50V703-e7qjf6W2n3WV8kWsBArypH2TDjRhnkv9-I8GRgRcDgUUCR4jLhEzKzG8rXeXd6B80&c=wT3VjwtrXcCZjQXRAP7JQdo3g2PQv7Wc8TFTb56Bx_QvuiAUFvc0BA==&ch=1BRCV4GrhsXXhyy5MCp6KEPUJhS5xxzcmUbpjIwUe1YrMAOFqp2jbA==)

**__Hello Peter!**
---
# **It's Time to ENFORCE the LAW!**
"Liberty once lost is lost forever. When the People once surrender their share in the Legislature, and their Right of defending the Limitations upon the Government, and of resisting every Encroachment upon them, they can never regain it."
Words, written by John Adams in 1775. Let's **Stop** making laws and **"Enforce the Laws"** we already have.
Let's **Repeal** all abdication. Congress makes the laws.
Lets **Stop** being clouded by irrelevant issues and excuses!
Let's **Stop** the invasion!
**Let's Return to the States what is not specified in the Constitution!**
---
\-------------------------- Support Dave Giles
**"The most qualified candidate to serve you"**.
**100% of his time** \- no debts or other obligations
---

Sincerely,

Words, written by John Adams in 1775. Let's Stop making laws and "Enforce the Laws" we already have. Let's Repeal all abdication. Congress makes the laws. Lets Stop being clouded by irrelevant issues and excuses! Let's Stop the invasion! Let's Return to the States what is not specified in the Constitution! \-------------------------- Support Dave Giles "The most qualified candidate to serve you". 100% of his time \- no debts or other obligations | | Thank you! Sincerely, | Dave Giles Candidate United States Congress Arizona's 4th District "Facebook" "Instagram" "LinkedIn" "Twitter" ©2022 Dave Giles for Congress | PO BOX 5394 | Mesa, Arizona 85211 | (480) 664-4971 | "Web Version" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: American Action News
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjiuqeirprh99m71oc1riu5nuahvecbcg479uns8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ie8or1cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbcb0cli61cb0m5hb0slmcjhr6tph68orecblciq76p1jepq6ectke9in0t9jcsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coorecr4c1rm2phh6sqr9ptgmlin49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zglrrv7evqedpkis99lsd80ds6p753jq18rgcr68_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ie8or1cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsp2m95tj3144pqd43mjcqu8k0r5l1nb9cr2tbko_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ie8or1cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4i9nnvfvvlo35br4ili437scdad2ilfe82eqs0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3ie8or1cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: April Update 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Father Navy SEAL Business Owner
---
| | | | | | April Update 2022
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire Running for State Senate D10 in 2023 (Let's un-California Virginia) Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, rising gas prices, taxes, public safety, education, School Choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, protecting the sanctity of life, protecting our 2nd amendment, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Governor Youngkin and the rest of us in the General Assembly are working hard to address your concerns.
---
| Promises Kept
---
|
---
| We are still in special session and without a budget and we still have bills in conference. Establishing the budget would have been easy if we had a Republican State Senate, as most agree that we need: raises for teachers, more money for schools, and law enforcement. Democrats in the Senate are dragging things out and trying to block Governor Youngkin's agenda.
This Wednesday we will return to Richmond to review and vote on Governor amendments. Speaker Todd Gilbert and our Republican Caucus are doing a great job working together as a team, but we must win back the State Senate to make big changes.
We are all proud to serve with Republican Governor Glen Youngkin. Here is my April update with some of the things on my mind and some of what I've been up to around the district:
---
| March for Life April 27, 2022
---
|
---
| Life is a miracle and must be protected at all cost. Each year I carry this backpack in session to each committee with a baby sock to remind others we must protect our most vulnerable. [Students for Life](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bFTC72cKzhIXNUPre8S8tf1DwHI2bXHOcRBW1erzQXKewpUPd-tE8fKlAIdFvZFjaXRyJdDc0xh_4t12FHmHKcXcn8WLbvY7_WZvH0L1jNQRR4rMTXpldKAS2O63IIRKqN2QgC9YfQbcbb3Wolq96Q==&c=vxHIJHMKJInyBTm55BkyAFroxP5ldxr00C4VlkXzfmQV6vp0koI9jQ==&ch=9vF763HQnTSISD4kDTTjiajbAeAlJnBHCQsPwribuRJGDVl8g1W5HA==) gave me this idea years ago. Please join me April 27 for the 4th Annual Virginia March for Life, hosted by the [Family Foundation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bFTC72cKzhIXNUPre8S8tf1DwHI2bXHOcRBW1erzQXKewpUPd-tE8Xgxyva7pms1gSzaLkV3VwFvmVzQBzU-Z0VxwZwD1Vx28gj5WI4nD-N4rXzcHuD9IlDdG8KBqtQAbzrAbSOeLiqmNujWVPPljBnWVp03-ZH_&c=vxHIJHMKJInyBTm55BkyAFroxP5ldxr00C4VlkXzfmQV6vp0koI9jQ==&ch=9vF763HQnTSISD4kDTTjiajbAeAlJnBHCQsPwribuRJGDVl8g1W5HA==). Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Sears and Alveda King will speak on the steps of the Virginia Capitol.[Click Here for details](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bFTC72cKzhIXNUPre8S8tf1DwHI2bXHOcRBW1erzQXKewpUPd-tE8Xgxyva7pms1HGRWaBr5B14XxsgzZRs25STkEyiSMv4_zC1iOXzJsoKvv2nknilb2g7HLWvCMjMRgc78yeDzn8C-OEXDIzicI6wrfRl5GeUbJ4cewY7Fm7pv7VwDzbJxx2EGKwjlPwozripNYiu4X7NAkhMliEEfpBlZuhSr3mYh&c=vxHIJHMKJInyBTm55BkyAFroxP5ldxr00C4VlkXzfmQV6vp0koI9jQ==&ch=9vF763HQnTSISD4kDTTjiajbAeAlJnBHCQsPwribuRJGDVl8g1W5HA==)
FYI, President Trump was the first president in history to speak at the March for Life in Washington D.C.
---
|
---
| Voter Fraud
---
|
---
| All of our anti-voter fraud or voter integrity bills were killed or watered down in the Democrat Virginia State Senate this year. Send me to the Virginia State Senate and we will get common sense voter integrity laws done in Virginia!
---
| 2A
---
|
---
| Not only does our Second Amendment codify our God-given rights to protect ourselves, but it is also a national security issue. An enemy would be foolish to invade a well-armed American people. Each year our pro-gun Second Amendment bills are killed in the Democrat State Senate. With a 100 VCDL score each year, I've introduced constitutional carry, the Jack Wilson act, sovereign immunity (you can sue the Government if you get shot in a gun free zone), and other pro Second Amendment bills. Let's work together and win a Republican majority State Senate next year and stop infringements on our God-given Second Amendment rights. One of the reasons I'm running for State Senate is to continue fighting to protect your Second Amendment rights!
---
| The Stop Woke Act

---
|
---
| Governor Ron DeSantis used political force to end Disney's ability to self-govern. He also went after school text books with divisive ideologies, passed a Parental Rights bill, and proposed a congressional map that would add four more Republican Districts.
---
| Beagle Bills
---
|
---
| Glenn Youngkin started special session off by passing five bipartisan Beagle bills, where every legislator voted, "yes", and he delivered a message we can work together to get things done for Virginians. My friends and fellow Delegates, Rob Bell - 58th District of VA House of Delegates and H. Buddy Fowler - 55th District of VA House of Delegates, and I attended the signing with Buddy's Rabbit Dog, Greta, where Governor Youngkin signed Delegate Bell's and Delegates Fowler's Beagle bills into law!!
---
| Our Intern, Annie
---
|
---
| Annie, an avid hunter and fisher, lives in District 56 and started an outdoor Hunting/ Fishing club for teens, and she has an interest in politics. While helping us during Special Session she met many legislators and staff. She had many questions for our Lieutenant Governor. Thank you, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earl Sears, for answering our intern, Annie's, questions on politics, the military, and more.
---
| RIP Officer Trey Sutton
---
|
---
|
---
| I attended the heartbreaking funeral and then the burial for Henrico Police Officer, Trey Marshal Sutton. who tragically passed away too young, at age 24, on March 22. His fiancee gave a beautiful account of their love, and his brother shared his story. We are blessed as a country to have men and women in law-enforcement who risk their life to keep us safe every day. Thank you for your service, and RIP Trey. Please send prayers for officer Greg Petrohovich, who is still in the hospital but getting better.
---
| Hanover Sheriff, A Salute to Our Heroes

---
|
---
|
---
| I was honored to be one of many proud sponsors at the "A Salute to Our Heroes" Annual Awards Presentation in Hanover County. Without our men and women in law-enforcement we would not have a country. Thank you for your selfless service! Hanover Sheriff Hines, deputies, and staff did an incredible job honoring our heroes. It was great to see Attorney General Jason Miyares and Secretary of Public Service and Homeland Security Robert Mosier as well. #virginia
---
| Middle Resolution Session Update panel
---
|
---
| I had the honor of being on the Middle Resolution Session Update Panel with fellow members of the General Assembly, including Republican Senator Ryan McDoogle, Republican Delegate Buddy Fowler, and Republican Delegate Scott Wyatt. The Middle Resolution is doing great work to improve education and to preserve and protect our conservative values. Thank you!
---
| Rising Cost of living
---
|
---
| Under President Trump we had the strongest economy ever and with record unemployment. The Democrat Biden Administration wants to tax and spend us out of existence. The federal government is printing money so fast the value of the dollar keeps getting lower and lower and lower. Please vote Republican in November so we can get the majority back in Congress and stop wasteful government spending, unconstitutional mandates, and more.
---
| Another Promise Kept
---
|
---
| Isn't it great that we have a Governor who actually supports our Law Enforcement. Governor Youngkin kept another campaign promise by donating his first quarter salary to the Law Enforcement Assistance Fund. #backtheblue
---
| Jeff Katz Radio
---
|
---
| Redistricting chopped my House of Delegate District 56 into 5 pieces, and it took me away from over 90% of the people I've represented for the last 5 years. After much prayer and consideration, I announced that I am running for the new Senate District 10 seat. This will allow me to continue to serve most of you and to make many new friends. Our Virginia State Senate District 10 for 2023 signs are in, and as promised on the air, the first John McGuire for State Senate yard sign was put in the yard of radio talk show host, patriot, and former police officer, Jeff Katz. Together we will win the state Senate, "un-California Virginia", and help pass Governor Glenn Youngkin's agenda. Thank you for your support!
[Click here for Jeff Katz Interview](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bFTC72cKzhIXNUPre8S8tf1DwHI2bXHOcRBW1erzQXKewpUPd-tE8fKlAIdFvZFjW-4n-w6qq6fFqmQGlKKPYOp-3tS7DTTKZTkmytPpYFXbMmjpbXQaPy_WyKD-NhAR9-_KJl9SWW3HS--tr3hNMpyDbTlRgMzHrTwPFM0QjVKkJiuI4EeQ6DpMNMjViVE2TdXCoDcfH1I1KuDA9AkteAus9_388byEoButRBo1qpo=&c=vxHIJHMKJInyBTm55BkyAFroxP5ldxr00C4VlkXzfmQV6vp0koI9jQ==&ch=9vF763HQnTSISD4kDTTjiajbAeAlJnBHCQsPwribuRJGDVl8g1W5HA==)
D10 Counties: Hanover, Powhatan, Louisa, Fluvanna, Goochland, Buckingham, Appomattox, Amelia, Prince Edward, Cumberland
---
| My Veteran Bill HB 1128
---
|
---
| My bill, HB 1128, which reduces taxes up to 40k on Veteran Retirement pay, is still in conference. We are still negotiating with the Democrat Senate and working to get it done!
---
| Nascar
---
|
---
| I attended a NASCAR race at Richmond Raceway with our Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Sears, Speaker Todd Gilbert, Senator Ryan McDoogle, Delegate Scott Wyatt, and more. I have really enjoyed the relationships we've built over the last few years while helping improve economic development in Virginia.
---
| Nascar Ministries
---
|
---
|
---
| Meet JR and his car "Flik" JR infuses his excitement for Nascar racing and love of God to teach Christian Values and inspire others. Thank you for all you do to minister to our young people. You should zoom in and read the messages on his car. We are excited to have your support.
---
| Louisa High School FFA Highway Clean Up
---
|
---
| We picked up a lot of trash on Davis Highway in Mineral, Virginia, at the Louisa High School FFA Highway Clean Up and Alumni Mixer. This was a lot of fun working with young people and it gives me hope for the future. It has been an honor representing Louisa County for the last five years in the General Assembly. Thank you to the teachers, parents, FFL Officers, CTE folks, and other leaders for preparing our young people for life! #lionpride #virginia #proudtoserve
---
| | |
---
| Fentanyl Fatal Overdose Epidemic
---
|
---
| I submitted House Bill 108 this year, which would make it a felony Homicide for drug dealers to distribute fentanyl, resulting in drug users dying from an overdose. Unfortunately, Democrats in the House and the State Senate voted, "no". There is a fatal overdose epidemic in our Commonwealth and Country. These drugs, which are manufactured in China, are coming across our southern border and killing Americans. Please vote Republican so we can stop drug dealers from poisoning our people.
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bFTC72cKzhIXNUPre8S8tf1DwHI2bXHOcRBW1erzQXKewpUPd-tE8fKlAIdFvZFjXZ-MYnkGNE2EuBKFbObiA_B8WlkKZeIX1c5agoBSoAErvZZH3tGKuKiDg2drPAkkT0vqs074M_eHw7a9UEzx_S8DqJeA3fWr3KWnY9cx1-MqUmxuqZ6VCyjsSLCzENZy2AbnQtwwL_gSPB2kXFHj1FFb1bQMsqvnPATyJrhgg5qI_7ERCbJiH-TXDs9WxLcwzwTXRUgOised1bMBSmEC68PMrPTmWYgEQoio7pMjCOZ0w8sJt2fU2Q==&c=vxHIJHMKJInyBTm55BkyAFroxP5ldxr00C4VlkXzfmQV6vp0koI9jQ==&ch=9vF763HQnTSISD4kDTTjiajbAeAlJnBHCQsPwribuRJGDVl8g1W5HA==)
---
| Gender Confusion
---
|
---
|
---
| This is outrageous! Can you believe that a Government website is encouraging Gender Confusion to both children and adults. On their website it says, "The mission of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) is to enhance the health and well-being of all Americans, by providing for effective health and human services, and by fostering sound, sustained advances in the sciences underlying medicine, public health, and social services."
How could anyone think this ok? [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bFTC72cKzhIXNUPre8S8tf1DwHI2bXHOcRBW1erzQXKewpUPd-tE8fKlAIdFvZFjZ7fxwwBIyIqYpcZ70kZ6u76C9FLnxNYqs7unZy9foCu7Lne6KEOHN25bb04ofKX-R_yIAxyO6za_yGiujCwsmg9CWNgNZC6Kx7jNFB0DjW_ABafuOtCrfe0VwMUo4PiqA6jASoQuH5otXpAf3Fu70IT4um0zT0qfy7Uo3qNpRtL1xd1B_ev6dEgzfQMgqmUF&c=vxHIJHMKJInyBTm55BkyAFroxP5ldxr00C4VlkXzfmQV6vp0koI9jQ==&ch=9vF763HQnTSISD4kDTTjiajbAeAlJnBHCQsPwribuRJGDVl8g1W5HA==)
---
| Louisa School Safety Task Force
---
|
---
| I've had the honor of being part of the Louisa County Safe Schools Task Force for over three years now, with teachers, law enforcement, counselors, and others. I gave our team a legislative update, with regard to the budget and legislation that impacts safe schools in Virginia. In many ways Louisa is setting the standard. Thank you, Superintendent Doug Straley and team, for all of your hard work. #lcps #virginia
---
| Fundraiser/ Date Night
---
|
---
| Tracy and I were proud to support the St. Mary's Catholic School fundraiser. What a wonderful way to support local students with my best friend! "Our Christ-centered approach to learning encourages responsibility, accountability, respect, and above all compassion for one another."
---
| James River Republican Women
---
|
---
| We had a record turnout at the James River Republican Women's meeting, where I gave a legislative update. Thank you, ladies, for all you do to support conservative values and to help get Republicans elected!
---
| Homeschoolers
---
|
---
|
---
| I had the honor of speaking with homeschool parents and homeschool students all around my district on my experience as a Navy SEAL, and my continued service to our country in the General Assembly! I am a HUGE homeschool supporter, especially in this day and age, where our children are being taught woke ideologies and what to think. Thank God we have a Republican Governor, Glenn Youngkin, who will fight to teach our children how to think.
---
| He is Risen!
---
|
---
| I hope you and your family had a Happy Easter! Our son, Spencer, made it down from Washington D.C. to attend Church with us in Bowling Green, Virginia, where Tracy's Dad taught us a Sunday School lesson on how Resurrection Sunday is the day the world was changed.
To all of our Jewish friends, we wish you a happy Passover!
---
| "Exceeded Its Legal Power".
---
|
---
| "Exceeded it's legal power". This is a recurring theme these days. Thank God US District Judge Kathryn Kimball Mizelle stood up and ruled the national public health agency had exceeded its legal powers in issuing the mandate. Her order on Monday effectively removes the masking requirement in all airports, trains, taxis and transit hubs. Uber has removed their mask requirement as well.

---
|

|
---

We covered several things, such as reducing Governor Emergency Executive Powers, the 2nd Amendment, the budget, law enforcement legislation, education, special session, and more. "I really liked Anderson... you two should campaign together more often as you play off each other very well and the information and humor was great!"

|

|
---
| I enjoyed breakfast with Sheriff Kidd and friends in Buckingham County. If you get a chance, you should get a meal at Teresa's Place in Buckingham County.

|

| I attended the Powhatan GOP committee meeting where they had huge attendance, discussed the 5th congressional district convention and I gave a legislative update!

---
|

| I attended the fifth congressional district committee meeting. Our country is in big trouble and people are suffering due to radical leftist policies like open borders, defunding the police, over taxing and over spending, woke ideologies, and more. We have got to come together as a party and stop the craziness coming out of Washington!

|

The last time a ship of this size was sunk in military conflict was in 1982 during the Falkland islands conflict. Please pray for the innocent people being killed or impacted by the war in Ukraine.

In addition to my session update, Delegate Buddy Fowler, Supervisor Pat O'Bannon, 4th Congressional candidate Bishop Leon Benjamin, and Peter Foster speaking for Congressman Rob Wittman spoke.

clean_body: Father Navy SEAL Business Owner | | | | | | April Update 2022 | VA Delegate John McGuire Running for State Senate D10 in 2023 (Let's un-California Virginia) Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | | We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, rising gas prices, taxes, public safety, education, School Choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, protecting the sanctity of life, protecting our 2nd amendment, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Governor Youngkin and the rest of us in the General Assembly are working hard to address your concerns. | Promises Kept | | We are still in special session and without a budget and we still have bills in conference. Establishing the budget would have been easy if we had a Republican State Senate, as most agree that we need: raises for teachers, more money for schools, and law enforcement. Democrats in the Senate are dragging things out and trying to block Governor Youngkin's agenda. This Wednesday we will return to Richmond to review and vote on Governor amendments. Speaker Todd Gilbert and our Republican Caucus are doing a great job working together as a team, but we must win back the State Senate to make big changes. We are all proud to serve with Republican Governor Glen Youngkin. Here is my April update with some of the things on my mind and some of what I've been up to around the district: | March for Life April 27, 2022 | | Life is a miracle and must be protected at all cost. Each year I carry this backpack in session to each committee with a baby sock to remind others we must protect our most vulnerable. == gave me this idea years ago. Please join me April 27 for the 4th Annual Virginia March for Life, hosted by the ==. Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Sears and Alveda King will speak on the steps of the Virginia Capitol.== FYI, President Trump was the first president in history to speak at the March for Life in Washington D.C. | | Voter Fraud | | All of our anti-voter fraud or voter integrity bills were killed or watered down in the Democrat Virginia State Senate this year. Send me to the Virginia State Senate and we will get common sense voter integrity laws done in Virginia! | 2A | | Not only does our Second Amendment codify our God-given rights to protect ourselves, but it is also a national security issue. An enemy would be foolish to invade a well-armed American people. Each year our pro-gun Second Amendment bills are killed in the Democrat State Senate. With a 100 VCDL score each year, I've introduced constitutional carry, the Jack Wilson act, sovereign immunity (you can sue the Government if you get shot in a gun free zone), and other pro Second Amendment bills. Let's work together and win a Republican majority State Senate next year and stop infringements on our God-given Second Amendment rights. One of the reasons I'm running for State Senate is to continue fighting to protect your Second Amendment rights! | The Stop Woke Act | | Governor Ron DeSantis used political force to end Disney's ability to self-govern. He also went after school text books with divisive ideologies, passed a Parental Rights bill, and proposed a congressional map that would add four more Republican Districts. | Beagle Bills | | Glenn Youngkin started special session off by passing five bipartisan Beagle bills, where every legislator voted, "yes", and he delivered a message we can work together to get things done for Virginians. My friends and fellow Delegates, Rob Bell - 58th District of VA House of Delegates and H. Buddy Fowler - 55th District of VA House of Delegates, and I attended the signing with Buddy's Rabbit Dog, Greta, where Governor Youngkin signed Delegate Bell's and Delegates Fowler's Beagle bills into law!! | Our Intern, Annie | | Annie, an avid hunter and fisher, lives in District 56 and started an outdoor Hunting/ Fishing club for teens, and she has an interest in politics. While helping us during Special Session she met many legislators and staff. She had many questions for our Lieutenant Governor. Thank you, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earl Sears, for answering our intern, Annie's, questions on politics, the military, and more. | RIP Officer Trey Sutton | | | I attended the heartbreaking funeral and then the burial for Henrico Police Officer, Trey Marshal Sutton. who tragically passed away too young, at age 24, on March 22. His fiancee gave a beautiful account of their love, and his brother shared his story. We are blessed as a country to have men and women in law-enforcement who risk their life to keep us safe every day. Thank you for your service, and RIP Trey. Please send prayers for officer Greg Petrohovich, who is still in the hospital but getting better. | Hanover Sheriff, A Salute to Our Heroes | | | I was honored to be one of many proud sponsors at the "A Salute to Our Heroes" Annual Awards Presentation in Hanover County. Without our men and women in law-enforcement we would not have a country. Thank you for your selfless service! Hanover Sheriff Hines, deputies, and staff did an incredible job honoring our heroes. It was great to see Attorney General Jason Miyares and Secretary of Public Service and Homeland Security Robert Mosier as well. #virginia | Middle Resolution Session Update panel | | I had the honor of being on the Middle Resolution Session Update Panel with fellow members of the General Assembly, including Republican Senator Ryan McDoogle, Republican Delegate Buddy Fowler, and Republican Delegate Scott Wyatt. The Middle Resolution is doing great work to improve education and to preserve and protect our conservative values. Thank you! | Rising Cost of living | | Under President Trump we had the strongest economy ever and with record unemployment. The Democrat Biden Administration wants to tax and spend us out of existence. The federal government is printing money so fast the value of the dollar keeps getting lower and lower and lower. Please vote Republican in November so we can get the majority back in Congress and stop wasteful government spending, unconstitutional mandates, and more. | Another Promise Kept | | Isn't it great that we have a Governor who actually supports our Law Enforcement. Governor Youngkin kept another campaign promise by donating his first quarter salary to the Law Enforcement Assistance Fund. #backtheblue | Jeff Katz Radio | | Redistricting chopped my House of Delegate District 56 into 5 pieces, and it took me away from over 90% of the people I've represented for the last 5 years. After much prayer and consideration, I announced that I am running for the new Senate District 10 seat. This will allow me to continue to serve most of you and to make many new friends. Our Virginia State Senate District 10 for 2023 signs are in, and as promised on the air, the first John McGuire for State Senate yard sign was put in the yard of radio talk show host, patriot, and former police officer, Jeff Katz. Together we will win the state Senate, "un-California Virginia", and help pass Governor Glenn Youngkin's agenda. Thank you for your support! == D10 Counties: Hanover, Powhatan, Louisa, Fluvanna, Goochland, Buckingham, Appomattox, Amelia, Prince Edward, Cumberland | My Veteran Bill HB 1128 | | My bill, HB 1128, which reduces taxes up to 40k on Veteran Retirement pay, is still in conference. We are still negotiating with the Democrat Senate and working to get it done! | Nascar | | I attended a NASCAR race at Richmond Raceway with our Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Sears, Speaker Todd Gilbert, Senator Ryan McDoogle, Delegate Scott Wyatt, and more. I have really enjoyed the relationships we've built over the last few years while helping improve economic development in Virginia. | Nascar Ministries | | | Meet JR and his car "Flik" JR infuses his excitement for Nascar racing and love of God to teach Christian Values and inspire others. Thank you for all you do to minister to our young people. You should zoom in and read the messages on his car. We are excited to have your support. | Louisa High School FFA Highway Clean Up | | We picked up a lot of trash on Davis Highway in Mineral, Virginia, at the Louisa High School FFA Highway Clean Up and Alumni Mixer. This was a lot of fun working with young people and it gives me hope for the future. It has been an honor representing Louisa County for the last five years in the General Assembly. Thank you to the teachers, parents, FFL Officers, CTE folks, and other leaders for preparing our young people for life! #lionpride #virginia #proudtoserve | | | | Fentanyl Fatal Overdose Epidemic | | I submitted House Bill 108 this year, which would make it a felony Homicide for drug dealers to distribute fentanyl, resulting in drug users dying from an overdose. Unfortunately, Democrats in the House and the State Senate voted, "no". There is a fatal overdose epidemic in our Commonwealth and Country. These drugs, which are manufactured in China, are coming across our southern border and killing Americans. Please vote Republican so we can stop drug dealers from poisoning our people. == | Gender Confusion | | | This is outrageous! Can you believe that a Government website is encouraging Gender Confusion to both children and adults. On their website it says, "The mission of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) is to enhance the health and well-being of all Americans, by providing for effective health and human services, and by fostering sound, sustained advances in the sciences underlying medicine, public health, and social services." How could anyone think this ok? == | Louisa School Safety Task Force | | I've had the honor of being part of the Louisa County Safe Schools Task Force for over three years now, with teachers, law enforcement, counselors, and others. I gave our team a legislative update, with regard to the budget and legislation that impacts safe schools in Virginia. In many ways Louisa is setting the standard. Thank you, Superintendent Doug Straley and team, for all of your hard work. #lcps #virginia | Fundraiser/ Date Night | | Tracy and I were proud to support the St. Mary's Catholic School fundraiser. What a wonderful way to support local students with my best friend! "Our Christ-centered approach to learning encourages responsibility, accountability, respect, and above all compassion for one another." | James River Republican Women | | We had a record turnout at the James River Republican Women's meeting, where I gave a legislative update. Thank you, ladies, for all you do to support conservative values and to help get Republicans elected! | Homeschoolers | | | I had the honor of speaking with homeschool parents and homeschool students all around my district on my experience as a Navy SEAL, and my continued service to our country in the General Assembly! President Trump and conservative Republican leaders have been rallying patriots like you to get in the fight. They know that if Democrats outperform us in key battleground districts, there's no chance we can win back the House this year.

It's why we've asked you so many times to help.

Your 11x-matched donation will be the difference between sending a Republican Red Wave to Congress this fall or admitting defeat to the Democrats once again.

subject: Vernon Jones to be featured in town hall hosted by President Trump

| Vernon Jones to Join President Trump in Tonight's 7PM Town Hall Event
---
| |
---
|
---
| Watkinsville, Georgia (April 25, 2022) Tonight at 7pm EST, Vernon Jones will be featured in a dial-in town hall hosted by President Trump!
The town hall will allow voters of Georgia's 10th Congressional District to have a chance to ask questions about what issues are most important to them.
To join and be a part of this incredibly special event, dial-in to 770-691-6405.
President Trump and Vernon Jones hope you will join them in their effort to Take America Back!
[jonesforgeorgia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nd27vj4kiKKDoyOXpbrJVmuIbN9YyILxV34QDBJQDm_ugzVeEBaa9GklXDOvZfkWKB_BysRmpaCOtc2Za0GxQ-Spq19ydAVUZ0qANbQruhGeIcu-lYNvKvQP-XovriTv8ejUZUttBAGd0Yjmr_vjJgA7N9aQ4Mza&c=jN8oUC4yvTXvAlUGrYE_N_-qrmdzf6P_EhDvoGANLqMD_4BF7XgxLw==&ch=ChemLUIjGQKYEX9WvUaZa0qCR8XBdWvL-fTRjUkZsYDbkjF41KPweQ==)

About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Having Maura Healey as Governor would ruin our state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
I find it shameful that the House of Representatives is debating a budget plan this week that does not include any tax cuts for Massachusetts residents.
Inflation is running at more than eight percent, the highest cost of living increase in a generation. Bay Staters are facing soaring prices on gas, groceries, and other goods. For Beacon Hill leaders to say that tax breaks 'weren't necessary' in the Budget is ludicrous.
Furthermore, as House leaders spend millions of dollars of taxpayer money on free phone calls for prisoners and eliminating probation and parole fees, I find it disgraceful - but not surprising - that our state's top law enforcement official, Attorney General Maura Healey, has remained silent in defense of law-abiding, taxpaying citizens.
This is a prime example of why having Maura Healey as Governor would ruin our state. Maura Healey won't stand up to progressive policies passed by the Legislature, she will embrace them. I'm not going to let that happen.
As Governor, I will work hard to realign priorities on Beacon Hill. I will block progressive policies that favor special interests and replace them with a different approach that always favors Massachusetts residents, their freedom, and their hard-earned taxpayer dollars.
---
|
---
|
---

body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44519259/341981052/2093356308?refcode=emailheader&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRkZmQwMS1hMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWKFjEuJZBSyKPFmY9qzSzwTgSjgt5dgdkzYolc0F9E=)

| Hey, Team,

Earlier this month, we sent around our critical Voting Rights Strategy Survey but checking the responses, we noticed you hadn't submitted your response yet.

[As one of our top supporters, your input will be crucial in determining our strategy for this election year. We truly value your input!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44519260/341981053/51431496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRkZmQwMS1hMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWKFjEuJZBSyKPFmY9qzSzwTgSjgt5dgdkzYolc0F9E=&emci=74bbaa1d-99c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e6ddfd01-a0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=26828920)

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: The plan has not changed. Get ready!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,I wanted to make contact with you to let you know the plan has not changed. Unfortunately, it looks like Brad Little will be the Republican nominee and he is doing a good job at making people believe he saved Idaho from COVID and has made wise decisions. However, Little was the first to outlaw Hydroxychloroquine, out of all the States. Also, Idaho was the first State to arrest people for going to church and to arrest a mother for going to the park, all under Brad Little's "self isolation" orders. 1000's of Idaho businesses were shut down and put out of business because of Brad Little. Our children in schools were forced to wear masks for many many months. The pressure came from the Governor's office because he was required to force federal mandates after receiving billions of federal COVID money. Brad Little will never stand for Idahoans, he is owned by Washington D.C. and our grandchildren will be paying for his fiscal decisions if we don't stop him and Biden. After the primaries I will need your help and donations again to unite conservatives all over Idaho to end the Idaho good old boys regime, currently lead by Brad Little and Scott Bedke. body:

World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history,
encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today,
only around one percent
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskzS7OH0N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

World War
II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing
global fighting in unprecedented ways.

But
today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans
who fought in the war are still alive.

As we
lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the
living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons
learned from this world war.

That's
why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The
Second World Wars." And right now, you can receive your very own
DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of
$100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on
behalf of liberty.

This
limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military
historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and
strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the
Allies' victory.

This is
one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there
are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to
secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one
shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to
Hillsdale College.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World
Wars" on DVD today:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars

Thank you
for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans
through education with Hillsdale College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College
