**_Do you believe Roe v. Wade should be the law of the land?_** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536415/342020728/1529008861?refcode=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWQwNTY3ZC1iOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuJa3bQTrhDdNUNOShpWKIeBigFPOOhbJBrXz2od59Y=&emci=8e08f825-a0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536416/342020729/1529008861?refcode=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWQwNTY3ZC1iOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuJa3bQTrhDdNUNOShpWKIeBigFPOOhbJBrXz2od59Y=&emci=8e08f825-a0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---|---
Peter, at any moment, the Supreme Court may decide to gut _Roe v. Wade_ or overturn it entirely. **Radical right-wingers are closer than they ever have been to achieving their goal of defeating the constitutional right to abortion.**
It would be the most consequential ruling on reproductive rights in a generation — and will affect every corner of this country.
If and when _Roe_ is overturned, 26 states are certain or likely to ban abortion, forcing patients seeking abortion care to travel elsewhere to access it.
**Here in North Carolina, if Republicans gain supermajorities in Raleigh, they could institute an abortion ban for our state as well. Roy has already used his veto power to protect access to reproductive care, but in the face of veto-proof majorities, he wouldn’t be able to block a ban.**
With that in mind, we want to hear from you right now: Do you believe _Roe v. Wade_ should remain the law of the land?
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536417/342020730/1529008861?refcode=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWQwNTY3ZC1iOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuJa3bQTrhDdNUNOShpWKIeBigFPOOhbJBrXz2od59Y=&emci=8e08f825-a0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536418/342020731/1529008861?refcode=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWQwNTY3ZC1iOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuJa3bQTrhDdNUNOShpWKIeBigFPOOhbJBrXz2od59Y=&emci=8e08f825-a0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e5d0567d-b8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

body:
Thank you to all who helped to make it happen!!!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a48568c31ece/good-news-we-are-on-the-ballot?e=77bc5297c6)

** Melissa Martz WILL be on your Ballot.
------------------------------------------------------------

Thanks to the help of many many patriots, Melissa Martz will be on the ballot and people will have another option for Constitutional representation.

See here: https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=f6a2497ffb&e=77bc5297c6

*THANK YOU* to all who helped in the effort to collect the signatures needed. There are still more signatures to be counted but the campaign has satisfied the number required to get on to the ballot.

Stay Free,

The Melissa Martz Campaign

============================================================

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Restoring the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to tell you a little bit about my grandfathers, and how their story inspired me to run for Congress here in Rhode Island's 2nd District.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44512074/341952185/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzgyMjhhMC05N2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtPG2HGWKxrIntIwSrKoz_oyq0iKr6yI7YF8qp2Riks=&emci=60809b86-56c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c38228a0-97c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

I want to tell you a little bit about my grandfathers, and how their story inspired me to run for Congress here in Rhode Island's 2nd District.

My family is incredibly fortunate to be an example of the American Dream. Both of my grandfathers were sons of immigrants. They grew up poor and never graduated from college, but both were able to find good, middle-class jobs.

Grandpa Bob was a union steelworker in Worcester. Grandpa Louis was a bookkeeper at a fruit canning company in New York. Those jobs provided them the ability to start families, send their kids to college, and with the help of the GI bill, buy homes.
|
---|---
My own parents met in college and started a business together in Rhode Island. They built a life for me and my siblings that my grandparents never could have imagined.
This was the American Dream that was so common a generation ago – the promise that with hard work and perseverance, each generation can leave a better life for their kids than they had for themselves. But now, in our time, that American Dream of economic mobility has broken down for many families and was never afforded to others.

Today, we're seeing the cost of living rise, and people have to work harder and harder just to put food on the table. Families are worried about their future, and what it will look like for their children and grandchildren.

As proud new parents, my wife Julia and I understand that worry. We want our son Max to grow up in a country where this American Dream is possible for every family – regardless of zip code.
As Treasurer, I've worked to build a stronger and more equitable economy for all Rhode Islanders – and that's a fight I'll continue in Congress.

In Congress, I will focus on creating good jobs and lowering costs so that families can make ends meet. I'll work to lower the cost of prescription drugs, ensure every child has access to free universal pre-K and affordable childcare, make college and career technical training more affordable, and more.

Peter, we can restore the American Dream, but we need to elect representatives who will fight for working families. As a congressman, that's exactly what I'll do – but first, I need your support to win a tough race.

[**Before my end-of-month deadline on Friday at midnight, will you chip in $5 or more to send me to Congress to help restore the American Dream for all Rhode Island families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44512075/341952186/-2050945294?refcode=em22_220425_eom1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220425_eom1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzgyMjhhMC05N2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtPG2HGWKxrIntIwSrKoz_oyq0iKr6yI7YF8qp2Riks=)

name: Emily Mellits
subject: How we beat Karamo’s fundraising
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
On Saturday, we got the news: notorious election conspiracy theorist Kristina Karamo has been formally endorsed as Jocelyn’s opponent for secretary of state. As a member of the finance team, it’s my job to examine her campaign fundraising and make sure we have the strategy to beat her on Election Day.

Here’s the short of what I learned. Karamo is backed by a large network of donors that will make her one of the most well-funded Michigan secretary of state candidates in history.

And now, with the formal endorsement, we know she’s going to tap into Michigan’s dark money, extremist donor network. That means millions of dollars from the Devos family and their allies potentially going directly into Karamo’s coffers.

Now, the fact that such a notorious anti-democratic candidate can attract such an extensive donor network is concerning. But we know we have more grassroots supporters behind Jocelyn’s pro-democracy campaign and if you can sign up as a recurring supporter, we’ll have a great chance at re-electing Jocelyn in November.

Can you support Jocelyn today with a sustaining contribution? Any amount you can pitch in will go a long way towards making sure Jocelyn has the resources she needs to serve Michigan was another term as secretary of state.

Support the campaign>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=042522

-Emily

body:

[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgom7ntehuecp35jvt7s1jsjr7jo6rcc0kk3d2fo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe1opj61gm8o30cuq7bdpmc8q68d71c6q32dtgs4oe4ophedonapbkejinfcdnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6p77mpj6cd34mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg69o33c1i61oh5u)

| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2krm4uh4j70mpbaor2j2qq1vsmorkdmjjb0u3do_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cjg66o34c3h2bs "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson

| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

name: Ashley Ward
subject: Weekly Update: Early Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
Weekly Updates
A MESSAGE FROM ASHLEY
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/FirstTimeVoter_Savannah.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/FirstTimeVoter_Olivia.jpg]
Voting Day is a big deal in our house. I've taken our girls to vote with me since they were born. I believe this to be an important civic duty and wanted my girls to understand that voting is an important part of being a responsible, engaged citizen. It is always so fun to take them the first day they can vote. Our polling site breaks out into applause whenever we have a first time voter. I love poll workers! Make sure to thank yours when you see them this year - and get out there and VOTE!
Over the last few years, around the nation we've seen states and local governments erode voting rights, using tactics to suppress voter turnout and concentrate the power to dictate the outcomes of elections to legislative branches. This assault on voting rights threatens the stability and very existence of our government.
To address this critical issue, I support a stand-alone anti-gerrymandering act because gerrymandering is the greatest threat to not only voting rights, but also ethical governance. We need representatives who are accountable to the people they serve, not special interest groups and large donors. Partisan gerrymandering undermines fair representation, creating an environment that lacks accountability. There is no incentive under our current system for members of Congress to work together to pass important legislation because in gerrymandered districts, their seats are secure regardless of how or if they vote. These hyper-partisan districts also mean candidates focus on culture wars rather than the issues important to voters, such as affordable healthcare, climate change, tax reform, education, and many more.
I also support the For the People Act that would transform our voting systems in the U.S. by creating a national automatic system for voter registration, standards for mail-in and absentee ballots, campaign finance, and more.
Finally, we must pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act which would restore the Voting Rights Act, ensuring minority voting rights, providing proper oversight for states that wish to make changes to their voting laws, and more. In addition to these, I would support amendments that restore the voting rights for people with felonies and remove barriers for prior felons to vote, such as the requirement to pay fees before voting.
Rev. Martin Luther King, Jr. wrote, " The vote is the most powerful instrument ever devised by human beings for breaking down injustice and destroying the terrible walls which imprison people because they are different from others." I believe this to be true. And I believe most of you do as well. Therefore we must defend voting rights with the same force that we defend all other rights. After all, every other right we have is dependent upon the right to vote.
EARLY VOTING BEGINS THIS WEEK!
We need volunteers to work polling sites during Early Voting and on Primary Day!
Having volunteers at voting sites to pass out literature to voters is a critical part of voter outreach. We are currently asking anyone who has time to consider helping us out at the polling sites across our district.
Early voting begins THURSDAY, April 28th through May 14th. Primary Day is on May 17th. Please indicate in the forms below your availability. The number of polling sites we can cover will depend upon the number of volunteers. So come on out and help, even if you only have a couple of hours!
EARLY VOTING [https://forms.gle/iRZR1M7PDAAkQdW1A] PRIMARY DAY [https://forms.gle/RJthuDNpLARSkL6s6]
Early Voting Information
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VotingDates.png]
Looking for where to Early Vote in your county? See the links below:
Alamance County [https://www.alamance-nc.com/elections/one-stop-early-voting-locations/]
Durham County [https://www.dcovotes.com/home/showpublisheddocument/36244/637807804159370000]
Orange County [https://www.orangecountync.gov/1116/Early-Voting]
Person County [https://www.personcountync.gov/departments-services/departments-a-h/elections/one-stop-early-voting-hours]
Note: Granville County currently has no voting sites listed on their website. Reach out to the Granville County Board of Elections to learn more.
OUT AND ABOUT
EARTH DAY WEEKEND
We kicked this weekend off with Earth Day on Friday! For me, Earth Day is every day. But it is good to have a dedicated day to remind ourselves of our obligation to be good stewards of our planet. And what better way to spend Earth Day weekend than outside most of the weekend! We started off on Friday canvassing in the Watts-Hillandale neighborhood in Durham. Just look at that beautiful old tree! I can only imagine all of the things that beautiful tree has witnessed.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8497.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8501.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8499.jpg]
Then I headed over to Alamance County for a wonderful Friday night event with members of the Elon community.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8502.jpg] I met so many business leaders, like the owner of Pandora's Pies - a woman owned and operated business. I also met many members of the community who were out to enjoy a lovely evening of music and fellowship. And of course, I spent time with my new friend, Scarlett. She's counting on us to ensure a safe and healthy future for her. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8509.jpg]
Then on Saturday it was over to the Carrboro Farmer's Market where I had great conversations with farmers. One of the largest stakeholder groups I've worked with in my work on climate change have been farmers. I often say that I've never once had to convince a farmer that climate change is happening. It's true.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8525.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8519.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8534.jpg]
And I ended up the week with an Earth Day Service at Binkley Baptist Church in Chapel Hill, followed by the Orange County Democratic Party Ice Cream Social at Fairview Park in Hillsborough. In truth, I'm sad to see this weekend end. I've so enjoyed being out in the community meeting with everyone!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8551.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8553.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8550.JPG]
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN
As early voting approaches, now is the time for the campaign to purchase outreach materials! Nearly 90% of my campaign budget goes to outreach. This means that your donation goes directly toward gaining votes. In order to reach voters in all FIVE counties of the district, we must have a robust outreach strategy.
Any donation you can give helps us reach that goal! Please consider donating today to help our campaign purchase the materials we need to reach voters!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ce00d14a-b6c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/f13176b3-99c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMxNzZiMy05OWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y43QE6YWCRDFhvjmO-8ES-omaH7qdbkHlBi1PeTj4P8=&id=107267475 .

I'm coming straight to you because I've made an important decision ahead of the 2022 midterm elections. As one of our top supporters, I wanted you to be the first to know the news.

I know that Republicans are just FIVE seats away from retaking the House, so I want to do everything I can to push our candidates to victory.

_**That's why I'm endorsing Amanda Adkins for Congress in an effort to flip a seat from blue to RED! **_

Nancy Pelosi and Big Money donors are trying to do everything they can to defeat Amanda. See, Amanda is challenging one of Pelosi's most loyal allies and working to FLIP a critical seat RED.

_**The _Cook Political Report _has rated Amanda's race a TOSS-UP! This means we are on the verge of defeating a Democrat and getting one seat closer to retaking the House!**_

If we are going to win back control of the House and FIRE Nancy Pelosi, then _**we must WIN this seat!**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60228910:6N1rfvopN:m:1:3299561967:A080DC45FA436448BAF25057B0708839:r)
---

Susan and I have known Amanda for years -- she's a businesswoman, a principled conservative and the very definition of a Pipehitter -- she gets things done.

Amanda is committed to simpler government, smart healthcare and strong economic growth that creates high quality jobs for all Americans.

She's exactly the kind of person we need more of in Washington today. _**I am proud to call Amanda our friend and give her our most enthusiastic endorsement in her race. **_

I'm hoping **[you will make a donation to support Amanda and help us win back control of the House for Republicans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60228910:6N1rfvopN:m:1:3299561967:A080DC45FA436448BAF25057B0708839:r "you will make a donation to support Amanda and help us win back control of the House for Republicans.")**

We can't do this without you -- candidates like Amanda need all the help that they can get or else we're going to give Nancy Pelosi and her "Squad" two more years to destroy our American values and to destroy the good work we accomplished during the Trump Administration.

So, please **[RUSH a contribution by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60228911:6N1rfvopN:m:1:3299561967:A080DC45FA436448BAF25057B0708839:r "RUSH a
contribution by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT")** to make sure that we have the resources we need to FIRE Nancy Pelosi and send principled conservatives to provide the responsible leadership Congress desperately needs.

We're counting on you, and we look forward to seeing your name on our list of donors by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.

Never Give An Inch,
---

Peter, Every Republican politician talks a big game about limiting the role of the federal government and making massive spending cuts "once elected," but not many have the experience needed to get things done in Washington... Electing RINOs who adopt Republican rhetoric during the primaries but turn their backs on the people they represent once elected is one of the reasons Washington has an out-of-control spending problem. We need Proven Conservative Fighters in Washington. As a state representative, I fought to make significant cuts to New Hampshire's state budget because people all across our state are struggling to make ends meet in Biden's crippling economy. New Hampshire is the only state in the country to make cuts to its budget. This would have never happened if our leaders in Washington were in charge of our finances... We are more than $30 TRILLION in debt... but that's not stopping radical socialists like Nancy Pelosi and Chris Pappas from trying to set the national record for the most taxpayer money spent on useless government programs in a single term. While we can't afford to fill our tanks to get to work... the corrupt Washington establishment is finding new ways to tax and spend our way out of a future. If we don't address the real cause of inflation now, we won't have a future to protect. Peter, I want to take our fight to Washington to restore fiscal responsibility, save our economy, and let the American people keep more of their hard-earned money, but I need all the help I can to spread our message of limited government. Starting next month, my team is planning to purchase over 1,000 yard signs and materials to share through New Hampshire's 1st Congressional district. Thanks to Joe Biden's crippling economy, the cost of materials has increased tremendously, and we need to raise $5,280 by the end of the month to effectively reach every voter in our district. Peter, I'm counting on your support. Can you make an urgent donation to my campaign today to help me get our America-First message to every single voter in the district? We need Proven Conservative Fighters in Washington. As a state representative, I fought to make significant cuts to New Hampshire's state budget because people all across our state are struggling to make ends meet in Biden's crippling economy. New Hampshire is the only state in the country to make cuts to its budget. This would have never happened if our leaders in Washington were in charge of our finances... We are more than $30 TRILLION in debt... but that's not stopping radical socialists like Nancy Pelosi and Chris Pappas from trying to set the national record for the most taxpayer money spent on useless government programs in a single term. While we can't afford to fill our tanks to get to work... the corrupt Washington establishment is finding new ways to tax and spend our way out of a future. If we don't address the real cause of inflation now, we won't have a future to protect. Peter, I want to take our fight to Washington to restore fiscal responsibility, save our economy, and let the American people keep more of their hard-earned money, but I need all the help I can to spread our message of limited government. Starting next month, my team is planning to purchase over 1,000 yard signs and materials to share through New Hampshire's 1st Congressional district. Thanks to Joe Biden's crippling economy, the cost of materials has increased tremendously, and we need to raise $5,280 by the end of the month to effectively reach every voter in our district. Peter, I'm counting on your support. Can you make an urgent donation to my campaign today to help me get our America-First message to every single voter in the district? Click an option below to make a contribution today: Ask yourself: "What has Chris Pappas done for our district? " Do we really want to elect another inexperienced establishment politician who is disconnected from New Hampshire's values to represent us in Congress? As the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race, I plan to take my fight in New Hampshire to Washington to protect and serve the American people. My record speaks for itself, and I'm prepared to be the most outspoken voice for our liberty once elected. You have my word. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

body:
Watch our latest ad as we enter the final month before the Primary Runoff Election on May 24th. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13624462?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=b2e03eea14&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , **We’re proud to present our latest TV spot —[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f364c942e6&e=5d8d80652b)****"I Believe"**.

**As we enter the final month before the Primary Runoff Election on May 24th** , it's more important than ever to spread our message for Joe, the experienced “ready on Day One” choice.
[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=91b72d78bf&e=5d8d80652b)
[**Contribute today to get this ad on TV now!**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d1b4ff74be&e=5d8d80652b)
Texas has been weakened by the corruption of the Paxton administration for too long — and now we have a chance to do something about it. **But we must take action and let our voices be heard in the ballot booth.**

**We’ve set our budget to run this ad all over Texas from May 1 through the May 24 election.** We need you and all of Joe’s supporters to contribute something today to keep us on the airwaves. [**Can you chip in $10 or more to help us keep this on television through May 24?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=86be493816&e=5d8d80652b)

Our campaign is robust and always growing: 6,000 contributions, dozens of endorsements, 400 campaign appearances all over Texas, substantial engagement and reach on all social media platforms, hundreds of thousands of primary supporters, and millions eagerly waiting to support Joe in November to defeat the most corrupt Attorney General in Texas history.

**The runoff election is less than one month away.** Joe needs your financial support and vote to win this primary runoff. [**Contribute today and vote early May 16-20 and on Election Day May 24.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=41f6422fbe&e=5d8d80652b)

You have a chance to make history by nominating the candidate who will beat Paxton in the Fall. By supporting Joe, you will help elect a Democrat to statewide office for the first time in over a generation. **Let’s support Joe and restore integrity to the consequential office of Texas Attorney General. **

Onward!

Team Jaworski

When I think of my most valuable supporters, _I don't think of the ones who are necessarily the BIGGEST donors..._

I think of the ones I know I can count on.

Despite everything the Left has thrown at us (and it has been A LOT), YOU have never let me down. YOU are what keeps me going, which is why I am proud to let you know that you've been identified as a **Trump MVP.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: More corruption in the Loudoun School Board removal cases
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Judge Padrick appointed a new woke special prosecutor in the case to remove Atoosa Reaser - a prosecutor who is Biberaj's fellow member of ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c0fce0034a04/more-corruption-in-the-loudoun-school-board-removal-cases-5395363?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=51b9fc5fb1&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

New developments in the Loudoun County School Board removal cases should be concerning to every parent who cares about their children.

On April 14th, Judge Thomas Padrick appointed a new special prosecutor in the case to remove Atoosa Reaser. Buta Biberaj recused herself with the clear expectation that she would be disqualified.

To replace Biberaj, Judge Padrick appointed Commonwealth's Attorney Joseph Platania of the City of Charlottesville. Platania is one of only twelve Commonwealth's Attorneys across the state who is a member of Virginia Progressive Prosecutors for Justice \- a group of twelve that includes, you guessed it, Buta Biberaj.

>From the 132 localities across Virginia, Biberaj is being replaced by one of 12 Commonwealth's Attorneys who is **guaranteed** to push exactly the same biased, woke agenda and cover for the corrupt school board.

There is no scenario under which CA Platania qualifies as an unbiased or independent special prosecutor in this case. He will be just as biased towards Atoosa Reaser and the rest of the corrupt Loudoun County School Board as Buta Biberaj.

[You can see all the details here.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=5df968296f&e=fc83fb200d)

Parents and voters in Loudoun County deserve a truly unbiased attorney and an independent investigation that gets to the bottom of the school board's corruption.

With [Governor Youngkin pushing to require elections of the Loudoun County School Board this year instead of next,](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=011dc3390f&e=fc83fb200d) I'm gearing up to run alongside a fantastic slate of Republican school board candidates this fall.

Together, we can put a final end to the corruption of the school board and replace these woke leftists at the ballot box - even if we can't get a fair day in court.

[Will you chip in a small amount of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 towards our efforts to replace the corrupt Loudoun County School Board and win up and down the ballot this November?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ec49fe92a8&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0a387a309d&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")

| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=eb90850819&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")

|
I'm counting on your help to fix our education system in Loudoun County and across the 10th district.

Working together, we will be able to correct the course of our country from top to bottom this November.

Thank you for your support,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

| | |

Hey, friend, Frank Wood here, writing to you on behalf of my sister, Maggie Hassan. You may recognize my face from movies and television, but today, I'm focused on getting my sister reelected to the Senate.
As kids, our parents really instilled in us a commitment to doing good. Our dad survived the Battle of the Bulge and when the moment was right, the cereal bowl almost empty, he would lean in and ask, “What are you going to do for freedom today?” (Later in life, he liked to remind us any time we left the room to “vote Democratic!”)
It was a lot to take in as kids, just trying to eat our cereal and get to school, but as we've grown up, it's become clear what he wanted us to know: **Every day is a chance to make a difference. **
Maggie really took that to heart. As Governor and now Senator, Maggie has worked every day to make a difference. She’s a bright light in our country’s politics, and she truly loves talking to and listening to people.
**Look — Maggie makes the Senate a better place. It's that simple. But she's facing a really tough reelection fight, and we need to do everything we can to ensure we can win in November.**
That's why I'm writing to you today. **[Will you please make a $3 contribution right now to my sister Maggie's reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44538704/342030179/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk908-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJlNDM2Yy1iZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VL0WQ_M2NeZr3tWPYguOCIp8TC9HI3RSM6H-dJj97Bk=)**
Thank you!

Frank Wood

Team, Today, we’re less than three months away from our extremely competitive primary election on July 19, and **just five days away from our next end-of-month fundraising deadline.** **[Before I ask if you can spare a contribution towards our goal, I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so important right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44538790/342030504/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_2022042eom1_wm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjYxNmRjNi1jMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6IiqhMlAQmxYg50M9rhUujG3LRQzGHMn1L4iC8FkXEU=)** Since we launched this campaign last June (almost a whole year ago!), I said from the beginning that this is a movement, not a moment. It’s about people from all over Maryland, from all walks of life, coming together to create a state that works for all of us. Everyone deserves a seat at the table and a fair shot, and we need a leader who brings people together and fights for their best interests. I’ve been that leader before: as a combat veteran in Afghanistan and an executive at one of the nation's largest poverty-fighting organizations. I have dedicated my life to service and lifting people up, and I’m ready to do it for every Marylander as your governor. With less than 100 days to go until the Democratic primary election, things are heating up. We were first to get our TV ads on the air, but other campaigns are starting to launch theirs, and with the primary moved back, costs are increasing. **This is one of the most competitive — and expensive — gubernatorial elections in the country this year.** But I have faith that with your support, we WILL win and move Maryland forward. **[So, here’s where I have to ask: Can you pitch in a grassroots donation of $10 or more right now to help us hit our April fundraising goal and keep up our momentum?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44538791/342030505/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_2022042eom1_wm_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjYxNmRjNi1jMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6IiqhMlAQmxYg50M9rhUujG3LRQzGHMn1L4iC8FkXEU=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:

| Peter,

On the ground, our team is _**knocking on thousands of doors to ensure all voters know about Abigail and her work in Congress.**_ We need driven leaders like her in Congress, and it's going to take a collective effort to re-elect Abigail this fall, and - with your support - we'll make it happen. [_**Will you consider supporting our campaign by contributing today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_CCEYn4qAAEEVh3EuDn1Cux36IxoMZZ0JbHrUE6vO4=/DanuVon6fJSDfQJKLHagd6fSDuDOvw2CiyO6Da1PEQE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220425-1-EM&amount=25)

---
Our team is diving headfirst into the work that lays ahead of us before Election Day. We worked hard to gather petitions to get on the ballot, we're connecting with voters, listening to their stories, and we're ensuring they know how Abigail is advocating for them in Congress.

In a district like ours that some experts are calling **" the bellwether"** and that our Republican governor won by **more than 5 points** last fall, _**it 's critical our outreach efforts are robust.**_

[_**To support them, will you please contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_CCEYn4qAAEEVh3EuDn1Cux36IxoMZZ0JbHrUE6vO4=/DanuVon6fJSDfQJKLHagd6fSDuDOvw2CiyO6Da1PEQE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220425-1-EM&amount=25)

body:
The Pervert Left is trying to silence me again. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066289?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0c4bd9f6d3&e=eda539b26b)

| | Fellow Patriot:

Our families—our _children_ —are under the greatest sustained assault in our history.

Public schools are now nothing more than psychological torture camps.

Education has been replaced by the promotion of the depraved LGBT agenda, a Satanic attack on God and Nature. I call it LGBTP—the P is for pedophilia.

**These sodomite predators are grooming, brainwashing, and _mutilating_ our vulnerable children. These demons are _defiling _innocence itself, and they _must_ be stopped. **

Last week, I told you about what these subhuman monsters are doing to our children all across America.

Predictably, the Pro-Pedophile Left didn't like what I had to say. Groomers don't like being called groomers.

**When you shine a light on them, they scurry back into the darkness like the rats they are.**

_Business Insider_ ran a hit piece on me, calling me "the most homophobic candidate in America."

**__It's a great honor, but there's one problem. "Phobia" means fear. Unlike the Republican Establishment, I am not afraid of these perverts.__**

My plan to fight LGBT Groomers:
* Restore natural marriage by ending sodomite "marriage"
* Restrict adoption to straight, married couples ONLY
* Criminalize LGBT propaganda to minors
* Criminalize transgender drugs and surgeries

[It's time for leaders in D.C. who aren't afraid to stand up and fight for our children, and for the sacred rights of parents.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=16b57fcb8f&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Our RINO incumbents are failing us every day by refusing to fight the Groomers on the Left_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e06c27aab8&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me_ _ defeat the Bipartisan Establishment __\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a1604af53b&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=99952db8f8&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a52404159&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

| | [We’ll be brief, team,

Peter – we wish we were reaching out with better news. After weeks of coordinated attacks by national Republicans trying to dismantle our campaign, our opponent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) officially outraised us.
We can’t lie: we’re frustrated because the gap is SO narrow! We can’t lie: we’re frustrated because the gap is SO narrow! To win, we _need_ your grassroots support. **He's now sitting on a campaign war chest of $4.6 million to attack candidates like Abby and dismantle our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
The GOP establishment is rallying around Grassley and resorting to low-blow attacks against Abby because they know WE can win. Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings after a mere 27% of likely Iowa voters said they wanted to reelect him. It's why Donald Trump himself flew to Iowa to rally with and endorse Grassley!
Abby, the youngest woman to ever flip a House seat from red to blue, is Democrats' best hope in decades to win this Senate seat. Last time around, the race for Iowa's Senate seat was one of the most expensive in the country. **We need grassroots resources to compete and WIN, which is why we simply cannot let Chuck Grassley outraise us.**
**We've set a 24-hour emergency fundraising goal of $15,000**** t****o get back on track.[Please, help us close this gap immediately by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now. clean_body: | | | Peter – we wish we were reaching out with better news. After weeks of coordinated attacks by national Republicans trying to dismantle our campaign, our opponent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) officially outraised us. We can’t lie: we’re frustrated because the gap is SO narrow! We can’t lie: we’re frustrated because the gap is SO narrow! To win, we need your grassroots support. He's now sitting on a campaign war chest of $4.6 million to attack candidates like Abby and dismantle our Democratic majority in the Senate. The GOP establishment is rallying around Grassley and resorting to low-blow attacks against Abby because they know WE can win. Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings after a mere 27% of likely Iowa voters said they wanted to reelect him. It's why Donald Trump himself flew to Iowa to rally with and endorse Grassley! Abby, the youngest woman to ever flip a House seat from red to blue, is Democrats' best hope in decades to win this Senate seat. Last time around, the race for Iowa's Senate seat was one of the most expensive in the country. We need grassroots resources to compete and WIN, which is why we simply cannot let Chuck Grassley outraise us. We've set a 24-hour emergency fundraising goal of $15,000 to get back on track.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Nan Whaley
subject: Not one but two milestones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
I know that we can take on this challenge together

Team,
**Over the next eight days our campaign is facing not one but _two_ big milestones: Our end-of-month deadline, and our primary.**
These aren’t just any deadlines. They’re the last ones we’ll face before we’re head-to-head against our Republican opponent – and with the Ohio GOP firmly in Trump’s pocket, we’re going to need a true grassroots surge to meet this moment.
For too long now, corruption has run rampant in Columbus, and Ohio taxpayers have paid the price – literally. Mike DeWine and his ilk have shown no sign that they’re inclined to change that and put Ohio’s working families first. But _we_ can.
**[That’s why I’m asking right now: Will you chip in $5 to my campaign ahead of our April 30th end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44540019/342035635/1158586562?refcode=nw_em_220425_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWYwY2IzYi1jMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54o7fb63sIO8Rp_-rHE0BuQ78LnJ2VI9cDPHNsXDak0=)**
I am the only candidate in this race who _isn’t_ a millionaire – I can't self-fund my campaign. But what Ohio certainly doesn’t need in this moment is another out–of-touch millionaire.
I’m proud of my working class roots, and I’m proud of my leadership record. And I know that together, we can build a future for Ohio that gives all Ohioans the chance to succeed, not just the wealthy few.
**[I’m asking right now, folks – we need to stand strong to ensure we’re ready to take on our Republican opponent. Will you donate $5 or whatever you can right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44540020/342035636/1158586562?refcode=nw_em_220425_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWYwY2IzYi1jMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54o7fb63sIO8Rp_-rHE0BuQ78LnJ2VI9cDPHNsXDak0=)**
Onward,

Nan

name: James Carville
subject: Ted Cruz has a diabolical scheme
body:
Derek,
I ain’t gonna lie to you, Derek, I’m scared to death about this:
Ted Cruz was just crisscrossing Nevada ATTACKING Catherine Cortez Masto with vicious lies and smears. Cruz is evil, but he’s smart as hell and he’s in Nevada for a diabolical reason: Catherine is losing in the polls, she’s the most vulnerable Democratic senator in America, and if she loses, Cruz and McConnell will take control of the Senate!
To make matters worse, Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just unleashed $15 MILLION in attack ads against Catherine while Cruz ensures EVERY MAGA voter turns out to defeat her!
Derek, this unprecedented GOP attack campaign WILL kill our chances of holding the Senate unless Catherine can raise the resources to fight back in the next 24 hours!
That’s why I promised Catherine I would help her hit her emergency goal, and friend, I'm personally counting on you to split a contribution between Catherine and CommonGood right now. I need Democrats stepping up TODAY to help Catherine punch back against Cruz and McConnell’s attacks! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM]
It’s no surprise Ted Cruz loves Catherine’s GOP opponent, Adam Laxalt. This guy is a wacko extremist with a DANGEROUS far-right agenda.
Catherine’s opponent led Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election in Nevada. He was personally recruited by Mitch McConnell and endorsed by Donald Trump. He would cast the deciding vote in the Senate to overturn the 2024 presidential election. And he’s currently LEADING Catherine in the polls!
With polls showing Catherine 3 points behind this extremist, she CANNOT AFFORD to fall short of tonight’s emergency goal. But she’s currently 4% short with just hours until the deadline! Split a contribution of $25 right now between Catherine and CommonGood >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220425_CGVA_CCM]
Thank you for stepping up at this crucial moment.
James Carville

If you need more information on where to find your polling place, visit: [https://web.go-vote-tn.elections.tn.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44540870/342039311/179162750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2Q2ZjdiNS1jNWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxsfG_xIi3hvGKrwNEXt7AkU3bhyHQUp6rDpLQQmmfs=&emci=4e6360e5-5bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1cd6f7b5-c5c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6362892) or click the button below. ↓ [Early Voting Locations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44540872/342039312/179162750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2Q2ZjdiNS1jNWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxsfG_xIi3hvGKrwNEXt7AkU3bhyHQUp6rDpLQQmmfs=&emci=4e6360e5-5bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1cd6f7b5-c5c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6362892) **If you cannot vote this week, make a plan to vote on Tuesday, May 3rd.**

Election Day is your chance to make yourself heard. Issues like education, our economy, taxes, and so much else are on the line. Don’t sit this one out.

Happy voting!

Tennessee Democratic Party | The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: The Russell Roundup
body:
Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/russellroundup-8869810?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=116d91c106&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | It’s the beginning of the week, and that means another installment of **_Russell’s Roundup_** , your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress.
---
|
---
---
| | | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=8b0be2057b&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**PRESSING THE FLESH IN PAGELAND**

A packed crowd of +70 folks was on hand in Pageland for Tuesday night’s meeting of the Chesterfield County GOP. Russell was grateful for the chance to talk with them about why we need a Congressman who will fight for the Make America Great Again agenda in Washington, DC. Lots of enthusiasm and excitement among these fellow conservatives!
---
|
---
| |
---
**VOLUNTEER OF THE WEEK: THE COCKRELL FAMILY**

Speaking of Pageland, you can’t miss all the Fry campaign signs around Chesterfield County these days. A heart tip of the hat to Trey Cockrell. He and his family put up more than 100 yard signs at people's houses this week. That is why he’s the Roundup’s very first Volunteer of the Week.

Thanks, Trey, for all you’re doing to help us win on June 14!
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=e63f0fb896&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**SUPER SATURDAY: DOORKNOCKING IN MURRELL’S INLET **

Another Saturday, another batch of volunteers were going house-to-house to spread the word about Russell’s campaign. Dozens of folks gave up part of their weekend because they believe it’s crucial that we sent a Trump-endorsed conservative to represent us in Congress.

Would you like to spend a few hours outside in the spring splendor, joining your fellow conservatives in reaching your neighbors with Russell Fry’s message? We’d like to have you! [**Click here**](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=b9bace57fe&e=7aa6ac5965) to volunteer. And be sure to bring your appetite—because lunch is on us!
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=c3c5b3c67e&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**WILL YOU HELP RUSSELL WITH YOUR DONATION?**

Friends, there’s no getting around it: Russell Fry is running against a decade-long incumbent who has amassed $2 million in his campaign war chest. The DC Swamp has come to his financial rescue, just as we expected. But Russell is counting on contributions from everyday conservatives just like you and me right here in the Grand Strand and Pee to counter it. Whether you can give $25, $50, $100, or $1,000, any amount you can share is both desperately needed and much appreciated. [_Click here to donate_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=4b6ccbfaa9&e=7aa6ac5965). And thank you!
---
|
---
| **HQ NOW OPEN FOR BUSINESS**
Our campaign headquarters is now officially open for business! We marked the occasion with a cookout on Saturday where we stuffed volunteers with hotdogs, hamburgers, and chips. This place will be a beehive of activity from now through the June 14 primary.

**WE WANT YOU!**
Looking to get involved in Russell’s campaign? With plenty of opportunities available, there’s something for everyone. [_Click here_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=b695c2a3ec&e=7aa6ac5965)[ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=635fef183a&e=7aa6ac5965)to volunteer, and we’ll be in touch with you soon.

**Pssst! PASS IT ON!**
Help spread the word of what Russell is doing here in the 7th Congressional District. Please take a moment and forward this newsletter to 10 of your neighbors, relatives, co-workers, and friends. They’ll be glad you did!

**COUNTDOWN TO ELECTION DAY!**
There are just _**50**_ days until polls open on June 14th!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=45f7e5bea2&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=998521effb&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=2a4631b2b3&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Fry For Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Fry For CongressPO Box 14641Surfside Beach, SC 29587-4641
[Add us to your address book](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=32c26a5af2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=32c26a5af2).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&afl=1)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Heads would roll if these things were said about a Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230480:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)

---
Peter,

I have to admit - I hadn't heard of the far-left publication called _The Nation_ before last week. Now, I'll never forget it.

They published an attack piece against me - based on the color of my skin - that is beyond ridiculous and insulting.

While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece.

There are a lot of nasty things said about me in this article simply because I'm a Black Republican. Like this:

"Herschel Walker, the football star turned Georgia Senate candidate, is an animated caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives."
Or maybe this line:

"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."
It's shameful.

But the writer doesn't just take aim at me. He questions the support from folks like you, too:

"Most white people in the South vote 'R' like their entire white supremacist project depends on it."
Peter, I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign. However, can you imagine the reaction from the mainstream media if these things had been said about a Black Democrat? The outrage! There would be calls for the writer to be fired and the publication cancelled.

But I'm not calling for a protest of the author or a boycott of the publication's advertisers. Nothing like that.

_**I think the best answer is to prove them wrong at the ballot box.**_

**[Will you join me in standing up to these racist attacks?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230480:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)**

**[Stand with Herschel against far-left attacks](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230480:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)**
[** Chip in $4 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230481:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)
The media has been against our campaign since we launched last summer, but they have rarely been so brazen to say things as this:

"Georgia Republicans want Walker because he's Black and Warnock is Black, and they think they can defeat Warnock in November if they can shave just a little of the Black vote..."
I'm not **" any old Black person"** as the author of the article asserts. I'm Herschel Walker - a proud Georgian and a proud Republican - who has lived the American Dream and wants to secure that dream for the next generation of Americans from all walks of life.

_The best way to deal with racist tropes like these are to call them out, reject them, and prove them wrong._

I hope you'll stand with me against the political hit jobs that the far-left media keep throwing our way. **[Please support my campaign for the U.S. Senate today, and let's work together to unite this country instead of dividing it.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230480:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230480:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)
Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230480:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230482:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230483:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230484:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60230485:6IBnnvoNf:m:1:3317145305:62763E7DF5E5ABE2383623D0217EB4C5:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
---

body:
The evidence is clear: Trump committed crimes. | | | **The evidence is clear, team: Donald Trump committed crimes on January 6th.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xkA0M25jfyYQpb1860if8b_hzJugam83rBk16-pJ_iNlXpoPV_QlDiBWgKm_uZlhkfHuO9lUI08lc3lIkTcjnVsocvzk-QN1E2mighHkyRdbau_oa8R5d41jfoburyYbHjcmvUeSeGQEVqbwOfGrNCZD15J4lfdu_ngqrT86ciSShPnxcAbQQk6NikpiHAY1aKC32cU2ewSfE0lYQGtadUbNfyJ6Hk7eyrtDF6LJFJnGcJgvpfKt64ZcFx4Qm_FOfTWXJj6kELrg00E3EO3gD96ztrxAR_R7GPXHIcGAreJVwj_aVIPRyiVH2OPqyfk-dcNMoFdwcKoL1q3hyYOmSS6-XFVdWKWF8UOak09fWCnmhXWOYNugxbICA2heSqgus7GBaMlEFUQIw_8pA6YLEw/3li/SstVmTD1Sx-25EYPXiz7WA/h0/QWnwzrAyJYA2whVyQZ6oOCl6qCIyfGR1JM0Fx-lP3UI) Donald Trump and his cronies have done everything in their power to obstruct this investigation. Four high-ranking advisors from the Trump White House have even blatantly ignored Congressional subpoenas. **Even still, the committee has gathered clear evidence about the massive conspiracy directed by the Trump White House to overturn the election and topple American democracy.** These criminals must be held accountable, friend. That's why I proudly led the charge to hold them in contempt of Congress. Now it's time for the Justice Department to do its job and enforce the law. I'm going to keep fighting until everyone who incited the insurrection faces consequences — including Donald Trump himself. I'm grateful to have you with me, team. **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xkA0M25jfyYQpb1860if8b_hzJugam83rBk16-pJ_iNlXpoPV_QlDiBWgKm_uZlhlQyatJqhtsfYzrgyWO-iyl8c6b7wPV_X8_Tu3yKPkYrc9FCFDsNmTVbceV3kO6fOa3b_D3GRd5Kx4PTBuyd9RkB3A9dgSWhdFbwCV2tNmO26hl8yNDpR94-icb8lKGgvS10zLftK40CbeQC8ski5nRd6gAIJxzflb6BGbcWek_wfl86qHW6nYs3xRHV-2mzEbpK_bjfY5x3SdcKz8FWvqWcVcjYv_Kji5jnbgdGWPHxIqBjAD5LSRq6eQrgbYa5sR3x028u71PA2Ufo4Yxw9BS5wFLY1_jcByfgglT-MWphjH2zQIw0jEybVgIWJ9RKNRQMDJn_dGmElxAlNqqDEqd/3li/SstVmTD1Sx-25EYPXiz7WA/h1/zuV1eOlHxKEK7R23fimeW1pKD_-4nE01rLAcyUXKqWg)** — Bill

| St. Louis, MO - Donald Trump Jr. and Governor Eric Greitens joined forces in Missouri last week to meet with grassroots activists fighting for the America First agenda. Along with Greitens for U.S. Senate Chairperson Kimberly Guilfoyle, Trump Jr. and Governor Greitens met at the Strathalbyn Farms Club in Weldon Springs, Missouri to fire a few rounds at the gun range and spend time with conservative activists to discuss the importance of fighting against the liberal agenda of Joe Biden and weak establishment RINO's that have opposed President Trump from Day 1.
---
|
---
| Later in the day, Don Jr., Guilfoyle, and Governor Greitens spoke with supporters. Don Jr. reiterated what he said last week: "I see who the press hates the most. That's usually the guy I like...When CNN hates you, the Washington Post hates you, the New York Times hates you, it was like, that's my guy. That makes a lot of sense. I see the sort of sham stuff that they've thrown at Greitens. Now the prosecutor is getting in trouble. The FBI guy admits that he lied under it and when you see those kinds of setups, it makes you wonder what they're doing, and for a reason, because they tend to only go after the guys that will actually pose a threat. So we'll see what my father does in it, but you know, I certainly have my own opinions."
---
|
---
| The next day, Governor Greitens joined a great group of resilient fighters at the Warrior's Ascent graduation in Kansas City, honoring these brave warriors and public servants for their service to our nation and defense of our communities.
---
|
---
| Afterwards, Governor Greitens met with local law enforcement officers with the Kansas City Police Department and participated in a ride-along to see firsthand the challenges officers face on a daily basis--especially when Democrat Mayor Quinton Lucas has pledged to Defund the Police and has been unable to secure a ride-a-long himself.
---

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: Marjorie Taylor Green
subject: I might get kicked off the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: The Deep State is trying to kick me off the ballot. Despite donating millions to my opponents, they know they can't beat me in a fair election. So, they do what Deep State Elites do best - they try to change the rules to benefit them. They're trying to prevent me from winning before the election starts! All because I supported the right to peacefully protest the election stolen from Donald Trump in 2020. Frankly, I'm worried that without your help, they might succeed. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today with a donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60033732:WXcVfOHkN:m:1:2365227053:4D052879AC7719A91457A77744AFC49D:r).** Believe me when I say this is a coordinated effort from the D.C. Lobbyists and Washington elites who fear that I'm encouraging freedom-loving Americans to question every spending bill, unconstitutional mandate, and the socialist program they try to force upon us. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60033732:WXcVfOHkN:m:1:2365227053:4D052879AC7719A91457A77744AFC49D:r)I'm fighting to stop the border invasion, their defund agenda, and their new gun control measures, and this is how they intend to stop me. The deck has been so stacked against me that I had to file a lawsuit to stop this charade. I will probably have to take it all the way to the Supreme Court to win. **Fighting their fraudulent lawsuit could cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars.** That's money I won't be able to use to get my message out to the voters in my district. And I'm worried even if I'm successful in stopping their charade, I won't have enough to ensure victory at the ballot box. **[I'm not going to lie- the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That's why I desperately need your help today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off this new attack](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60033732:WXcVfOHkN:m:1:2365227053:4D052879AC7719A91457A77744AFC49D:r)?** It should worry you how hard they are trying to keep America First Conservatives like me off the ballot. These Leftists know we're making a difference in Congress, and it frightens them. Other states have blocked this type of ridiculous lawsuit, but I'm the Left's number one target, so I have to keep fighting. **[If you value the work that I've been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I'm going to fend off this legal challenge AND win my election, it's going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60033732:WXcVfOHkN:m:1:2365227053:4D052879AC7719A91457A77744AFC49D:r).** The one silver lining I can see is that if they're working this hard to stop me from returning to Congress, then they're scared of what I might expose next--like how much Joe Biden is indebted to China. Our America First agenda is resonating and will bring true change to our country which is why I must continue to remain a Member of Congress. But it's only going to work if I can stop this legal challenge IMMEDIATELY. **[Please help me today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60033732:WXcVfOHkN:m:1:2365227053:4D052879AC7719A91457A77744AFC49D:r).** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: photos of mom & dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541336/342041200/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjczNjkwMi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv6iH5JGbFe6gzvtRsvXit7NlTyWxAeXloV6M0Krh0s=&emci=f7d6cb5e-c8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8f736902-c9c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541337/342041208/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjczNjkwMi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv6iH5JGbFe6gzvtRsvXit7NlTyWxAeXloV6M0Krh0s=&emci=f7d6cb5e-c8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8f736902-c9c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s just days until our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $500,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our end-of-month fundraising deadline? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541338/342041215/-42398318?refcode=em20220425mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjczNjkwMi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv6iH5JGbFe6gzvtRsvXit7NlTyWxAeXloV6M0Krh0s=)

clean_body: Hello, My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day. My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close. Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why. You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office. After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks. The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you. There’s just days until our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $500,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With Senate control on the line, I am so grateful to have the support of people like you. I think my mom and dad would appreciate the support, as well. Thank you, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Patty Murray
subject: I was mad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This is a critical moment.
#
Peter,
I got involved in politics for the same reason so many other women do – I was mad.
People told me that I couldn’t make a difference. One male legislator even said I was “just a mom in tennis shoes.” I had two choices. I could admit defeat or show him just how far these tennis shoes could carry me. And here’s the thing about moms – we’re always tougher than you think.
**[I’ve been working for all of the other parents in tennis shoes ever since--and I've seen what can happen when people work together, speak up, and fight for positive change in their communities. We can keep delivering results for working families, but to do that, we've got tokeep the Senate blue. Can you pitch in $5?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541479/342041813/-1389796009?refcode=pm_em_220425_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM4YmI3Ny1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXB2SVOt8yXDC_VaAvxfEPN1_vRqpIcQr_RFhjy1rSY=)**
Right now is a critical moment for Washington state. The Republican Party is pushing a platform that would raise taxes on the middle class, make health care more expensive, threaten Medicare and Social Security, and attack everything from reproductive rights to LGTBQIA+ communities.
It’s just unacceptable. So what can we do? Come together to protect our Senate majority and ensure that these ideas have no place in our politics.
**[Will you help me keep fighting for Washington state families? Help meet our $25,000 end-of-month goal. Donate $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541480/342041814/-1389796009?refcode=pm_em_220425_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM4YmI3Ny1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXB2SVOt8yXDC_VaAvxfEPN1_vRqpIcQr_RFhjy1rSY=)**
Thank you,
Patty
