name: Charlie Crist
subject: Florida is failing under Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
“Florida has 3rd largest number of school book ban incidents” — Associated Press |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541490/342041911/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220425_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTQ1ZWRjYS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ys00FP_eRgU0JRChnF3kEFG9rJQl90ojUVj_X4xwTqU=)
---
Friend,

It pains me to say this, but Florida really is failing under Ron DeSantis. While we should be working to make sure our schools prepare all of our kids for success, Governor DeSantis is focused on Math textbooks in a bizarre attempt to appeal to far right extremists. Just take a look:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541491/342041912/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220425_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTQ1ZWRjYS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ys00FP_eRgU0JRChnF3kEFG9rJQl90ojUVj_X4xwTqU=)
---
It’s a tremendous disservice to Florida’s students, who deserve better than a governor who keeps injecting divisive right wing politics into our classrooms. And he’s doing it for one reason and one reason alone: To set himself up for the Republican nomination for president in 2024.

As governor, I’ll be focused on Florida, not on my personal political ambitions. And the good news is that polling shows we can win: Several recent surveys have me neck and neck, or even outright leading Governor DeSantis.

But friend, it won’t stay that way for long unless we work around the clock to hold DeSantis accountable and fight back against his big-money donors!

**That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in anything you can right now to help our campaign keep building momentum:**

clean_body: “Florida has 3rd largest number of school book ban incidents” — Associated Press | | | | = Friend, It pains me to say this, but Florida really is failing under Ron DeSantis. While we should be working to make sure our schools prepare all of our kids for success, Governor DeSantis is focused on Math textbooks in a bizarre attempt to appeal to far right extremists. Just take a look: = It’s a tremendous disservice to Florida’s students, who deserve better than a governor who keeps injecting divisive right wing politics into our classrooms. And he’s doing it for one reason and one reason alone: To set himself up for the Republican nomination for president in 2024. As governor, I’ll be focused on Florida, not on my personal political ambitions. And the good news is that polling shows we can win: Several recent surveys have me neck and neck, or even outright leading Governor DeSantis. But friend, it won’t stay that way for long unless we work around the clock to hold DeSantis accountable and fight back against his big-money donors! That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in anything you can right now to help our campaign keep building momentum: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Together, we can win this race and build a Florida for all Floridians. Thanks and God bless, Charlie P.S. Our "Read Banned Books" shirt is now live in our merch store = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Peter Franchot
subject: BREAKING: I’ve been endorsed by the Ellicott City & Western Howard Democratic Club!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Incredible news! I’m excited to announce that I’ve been endorsed by the Ellicott City & Western Howard Democratic Club. To everyone who voted for me, I can’t thank you enough for your trust and support. We have an exciting opportunity to redefine the promise and possibility of state government in the years to come, and together, we’ll get it done.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=20.22]
In case you don’t know, the Ellicott City & Western Howard Democratic Club didn’t endorse a candidate in 2018 – which means this is yet another indication that I’m building consensus as a candidate that everyone can support. We received over 47% of the members’ votes on the first ballot, and cleared the 50% threshold for endorsement on the second ballot. No other candidate received over 20% support.
It’s absolutely critical that Democrats in Maryland nominate someone who can decisively win the General Election, with the vision and leadership experience needed to deliver results on Day 1. Voters across the state believe our campaign can meet this challenge.
Recent polls show that I am the frontrunner in the Democratic field. With your support, we can pull ahead even further in these final, critical weeks, and secure our victory on election day. Fresh off the heels of this major endorsement, will you chip in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to raise $2,050 by 11:59 PM tonight, and a groundswell of grassroots donations can easily help us meet our goal.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement]
Four years ago, I received more votes than any candidate for state office in Maryland history. I won 22 of Maryland’s 24 jurisdictions, from red counties to blue counties. That wasn’t by accident. As the Local Candidate for Governor, the people of Maryland know me, and I know them. I can’t wait to bring my trusted brand of proven, honest leadership to the Governor’s Office, and secure a stronger future for our communities.
From combating the student debt crisis, to lowering the costs of healthcare, to making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to leveling the playing field for Black Marylanders, we have an exciting opportunity to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Enough talk – let’s get it done. Click here to power our movement to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=20.22]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ellicottcitywesternhowardendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/16524dea-afc1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/50ff8c5f-a8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGZmOGM1Zi1hOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4oa8I6zYtBVLmDuBLnHTw6W4gg8wVgp8GTuJXIGNdU=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I just heard from President Trump. I need you to see it for yourself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
President Trump is all in. Are you? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6817%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=k%2btqRJNb6wk799eZD0CrmQ&sysid=1)
****
President Trump is all in. Are you?
Friend -- this is Jim Jordan. We just heard from President Trump. [**I need you to see it for yourself, then I’m going to ask you for an urgent contribution to put his plan into action.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w4Y%2fSJb8cymsREukaZBkew&sysid=1)
_**“I think we can win A LOT of seats in the House and I think we can take back the Senate.” -- President Donald J. Trump**_
He is all in. President Trump thinks we have what it takes to win back control of Congress -- now we are pleading for your help to see it through.
Our critical End-of-Month deadline is officially here. This is the first test of our strength and dedication since President Trump’s declaration.**I intend to do everything I can to help him before the deadline. Will you?**
_President Trump asked for your help. So did Donald Trump Jr., Newt Gingrich, two Senators, and three Members of Congress. Now I’m asking you too._
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60178%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y9OlTwRnocSxZyxoAtkKEw&sysid=1)
[**Contribute $10 Before 11:59 PM >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60179%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TWy2RxVovqThWr1VCZAC9A&sysid=1)
[**Contribute $35 Before 11:59 PM >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60170%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dSoP%2bVARGNvMuQPOL70K8g&sysid=1)
[**Contribute $50 Before 11:59 PM >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2fpQPw6v%2fVzZ9A3l77HFwQ&sysid=1)
[**Contribute $100 Before 11:59 PM >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60172%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hxUL8BLkKYBZu%2fwlC9q2Pg&sysid=1)
Believe me, I know how much you’ve done for our America first movement.
**Now I’m asking for your help ONE LAST TIME.**
[**Contribute any amount now and know that YOU answered President Trump’s call when it mattered the most.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60173%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JAsjzW%2faQz5GROftn%2b8Qiw&sysid=1)
To victory,

name: Gary Black
subject: Critical voter registration deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/b33b0977be08131dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — TODAY is the final day to register to vote in Georgia’s Republican primary in May.**

---
If you haven’t already, or if you need to check your voter registration status, you can do so below.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/7343aebdda6b050cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
This is the first of several key dates that are coming up. Exactly one week from now, early voting gets started here in Georgia. There’s a lot on the line here. This race will decide who controls the U.S. Senate, and the only way to defeat Raphael Warnock is to nominate a Republican with trusted conservative experience. [**I hope to have your support, and I hope you’ll use our Voter Resources Page as a tool to help you make a plan for you (and 22 of your friends!) to get out and vote.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/15d36d837fe9127ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/ed785596780c5411c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION STATUS »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/41fe22841f3202c4c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/3fe63db62cf044ddc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $25.6 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/750b6215ec9cb0ff/8d6af6c1ada8920ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=750b6215ec9cb0ff&d=4621f0efdea1a329c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=750b6215ec9cb0ff).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Note on the debate tonight & our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542067/342044903/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRiZmI0Yi1jYmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uf7OJOYhCyeNrxvyBT2-8zyYLiYtdshPNHCny_9u3Ws=)

Hey everyone,

I'm writing this on Monday morning, and I'm going to have my team get it out to all of you later today.

I'm drinking coffee and going over my notes before I drive to Carlisle, PA for the second debate tonight with all of the candidates in the Democratic Primary for U.S. Senate.

This race has been heating up since the debate last Thursday. We've got less than a month before Election Day. The voters, the media, and the country are paying attention, because this is the race that could decide control of the U.S. Senate. Healthcare, childcare, workers rights, women's rights and voting rights are all on the line.

**As more and more voters tune into this race, there are two things I want them to know about me.**

**On the issues that matter, you can count on me.** In Congress, I've voted for a $15 minimum wage, to protect unions, pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, protect the right to choose, pass the most expansive climate bill in history, and prevent gun violence. In the Senate, I'll vote to get rid of the filibuster so that we can act on all of those issues, and more.

But none of that will happen if we can't win this crucial race.

The second thing I want voters to know is that **this is the campaign that can win in November.**

I got into office by winning a district that Trump won by 19 points just the year before. None of the other Democrats in this race have done that. None have run against Republicans in competitive races.

So I'm going to campaign during the last month of this race the same way that I campaigned when I upset the Republican establishment and beat the Trump machine — I'm going to go everywhere in our state, every day, and outwork everyone else in the field.

Traveling constantly is expensive, and I'm spending my time in rooms with voters, not donors.

**[But that means I'm relying on you — the person reading this email. So if you believe in the values I stand for, and you want a candidate who is willing to fight for every inch and beat the Republicans in November, it would mean a lot to my campaign if you could chip in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542068/342044904/124576002?refcode=em22_220425_debate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRiZmI0Yi1jYmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uf7OJOYhCyeNrxvyBT2-8zyYLiYtdshPNHCny_9u3Ws=)**

Honored to be in this fight with you,

Conor

Sent from my iPhone

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c8b76288-c1c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/4adbfb4b-cbc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRiZmI0Yi1jYmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uf7OJOYhCyeNrxvyBT2-8zyYLiYtdshPNHCny_9u3Ws=&id=122167450).

**RUSH IN YOUR GIFT TO TAKE BACK**
**OUR SCHOOLS IN THE NEXT 24 HOURS!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdk837011llda4148io18jd2sdlbenlptm28gv48_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) Tucker Carlson said it himself: "if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It’s state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5jis956haibqsna6fuerdclo98qjvq45b5pac88_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can’t do any of this without your help and we only have a few days to raise the money we need to win local elections starting on May 7th. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zknn3ka1oq346fhoo62ukuk56v0pd504vjvuet00_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ijmi60qnn96ehlhg7lovcnif1geis2qk5696oo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zea9b4fm6d0pc4tjuhrr54od4nqd14tjik7nd4g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z867vh0eobbc2kko2guf6fl30qpt8g4p4g99dcs0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) **_And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. Friend, because of incredible patriots like you, we're tripling our impact this year. _**That's why our team has chosen school board races starting on May 7th to add to our target list...**_ _**....And that's why we need your support IMMEDIATELY! **_ [**Time is running out! Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1t51q9o1uckopfvkn2a8feb4fm933d3rlabuon8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) [**DONATE $17.76 OR MORE TODAY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbs5go8b7gk2ajfbok8f942tbbq0s1rpt8h204no_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) Now, I’m guessing you’ve never heard of me before... **....But, I’d be willing to bet you’ve heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I’ve had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC’s 3 R’s Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here’s what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _"lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj47jpvlluuasm4na6v3qlobfllke8e0et42sta0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmrjgjpr32o4l5b60dmdl2d4c5tfh9d6iit8u0ho_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know your probably used to getting these types of messages in September or October... But as we try take back our schools through local school boards, we have dozens of different election dates to keep track of. Every district conducts their elections differently... _**[And that's why I need you to get your donation in AS SOON AS POSSIBLE!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqin32egs38mt9886u7ne2bdpnhkqn0kenmpa3ho_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) **_If we don't receive your gift within the next 24 hours, we won't be able to put your money to work until November! [**DONATE $17.76 OR MORE TODAY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4rpocla1h9niijaobj8vrbg2jjnj0csrstrpe90_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh1k0fd8d5519g5n05vt4sncglrhp1n8m57bo2c0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7th10qnfj8ka92hm447bnd4gqcj9gllceffi7so_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6cp37cdh2bs)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

body:
The Biden administration is taking deliberate steps to undermine rule of law at every turn.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4oinbrshd4gvangbepepbgkm335iklougbqi4lg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uup32tb5c9oefcbks5j64or66pieatbksqrb9o3lear7cpdjchh60o74ekrr6o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmspm9o3mcdj39p5jcjjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c1ie8pj2chie49fg)

Police need your help more than ever.
---
| | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq2is5nedttvm65ipa86c1tad7a48vjfods8o6m8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---

| Greetings! The Biden administration is taking deliberate steps to undermine rule of law at every turn. Our border remains unsecured while hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants flood into our country. Illegal drugs, contraband, and human trafficking run unchecked from Mexico. [**Biden would rather fund illegal drugs than stop them.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhdcj6p2dsnvkt72bg7sru3jvdn6p3ks1hdp5k5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs) Despite a raging opioid crisis, the Biden administration’s “COVID relief” package included millions of dollars for crack pipes to drug addicts. Meanwhile, border patrol remains as under-funded and under-staffed as ever. [**Police are being quietly defunded across the country as radical liberals continue their covert war on law enforcement in the shadows.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgvg9nq3n9dm6r5eautn5kken3go3atva2c01qso_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs) That’s where we come in. Protect and Serve PAC was founded in 2020 to fight the dangerous defund-the-police movement that swept our nation from coast to coast. [**We are a collective of police associations, law enforcement organizations, and concerned private citizens working together to ensure that public safety is made a priority again.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z760sa62qc13c7ng13fr0239b0ludk48j898e9g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)[**With the help of other conservatives, we were able to elect and re-elect dozens of pro-public safety candidates from City Council to Congress.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrs1bi8ul5n08situ70iu8cnhtdrtve91dnv4q8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---

| | | [**FIGHT BACK NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv6qr3al0fr6cu031qchcc73tijeqnknj247ggv8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---

| We’re working to defeat radical Democrats in the 2022 midterms to get law and order conservatives in office. The radical left have George Soros and many other mega donors—we have common sense conservatives like you. Law and order is under attack across our nation and we must fight back. [**With your support we will continue our work to keep public safety candidates in office and fight against the left’s continued cold war against police.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc4f5h02jah699ckku2i37jsdgkasr3p82d7hr0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs) Help us fund pro-police candidates and make sure voters know the truth about who they are voting for at the ballot box.
---

| | | [**TAKE A STAND**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbmlm7ce84k2rbb0eugq3nd53k3qn905vdhvqkm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---

| It’s time for the silent majority to take action. We’re tired of our police being overworked and underfunded. We’re tired of public safety being sacrificed in the name of a woke agenda. [**Will you help us elect strong, pro-public safety candidates this fall with a generous donation of $5, $10, $50 or whatever you are able? **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvptfq9ts5cdp11acan9v4vkvpkj44o3pajoin4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---

| | | [**CHIP IN $5**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kpgeuae8i80vg8tt821odoc787vd6cg0r5q3c0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---

| Every dollar helps and no amount is too small to make a difference. If you’re one of millions of Americans who is tired of having your personal safety put in danger, now is the time to act. [**Can we count on you to join us in this fight?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zosm2imllbre6r7o0v5m2vq85v2tmas3hu3kaq58_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cji6coj4cjh2bs) Donald Baker Protect and Serve PAC

body:
We need the resources to push for every single vote these next 8 days, and your $27 will go a long way.
#

Hello Somebody!
We wanted to take a minute to reach out before a big week of campaigning.
There are just **8 days** left to go until this special election, and we are being _pummeled by more than $2 MILLION in outside spending, from at least SIX different groups — including Super PACs funded by an oil oligarch and a cryptocurrency billionaire._
You don’t need us to tell you that is a LOT of money — and there’s no sign it’s going to slow down before Election Day. **So we’re counting on you to help us fight back against this onslaught of Big Money and send Nina Turner to Congress. What do you say?**
**[Will you please make a $27 contribution to Nina Turner for Us? We need the resources to push for every single vote these next 8 days, and your $27 will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542315/342046065/413031954?refcode2=fa0186fc-cdc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220425-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTAxODZmYy1jZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EY5uMSG-AoFZWqzNuvqqmVuKfiWnV9oHwWIGVNC2KUE=)**

**We’re incredibly proud of that fact, but it also means we need your support in order to win this race:**

body:
I wasn’t born as the son to a political dynasty with the expectation I would be gifted a Senate seat by the political elite in Washington D.C. like my | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGqoxS0yruDGHXhzLqAu2stbccDe3rzgUsOTGhxF5S3RXTFVgxSPInINIYf6QBPSlPn4IWDaMPMkNN6CZK8zGZB7qENPMbXjrL7fSiZWrlugFevsdoGmzoN0--MZr-ilRcVslv_eMSiQoRZSM4FZe5HVl3em6EH3CYygewLvoZum-e7XmZmfK24hCFa-unLl5aJglUeFWpwHpZs9XWk25_A8Q%3D%3D)

Peter,

When I look at this photo of me with my father in uniform, I’m reminded of my roots and the values my parents instilled in me from a young age - **Duty First, Honor, Loyalty, and Country.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGqjkmNy3BlLV4KznJcZqlqOJahYsJURkKFgCLIDZHVvc-m5yiGPqVfZwbAZLFHsBI9Kt6prvK05kMurRNZcZ0Pj5c2NCm4UP6o_c8c54t00pHywJs_iIjALmK4FyaTN44F0zB-c7xblDBtOFu720LsUQ_g6xTCWmms6UuJWhgvhxoFcdRCfkxzmT9smyNrArjjMXsWo6Mz8royimKjG9_eGQ%3D%3D)

My entire life, from my graduation from West Point to my service in Afghanistan to my continuing work for our Nation’s Veterans, has been lived in service to these values.

I wasn’t born as the son to a political dynasty with the expectation I would be gifted a Senate seat by the political elite in Washington D.C. like my RINO establishment primary opponent Adam Laxalt.

Our narrow lead in the latest Nevada straw poll has sent the Washington establishment into full panic mode and now they’re getting prepared to spend millions to stop our grassroots America First movement.

[**Right now, I need your help to keep up the pressure and shock the mainstream media and political establishment by nominating a real Conservative who can take back the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat Senate seat in the Country.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGql2fOdaiw_Yn21_cfJ-K678YCcb1KhDsFTw1N-tjOvpZGJoP3v3IByqQZ01-XocGulOoU-Zaf49stU18JlKqcPwSHY8SjjEdZg_EOLz2O7stIti6ljA7xalkW9CDk3eVolnaziwkP-tY1j43MEc2GSS5nEkJ1CWNRW9JgJoie2nA6PJV1XZLoni8n7aBnmd342In15v4wqQyVf3Uux7jVVQ%3D%3D)

| [I Stand with Captain Sam Brown
**DONATE NOW**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGqU0DhRqYl84Le4pV4kAQ6eQzGIFXyKei0VLnrx-VoBZP_IOAtGw_OKA1tprO0dlEoP2vLLiq-oQWPGQQGCT_3sVc52HnTBPuNjgoGsuInQSKcTMp5JvV5DOsmZTCQAens4wF2gZL7uAFMqmAn9bRsCXv3lzwojmU7lVNDRCPXhQJOkXx3auInugDaeaHXaWhGAGOjBSGpYL3Hf8h2zqHARA%3D%3D)
---

Voting in our primary starts in three weeks; our election could be decided by Mid-May. With the D.C. establishment spending millions to prop up my opponent and salvage his campaign, we need to act now or our narrow lead will disappear overnight.

My opponent was raised in and spent his entire career fighting for the D.C. establishment. [**Why would he be any different if he made it to the Senate?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGqk0VNhi52HwDMOXdz7XH1Iqhu8cfMTZcbVjcro5zTLEbfJe1DCFiYIZSdBvkJQJi5wtgZJ_l3X_cwOhYwzg7sQSbOlkbQSIkIPxdfuPDEYDfbGoh1HKoAirIecWpXWsecpt6uj75tG4z3FT-ne5lAs5XoVuaO3NUDK9VviaXqjvUQ2bWAdNwNTjb8cTD3mAM2luPouTYlBA3BfKY3P4yP8A%3D%3D)

I didn’t nearly burn to death on a battlefield in Afghanistan to sit idly by and watch our freedoms fall, one by one to career establishment politicians and radical Democrats.

[**Will you rush over your contribution in the next 24 hours to help me ramp up the fight and take back Nevada for Real Conservatives?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGqWxDpTWG6NO1Ulz3N7_fvdg8heWOTyDqktRWYrayU9vAZUsDPPJXBYZ7tK6O0YinjxGqweD6vmaP9Be-1A0QfLljjcQoM47zBxqaL2paeP9oVign_be2bRTPDFvS7nmHNg49EnNaQePOxXAZ9zUvpNcR32mLIPof8yf-iuPs_Nd_9sHoJed6bMo6e1KS5xTAuTUF88JIX1NjonOzIvPdv9w%3D%3D)

Duty First,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f8c5d6e22f041da86fc39410c59f31a&_e=OfEVlYgPM9Dwv4DR5zg7mE2FU25MM3qJzRTNjR7uxdBl0EyhMKSKaMle14SJmUqrIzMHN8S6f1ANlBmrUafQ7WpvxYIe529nI3MEL_1ZMmIWc0paMzmt1GDi03xMYnQRaXUTl4i7zze7P8yJxaAFsGSGka9odLjWQ0pK71uUn5Kwzus8Hrr2rRwSPLdA4_FP3lBWocVV5IoeW83ySyQcNXyyHGAUAPAZ1V5LNfiEpdANz9Rbaa9I2a4v-BYs-kGqtgKvWW7UJ0VIkyG-xlZxZA_x8Mx6e9t8IwJ5Q24Ny0l66y_pvptkuBnmkuFfE7W5E4hTyjdc4RfRehw0RlgPuqxEtW-WIhIZxRa9Js09KxS4oQYqVbTmqg90Xqfy2lKgqXlz3Ql84pYmOdOwNW2YtN5btyTw_ibgFmd93yX0-FMIYIY8s9EppF6YtzbaG8dmQDmiPke34n97mDzm0D7JGQ%3D%3D)

name: Josh Harder
subject: what the science is telling us
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/MNaxKY5TxhzV54EPkQqr582m13csXjg9jaaDqKfvxoo=/1K2EYMn07AMx_BrBkG4SxCXzc0Ta54CODHM88j8nlFk=?refcode=E15232-20220423-ClimateStat-header-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hey Peter, Since it was Earth Day recently and everyone was talking about climate change, let's have an honest conversation about what the science is actually telling us. **A new UN climate report predicts that climate change is rapidly getting worse, and will cause devastating human suffering, unless we take immediate action. I believe a key solution is getting massive wildfires under control. Here 's why:** Here in California, we already have some really important climate change laws on the books to aggressively reduce our carbon emissions. _But want to hear something crazy? Just one single fire season in 2020 wiped out two decades worth of our carbon progress!_ Electric vehicles, recycling and carbon sequestration are great, but they don't do much of a dent if massive uncontrolled wildfires become the norm. We're coming up on another big fire season and we have to be prepared. Short term, we have to get our firefighters the resources they need. (Sidenote: thank you President Biden for signing our firefighter raise into law so we can fill our firefighter shortage). Long term, we have to clean up our forests to make them more fire resilient. There is no one-size-fits-all approach, but if we come together community-by-community and elect leaders who are willing to listen to science and take action, I know we can make a difference for the next generation. [**I can tell you one thing - we 're never going to get anywhere if Republicans take back control so please rush in a donation right now so we can keep the House blue!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MNaxKY5TxhzV54EPkQqr582m13csXjg9jaaDqKfvxoo=/1K2EYMn07AMx_BrBkG4SxCXzc0Ta54CODHM88j8nlFk=?refcode=E15232-20220423-ClimateStat-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Thanks for listening,
Josh

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Breaking News: The NRSC just unleashed a $1,000,000 ad buy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) just dumped **_$1,000,000_** in attack ads against Mark on TV in Arizona, and they’re spending it all in ONE WEEK. **_$1,000,000_** in a week! This group has one goal: making Mitch McConnell Senate Majority Leader again.
This is the most significant attack against this campaign so far. And we expect them to keep these ads running all the way to Election Day.
So, here’s what we’re going to do: We’re going to raise **_$1,000,000_** before the end of the month in just **_6 days_** to show National Republicans that our people-powered campaign won’t back down.
It’s a tall task, we know, but if we don’t respond to this attack with a show of strength, National Republicans will keep piling on and sink our chances of re-electing Mark in November.
Some of you have chipped in before, and that means a lot to us. Some of you might be waiting for the right time. But whether you’ve been with us for months or are just joining us today we need you now. So what do you say?
[**Can you please make an $3 donation today to help us hit our $1,000,000 goal to counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? It’s a tall task, but one we can accomplish together if we all pitch in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-1m?refcode=em220425-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2662_6688874_2jtCf7&akid=2662%2E6688874%2E2jtCf7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-1m?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220425-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2662_6688874_2jtCf7&akid=2662%2E6688874%2E2jtCf7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-1m?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220425-1-7&t=22&refcode2=2662_6688874_2jtCf7&akid=2662%2E6688874%2E2jtCf7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-1m?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220425-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2662_6688874_2jtCf7&akid=2662%2E6688874%2E2jtCf7)**

---
****
We’re going to fight back against this attack and come out even stronger because of folks like you who have Mark’s back.
Thank you for always being a part of this team,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=2662%2E6688874%2E2jtCf7).

These interactions keep him grinding on the campaign trail every day and keep this election moving forward. YOUR enthusiasm and support for helping make New Mexico a better place is a MASSIVE motivator for Mark. Our team wanted to share his energy and enthusiasm with supporters like you, and TODAY we are proud to share Mark's latest idea: Supporter of the Month. There’s a lot that comes with this, Peter. Winning this title means that YOU can win a PERSONAL phone call from Mark, a gift from our campaign, and the opportunity to be featured in our NEW newsletter. Every. Single. name: John Legend
subject: I’m not from Hollywood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]A personal message from John Legend

Friend,

Democrat Tim Ryan is in a dead heat race for Ohio’s open Senate seat and
he needs our help.

You might not know this, but I was born into a blue-collar family in
Springfield, Ohio. My dad was a factory worker. My mom was a tailor. And I
got my start in music singing in the church choir.

I’ve never forgotten where I come from—I know the challenges Ohio families
are facing, because my family faced them too. That’s how I know Ohio needs
Tim Ryan in the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Republicans are spending millions and working overtime to defeat Tim.
Will you join me in supporting his campaign by making a contribution of
whatever you can to win this crucial race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate

There’s a real struggle happening in our country between love and
fear—between advancing civil rights for everyone or stripping them away,
between treating refugees with compassion or as criminals, between lifting
up working families or continuing to punish poverty.

Republicans are actively working to take us in the wrong direction, down
the path of fear. If they take back the Senate, there’s no telling the
damage they’ll do.

Right now, Tim Ryan is neck-and-neck with his Republican opponents in a
race that will decide control of the Senate, and ultimately, the kind of
country we live in.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1012&amount=25&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Tim needs your help to pull ahead. I’m personally asking you to make a
donation to his campaign to help him win this important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1013&amount=25&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1014&amount=50&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1015&amount=100&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1016&amount=200&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1007&amount=250&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11121?t=1008&amount=30&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Other Amount

Together, we can make sure that love wins in Ohio.

Thanks,

John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ]Donate Once

Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=3409%2E3611125%2EIZk1YS ][IMG]

Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022
I want to extend my deepest condolences to the family of the great Senator Orrin Hatch, his wife Elaine, and his six children. Orrin was a true warrior for our Country, for liberty, and for his beloved state of Utah. He was as wise as he was kind, and as tough as he was smart—he loved America and his contributions to our Country were tremendous. His legacy will surely live on through the many lives he impacted. May God bless Orrin Hatch.

Endorsement of Frank LaRose
Frank LaRose is Ohio’s Secretary of State, having presided over two statewide elections and served as a State Senator from Northeast Ohio. As a State Senator, he focused on Election Integrity, Government Efficiency, Transparency and Tax Reform.

Having been raised on a family farm, Frank is a hard worker and, as a teenager, was an Eagle Scout. He served in the United States Army in the 101st Airborne, and ultimately served in the U.S. Special Forces as a Green Beret. During his decade in uniform, Frank received numerous Commendations including the Bronze Star.

Frank is dedicated to Secure Elections—the most important work he can do—with every legal vote counted, no ballot harvesting, and all votes counted on Election Day. I won Ohio big, twice, and Frank is committed to “making it easy to vote and impossible to cheat." I give Frank LaRose my Complete and Total Endorsement!

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 I want to extend my deepest condolences to the family of the great Senator Orrin Hatch, his wife Elaine, and his six children. Orrin was a true warrior for our Country, for liberty, and for his beloved state of Utah. He was as wise as he was kind, and as tough as he was smart—he loved America and his contributions to our Country were tremendous. His legacy will surely live on through the many lives he impacted. May God bless Orrin Hatch. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Why did Twitter quickly take down this video that I made on January 6th, and why isn’t the Unselect Committee of political hacks talking about it? | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Join me tonight in the Great State of Ohio—live at 7:00PM ET on Right Side Broadcasting, Newsmax, Real America’s Voice, and Donald J. Trump Rumble, among others. Big crowd! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Endorsement of Congressman Troy Balderson Congressman Troy Balderson is a fantastic Representative of Ohio’s 12th Congressional District! Troy works hard to Promote American Agriculture, Secure the Border, Defend the Second Amendment, Support our Military, Vets, and Law Enforcement, and Reclaim American Energy Independence. Troy Balderson is doing a great job in Congress, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Endorsement of Congressman Steve Chabot Congressman Steve Chabot is delivering results for the incredible people of Southwest Ohio. Steve is fighting hard to Support Small Business, Grow our Economy, Lower Your Taxes, Defend Life, and Protect our Communities from Criminals. Tough on China and Strong on Border Security, Steve Chabot has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Congratulations to Matt DePerno and Kristina Karamo on their incredible victory in Michigan! They will go on to big victories for Attorney General and Secretary of State. I will back them strongly. Michigan is one of the worst on Election Fraud and corruption, and they will put an end to it. At the same time, they’ll get to the bottom of the 2020 Election Fraud! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Heading to Ohio for a big rally tonight, great crowd. See you there! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 23rd, 2022 Endorsement of Frank LaRose Frank LaRose is Ohio’s Secretary of State, having presided over two statewide elections and served as a State Senator from Northeast Ohio. As a State Senator, he focused on Election Integrity, Government Efficiency, Transparency and Tax Reform. Having been raised on a family farm, Frank is a hard worker and, as a teenager, was an Eagle Scout. He served in the United States Army in the 101st Airborne, and ultimately served in the U.S. Special Forces as a Green Beret. During his decade in uniform, Frank received numerous Commendations including the Bronze Star. Frank is dedicated to Secure Elections—the most important work he can do—with every legal vote counted, no ballot harvesting, and all votes counted on Election Day. I won Ohio big, twice, and Frank is committed to “making it easy to vote and impossible to cheat." I give Frank LaRose my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. I'm a businessman like President Trump--not a politician. I don't have special interest groups lining my pocket. Instead, I count on true American patriots like you, Peter. Will you step up and be one of the donors I need from the 43199 area? Click a button below to contribute. | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thank you, Mike Gibbons | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | | | | | | Gibbons for Ohio | 14500 Lorain Ave #110644, Cleveland, OH 44111 | | == Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by == ==

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Why I'm supporting Kim Schrier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I'm reaching out today to share why it's crucial that we re-elect my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier, in Washington's 8th District to fight for common-sense gun reform legislation. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44534656/342011429/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZlYWRjNS1iMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLQFvWc3W-KbFXro5gcNVceireOCAtrUmuIeJMd5_no=&emci=835cb415-4bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ee6eadc5-b0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Hey Peter – I'm former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords.

Eleven years ago, I survived a mass shooting at a constituent event in my hometown. Since that tragic event that claimed the lives of six people, I've dedicated myself to saving lives from gun violence nationwide. **I'm reaching out today to share why it's crucial that we re-elect my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier, in Washington's 8th District to fight for common-sense gun reform legislation.**

As a doctor, Kim understands how important it is to keep our families and communities safe from gun violence. That's why she was proud to help pass the historic Bipartisan Background Checks Act in the House last year to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks, and she co-sponsored the Prevent Family Fire Act to incentivize the sale of Safe Storage devices for guns.

Kim is the leader Washingtonians need in Congress to take a stand against gun violence, but she has a tough fight ahead of her, and she needs our support to keep her seat blue in November.

**[Will you join me in supporting Kim's re-election campaign? Chip in $5 or more before her end-of-month deadline to keep her in Congress fighting for common-sense gun safety reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44534659/342011432/1643066332?refcode=em22_220425_eom1_fnd_gq_act___gg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220425_eom1_fnd_gq_act___gg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZlYWRjNS1iMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLQFvWc3W-KbFXro5gcNVceireOCAtrUmuIeJMd5_no=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44534663/342011436/1643066332?refcode=em22_220425_eom1_fnd_gq_act___gg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220425_eom1_fnd_gq_act___gg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZlYWRjNS1iMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLQFvWc3W-KbFXro5gcNVceireOCAtrUmuIeJMd5_no=)

clean_body: I'm reaching out today to share why it's crucial that we re-elect my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier, in Washington's 8th District to fight for common-sense gun reform legislation. Hey Peter – I'm former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords. Eleven years ago, I survived a mass shooting at a constituent event in my hometown. Since that tragic event that claimed the lives of six people, I've dedicated myself to saving lives from gun violence nationwide. I'm reaching out today to share why it's crucial that we re-elect my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier, in Washington's 8th District to fight for common-sense gun reform legislation. As a doctor, Kim understands how important it is to keep our families and communities safe from gun violence. That's why she was proud to help pass the historic Bipartisan Background Checks Act in the House last year to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks, and she co-sponsored the Prevent Family Fire Act to incentivize the sale of Safe Storage devices for guns. Kim is the leader Washingtonians need in Congress to take a stand against gun violence, but she has a tough fight ahead of her, and she needs our support to keep her seat blue in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = If we're going to make progress on the issues that matter most to us – including gun violence – we can't afford to lose leaders like Kim in the House. But protecting Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority won't be easy. Special interests have named her seat a top target, and election experts are calling Kim's race a "toss-up." Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money. Kim's campaign is 100% people-powered, so she's relying on your support today to help her fight back, pull ahead, and win. = All my best, Gabby Giffords To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5b2f99a9a5&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4bb5cffdde&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=433963afb3&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=06a5c48450&e=a088917f89).

Looking beyond partisan politics and abandoning the divisive and vitriolic rhetoric we’re seeing is the key to strengthening our nation.

We Republicans need to stand for genuinely conservative principles and steer away from the dangerous and anti-democratic Trump cult of personality.

Thank you for your support as I fight for a party rooted in substance and guided by our founding values. Your commitment to our Constitution and democracy enables future generations to build upon the American experience. Your commitment enables our children and grandchildren to pursue their versions of the American Dream.

I’m standing up for what I believe is right because I know it is my duty based on the oath I swore to the Constitution. **[If you see fighting for our nation’s enduring principles as a necessity as well, I hope you will consider supporting my candidacy for reelection to the U.S. House of Representatives[support here].](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=d47e5847bc984592a02618c5feec3d4c&_e=965w3BosO1mr6-eSw-r9Sb3GYDOqceMysAg4WfVg6n5EOdAFcX7fmd7t7pmpnWQVIM0Y29WxS0fwLow2_ywMCTIJd9Z2MZ8Wy22m75fp0laL2f8-Vwulaw4ADT2tCkqdYUQhTdplva4iQL6C1yW08nLtZYo_O5c3_JPP8CvP4eW7pbpdWUkhITENfwB1kNY1pHCKwNlOK-HTSLNiWga6rJDc11kUUltVhXPAZdn_eYHHYBqCUrjW9m3bEkS1H83wTHhwEWHnVqJh06WYQrVAUQBh7WPqFiKi_67_k2Na7yzfheYTQEIJArrtCZdMwaz3ymtrMHVl2ilMHUVfj0pduDAWE-4M2quFjx6NTnmnDr8r7WanqBf5U49HQfY0ufaX1N_n0IZryItIOAJJ7CIIULab-i9YKARtfnjgwkmvkzkDZrlS8wuuWcN6SURsFdld6x7H-v8703Pwm-uDwclet8nIgGO2XI2haGttaYV822_rEp6GYHpIeEdb9ByvAzIo2A5MNEQI-WnnyrEiIuwValy-mCx13wl1zXrRUxyLZPVIymMyi1Sf83yKh_-ZaDQx)**

Once again, thank you.

Liz Cheney

We knew this race wouldn’t be easy, but with support from folks like you: We’ll target voters with the facts on Michael’s achievements for our state; train our own army of organizers and volunteers to mobilize Coloradans; and keep Colorado blue. clean_body: NPR has joined The National Journal in listing Michael’s re-election as one of the top 10 races most likely to flip. | = FIRST: The National GOP announced a record-breaking $43 million fundraising haul for the first quarter of this election year that they’ll use to flip seats like Michael’s and take control of the Senate. THEN: Proud insurrectionist and 2020-election denier Ron Hanks made the final GOP primary ballot as well as a wealthy-GOP opponent that injected half-a-million of his personal funds into his campaign, and could do so again when grassroots enthusiasm is low. NOW: NPR has joined The National Journal in listing Michael’s re-election as one of the top 10 races most likely to flip. Michael’s opponents are attacking his record while the National GOP drops organizers in Colorado to flip our state. We knew this race wouldn’t be easy, but with support from folks like you: We’ll target voters with the facts on Michael’s achievements for our state; train our own army of organizers and volunteers to mobilize Coloradans; and keep Colorado blue. We don’t take a penny from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, because their influence in Washington gets in the way of progress like Michael’s. So we have to ask: Will you rush a $10 donation today to help re-elect Michael Bennet, keep Colorado blue, and defend our slim Senate majority? This race gets more competitive every day, so your support goes a long way. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you and talk soon, — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Kina Collins
subject: What do we do when they lie?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
As a Black woman in politics, so often the first attack is on my character | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6-IOSqXM6b8SsErnrVXyg3Co1ddkG5fwRQR242EEZNHCSWcuakvYHVOp_Xl5lS3pzmaCxALJgA6coLONE9JcXZdG36lYJy4i4NoL88p7-BO4nU30MqRIFSyfy3HYERUAQQR_2SP1A2XHIOLOqr_n1sGvC_PCayxMSbZ80XeU7nWOTyHic0y9G_nANtwPJHEbm0KvL2vvPn-HlzRUsHW_93F6_e1aIBxDC0PKbAn_SHsg/3li/ho4ZLeVoTRO3ei1BUBShTA/h0/zL9IcjH3jmvshNQTzufck38EUubzVhRMNRr3iQBl8zw) Dear Team, When women, especially Black women, stand up and seek the honor to represent their communities, their districts, their country, in the halls of power, so often, the first attack is on their character. We saw it during the confirmation hearing of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, and it will continue. That's why I was disappointed, but not surprised when I read this quote from my opponent, Rep Danny Davis [in the news](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0xBJk3h0jsCqAZIlFSUlbJWKcv1dmMF7lN0JSd-XBHx1ntFwc0b2tot3c6BK3EH8HDmVw0q1B8T59qQpPwJ6ckebrHsbqCdF0Hh-p4Vfr9JYFIz0GsS0Drh4qsudk45rtQ40zyen4pk_ja9y_K92O1t3Xetq0wOEN1oBGx6mCt4WrXcD9EITBkHZGvEVOqGhmHgsnHu-sZMW57Bnr1QaEfRS7UMonfDIZngP4RLnhvBn9qMIbohKl6FmGP4_BDj8_E1v3hlM0i_CqpscLIr_rIS7UoxaNMxRUTsSw33GmrYY/3li/ho4ZLeVoTRO3ei1BUBShTA/h1/4uiHq91mIk44jyXj46YGpchq-rkTahm-iJIAcRIcdi0) last week: "_Through a phone call interview, Davis responded to Collins’ statement by saying she has a “creative imagination” and is “a dishonest person,__unfortunately.”_ When a sitting Congressperson, a senior member of our community chooses to lead by example and personally attack his young Black female opponent in the press, it is a tragic example of everything Black women are up against. **[I am an honest, qualified, devoted, and determined advocate for my community. It’s time to embrace a new generation of leaders, and finally welcome Black women into the political world they helped build. If you agree, join me.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESwNfSNMMs-yIfqhxl89wliWYf6RWxeQzn-ptMfWZc_m1ibPX-pB2OFBOqsDfD7BKM9dSOhhSQI98CARYQGcOFd4wlRd8JEzuQ9_R06khvYn8kTQR_pjvQy5faA8koI_8JVYoxAgJBRuURwv2-awRgStBIdG-pRA61Lr5ME9Qm_W99C4I_lE1oJpr3da8liJaI0gugKPTKGwonmz3Ek-L2zUK9qoriI3pRYkKXOFe2YrKV6qf0Y42Cqg8sk5-5K71UXowbK3RApkEjTvt8ZQR0B6R4aQG8eSo4GcA_uZ3cLSRM1q0Qb_sNRBKXVHGZPYOP/3li/ho4ZLeVoTRO3ei1BUBShTA/h2/XPXvZj3lTPLQjTVrn3xfNbGj7Ak0_7g5fDuA1WbBkZw) ** [Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESVessSBZZnBvefbpEmxxJTSLEHas2e8aQlvsO_wqFAZE3mkWC6MkJgT_sb6uJWTM3xmR7fuGIhogebhHDWlayO3SJya2X0iY4zfkNeW38GkbOIX98Gp-upYUA3VV8fvjT4W4Vw8k1LFHeOZ9ydYDc_2Evln272ozyCoSk0fQEEfS3W-lz7zcUUsSl9nmUOO7NSMaHI8m7Qg3zDfQPe3TFRyPm9OsOy-JgTB6sqqeAay7GxGqaw8a8IR0XbTIkOp0jqa0xLXKGGZ65rWrN0pmYmz306yCc4yaK-D_8EL8m0o6a0QNcyGWh7Xbu9tHTTI0U/3li/ho4ZLeVoTRO3ei1BUBShTA/h3/bkH86lF2slckz0QNyrmJLy4_2DBGNK6_qjgs3MEFgAw) The Congressman’s quote was in response to the reasons I shared for running for office, which were also quoted in the article, “We need to elect more women and more black women into office, quite frankly,” Collins said. “Number two, I believe that the voices of working-class people are not being fulfilled and are not being represented in Congress. Number three, Congressman Davis has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money.” Davis denies that he has corporate backers, but in our Democracy the truth is publicly available from the FEC in donor filings. And the filings clearly state that in this campaign cycle alone Davis has received over 60 corporate PAC donations totalling hundreds of thousands of dollars. We knew these character attacks were coming because as a Black woman in politics I know they always will. But no matter how many come, and there will be more (there already are), **I will always respond the same way. I will speak truth to power, and focus on the future I know my community deserves.** **[We are on the right side, and we will prevail.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESCeN9Ju22foDNSKDVQHj9cih4AeCmI2Ri5pJ-JL4jRKA0RkzzK36E2OaxoUcKjuVqB-adqUtMArT5htwL_GDpfr0bV_ljoA98NFv9M1KzDv6NFs-t6X90kae1o6vu9Bg-F--tc6Yl1r4hjMOdl9pfoAULBIziYfP1ovxvlETbCduIFMdk2MhhrMWt76YRc9XbbGTLBSXVp4YN94-m1M54JgYH4tpAMklCdh7TysMVZTUU-EcZMzWcFLbAMepuTBV4izVK7oDKOoJ-eTy_NvqpxKhV3Qy8S6vDy6mWZRB_9DeFFb5aQwqZg6AU2tq3_lqn/3li/ho4ZLeVoTRO3ei1BUBShTA/h4/fHcz5l5IOHguHNa8nM_B7WpuksLjGsk7mEqTO6w1a4g)** In Solidarity, Kina Collins

[Donate »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBuxNIFJQeX7jwyTdRU3TxuZBq-RcyaRX3ejIbWCzOcAp6fDkQWpsNcd6rQh1fqGM8ymTvzk7sKUWNFubIKP8rJwUiVo9fw4m8BVHftEj8pR8DzT-xtbNWpB2E0NG0T9Fk013NL97vuKk4seKbxVo07a4GEmzAIeYFj6Ct6MbbWWKouES5Qb4xBXdWNF4j73CYFAm9y9qK61TL-egVDNmiHQt2yyUch8DYuBeTUvstZAFgSMj_oH0h4loVI-m729y0_xi2UhrOfj6VuESL2DT8LwKp1K3WpsLg0LrGm9c5CPOg/3li/ho4ZLeVoTRO3ei1BUBShTA/h5/cRZb2Oyks3wxY2nESkYCY_6fC_1z6Fa8S5TDdfPHMeQ) | To give by check:

clean_body: As a Black woman in politics, so often the first attack is on my character | | | Dear Team, When women, especially Black women, stand up and seek the honor to represent their communities, their districts, their country, in the halls of power, so often, the first attack is on their character. We saw it during the confirmation hearing of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, and it will continue. That's why I was disappointed, but not surprised when I read this quote from my opponent, Rep Danny Davis last week: "Through a phone call interview, Davis responded to Collins’ statement by saying she has a “creative imagination” and is “a dishonest person,unfortunately.” When a sitting Congressperson, a senior member of our community chooses to lead by example and personally attack his young Black female opponent in the press, it is a tragic example of everything Black women are up against. The Congressman’s quote was in response to the reasons I shared for running for office, which were also quoted in the article, “We need to elect more women and more black women into office, quite frankly,” Collins said. “Number two, I believe that the voices of working-class people are not being fulfilled and are not being represented in Congress. Number three, Congressman Davis has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money.” Davis denies that he has corporate backers, but in our Democracy the truth is publicly available from the FEC in donor filings. And the filings clearly state that in this campaign cycle alone Davis has received over 60 corporate PAC donations totalling hundreds of thousands of dollars. We knew these character attacks were coming because as a Black woman in politics I know they always will. But no matter how many come, and there will be more (there already are), I will always respond the same way. I will speak truth to power, and focus on the future I know my community deserves. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/36020b5dd683/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7110753?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
From Leisure World to Chandler Republican Women, Team Tanya was busy making it around the district this week.

If you want Team Tanya to stop by your group next time or you are interested in volunteering, email us at info@tanyaforarizona.com

**Sabato's Crystal Ball Changes AZ-04 Race Rating**

Sabato's Crystal Ball changed the race rating for AZ-04 from likely Democratic to leans Democratic. This is HUGE. It shows a shift in the seat becoming even more competitive. This comes after the DCCC was already feeling the heat in AZ-04 and added Greg Stanton to their list of vulnerable incumbents. The road to the Majority runs right through AZ-04 and this is just the most recent reminder that our campaign continues to keep the Democrats on their toes.

**Check Out Tanya's Interview with NPR!**

The battle for AZ-04 is heating up and Stanton is on his heels. Last week Tanya toured 21st Century Vitamins in Tempe and NPR tagged along to get a sense of the race and the mood of voters.

Tanya is the clear front-runner to take on Stanton and the NPR story highlights the national attention that this race will receive leading up to November. Voters from every party are dissatisfied with Washington according to the reporting. Interestingly, Stanton plans to keep campaigning the way he always has - by focusing on his pork-barrel spending.

The House majority runs through Arizona and AZ-04 and we're fired up to bring the fight to Stanton. You can access the NPR story [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=2f284f85d0&e=bd2b55b0e3)!

Want Tanya to visit your business? Hit reply and tell us more!

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44543907/342056798/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhYTQ3OS1kNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grX4iTB6R4E8YkFVGhWWRoDwsowZsiyH41WMMkZNN6E=&emci=1ddd33df-d2c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=61faa479-d6c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

We talk a lot about policies and big ideas for this country here at Team Christy, but ultimately what they all come down to is making life better for everyday Americans.

Whether they're a renter or homeowner, whether they're a stay-at-home mom or working caregiver, whether a nurse or an electrician — this campaign revolves around the people of this district.

**It's why this campaign is and always will be 100% grassroots funded and backed by volunteers.**

Right now, our organizing and canvassing operations are in full swing. From clipboards to providing lunches for our volunteers to training materials — your donations fund the most important work of the campaign: **making sure we are talking to voters in the district.**

[**Can you chip in $5 or more to make sure our volunteers out here on the ground are taken care of? You might not be able to make it out to knock on doors, but your donation ensures volunteers are well-trained, and ready to get out the vote for Christy!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44543914/342056807/2072937639?refcode=em22_220425_ontheground-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhYTQ3OS1kNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grX4iTB6R4E8YkFVGhWWRoDwsowZsiyH41WMMkZNN6E=) [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44543917/342056812/2072937639?refcode=em22_220425_ontheground-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhYTQ3OS1kNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grX4iTB6R4E8YkFVGhWWRoDwsowZsiyH41WMMkZNN6E=) We know that talking to voters face to face — whether on the phone or in person — is what turns people out to the polls. But it means so much more than that. **Conversations with voters inform Christy of the issues people care about in her district.**

Whether it's the teacher who had to leave his job because he couldn't afford the mortgage with his salary, the working mom who juggles with the cost of taking care of 3 kids, or the student terrified about climate change, the stories from people in the district are what motivate Christy to keep going and keep fighting.

[**Chip in $5 or more to keep up the voter outreach so we can flip CA-27 red to blue and get a representative in office who actually cares about the people in her district. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44543920/342056815/2072937639?refcode=em22_220425_ontheground-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhYTQ3OS1kNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grX4iTB6R4E8YkFVGhWWRoDwsowZsiyH41WMMkZNN6E=) [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44543923/342056818/2072937639?refcode=em22_220425_ontheground-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhYTQ3OS1kNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grX4iTB6R4E8YkFVGhWWRoDwsowZsiyH41WMMkZNN6E=) Thank you so much to each and every one of you who continues to give and show up, it means the world.

– Team Christy

**[PS – We have volunteer events almost every week! If you want to learn more, sign up here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44543926/342056821/712177193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhYTQ3OS1kNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grX4iTB6R4E8YkFVGhWWRoDwsowZsiyH41WMMkZNN6E=&emci=1ddd33df-d2c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=61faa479-d6c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)**

body:
Will you join John King and Michelle Siri for a meet and greet in Silver Spring?

---
| Hello, Peter! I hope you're doing well and enjoying your day so far. Ben Baitman here, Deputy Political Director with John King and Michelle Siri's campaign for Maryland. I am reaching out today to personally invite you to a meet and greet on Saturday, May 7th at 11:30 AM in Silver Spring!** _[Can you join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44544118/342057591/844645996?sourceid=1046161&utm_source=ngp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYxMTNmMC1kN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iO5fZqBV9JAp2IQmp8QbRpWwNZrLTxm7ponc0kcdbI=&emci=4e6113f0-d7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=506113f0-d7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)_** This will be a great opportunity to meet John and Michelle, learn more about their backgrounds and why they're running for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland, and ask any questions you might have about their plans for the future of our state. You can RSVP by _**[clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44544119/342057592/844645996?sourceid=1046161&utm_source=ngp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYxMTNmMC1kN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iO5fZqBV9JAp2IQmp8QbRpWwNZrLTxm7ponc0kcdbI=&emci=4e6113f0-d7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=506113f0-d7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ or reach out to me by replying to this email with any questions about the event. Thanks again, and I hope to see you there! Ben Baitman
Deputy Political Director
John King and Michelle Siri for Maryland PS: If you can’t join us this time but would like to hear about upcoming events near you, just text **TEAM** to **48178** to hear where we’re headed next!

clean_body: Will you join John King and Michelle Siri for a meet and greet in Silver Spring? | Hello, Peter! I hope you're doing well and enjoying your day so far. Ben Baitman here, Deputy Political Director with John King and Michelle Siri's campaign for Maryland. I am reaching out today to personally invite you to a meet and greet on Saturday, May 7th at 11:30 AM in Silver Spring! This will be a great opportunity to meet John and Michelle, learn more about their backgrounds and why they're running for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland, and ask any questions you might have about their plans for the future of our state. You can RSVP by or reach out to me by replying to this email with any questions about the event. Thanks again, and I hope to see you there!
