I won’t sugarcoat this: I’m mad as hell because I’m watching Republicans destroy democracy in real time.

**First, Donald Trump’s MAGA enablers amplified the Big Lie that the election was rigged.**

When conspiracy theories about our election’s legitimacy led to _a coup attempt on our Capitol_ , Republicans blocked a bipartisan investigation around Jan. 6.

**Then, far-right Republicans blocked the _For The People Act_** , a much-needed and wildly popular election reform bill. _They wouldn’t even allow debate in the Senate!_

**Now, Republicans are proposing — _and passing_ — hundreds of state-side voter suppression laws nationwide.** Worse, their efforts are targeting our country’s most marginalized and already‐disadvantaged communities.

I won’t mince words: We need to make sure far‐right cronies like my former opponent Devin Nunes cannot lie, cheat, and steal away our democracy.

To do it, we must expand our House majority and oust every single anti-Democratic Republican in office. **I'm running in an OPEN SEAT race and we can't let our this seat fall to MAGA traitors.**

Message & data rates may apply. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = I won’t sugarcoat this: I’m mad as hell because I’m watching Republicans destroy democracy in real time. First, Donald Trump’s MAGA enablers amplified the Big Lie that the election was rigged. When conspiracy theories about our election’s legitimacy led to a coup attempt on our Capitol , Republicans blocked a bipartisan investigation around Jan. 6. Then, far-right Republicans blocked the For The People Act , a much-needed and wildly popular election reform bill. They wouldn’t even allow debate in the Senate! Now, Republicans are proposing — and passing — hundreds of state-side voter suppression laws nationwide. Worse, their efforts are targeting our country’s most marginalized and already‐disadvantaged communities. I won’t mince words: We need to make sure far‐right cronies like my former opponent Devin Nunes cannot lie, cheat, and steal away our democracy. To do it, we must expand our House majority and oust every single anti-Democratic Republican in office. I'm running in an OPEN SEAT race and we can't let our this seat fall to MAGA traitors. I’m counting on 1,500 Democrats by midnight, Peter: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = If you’re as outraged as I am, please consider joining my people-powered, grassroots movement to protect our democracy. In solidarity, Phil | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: How to help in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Russia just announced that the goal of the invasion of Ukraine is to take "full control" of southern Ukraine and the eastern Donbas region. As Russia advances with this military invasion, President Putin is banking on us losing interest and ignoring the humanitarian crisis that has forced civilians to flee their homes. We must stand united against Russia’s war of aggression and help those who need it most.

If you’re able to, please consider getting involved or making a contribution to this cause. My team and I put together [a donation page where your contribution will be split evenly between these verified Ukrainian relief organizations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536336/342020167/2075160655?refcode2=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=JG_EM_OT_3MO_20220425_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZjZDkyMS1iN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APkXm-1i5iyg_2ItB0JZr890-_QBTJlNbTtW4LR0vRk=) that are working to deliver essential humanitarian aid:
* [World Central Kitchen](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536339/342020169/-149623904?refcode2=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=JG_EM_OT_3MO_20220425_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZjZDkyMS1iN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APkXm-1i5iyg_2ItB0JZr890-_QBTJlNbTtW4LR0vRk=&emci=6ca50662-96c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=37438246) **(WCK)** : An organization on the frontlines feeding and assisting displaced Ukrainian people. Led by Chef José Andrés, World Central Kitchen is at 8 different border crossings outside of Ukraine to feed those fleeing from war. Additionally, WCK is supporting local restaurants in Odesa and Lviv working to feed Ukrainians still in the country. Their efforts are expanding into Moldova, Slovakia, and Hungary to support incoming refugees.
* [CARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536342/342020172/2115608954?refcode2=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=JG_EM_OT_3MO_20220425_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZjZDkyMS1iN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APkXm-1i5iyg_2ItB0JZr890-_QBTJlNbTtW4LR0vRk=&emci=6ca50662-96c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=37438246): This international humanitarian organization, set up an emergency Ukrainian Crisis Fund to provide immediate support for 4 million people. Donations will go toward providing Ukrainians with water, food, supplies, hygiene kits, immediate support and aid, and cash.
* [Razom for Ukraine](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536345/342020175/1116938084?refcode2=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=JG_EM_OT_3MO_20220425_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZjZDkyMS1iN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APkXm-1i5iyg_2ItB0JZr890-_QBTJlNbTtW4LR0vRk=&emci=6ca50662-96c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=37438246): A Ukrainian-American nonprofit working to not only support emergency response to the war, but also to provide a whole host of resources for allies looking to help, including a round-up of rallies and events for people interested in showing their support for the #StandWithUkraine movement.
* [The Ukrainian Congress Committee of America](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44536348/342020178/608161403?refcode2=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=JG_EM_OT_3MO_20220425_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZjZDkyMS1iN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APkXm-1i5iyg_2ItB0JZr890-_QBTJlNbTtW4LR0vRk=&emci=6ca50662-96c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=48fcd921-b7c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=37438246) **(UCCA)** , which has launched a nationwide fundraising campaign to provide vital humanitarian aid to this population, as well as to the front-line defenders. Together with partners, they have secured warehouses in several regions where humanitarian aid supplies can be securely stored.

We’ve all seen the horrifying images coming out of Ukraine. Right now, the people of Ukraine are being displaced at record levels and they need our help to recover and regain control of their future.

I stand in solidarity with Ukrainians in the face of Russian aggression and I invite you to do the same. Standing with Ukraine can make a lasting difference, and Ukrainians deserve their needs to be met and their voices heard.

Thank you,

Josh Gottheimer

Here are three reasons why your support matters today: 1. We are 22 days out from Election Day. 2. Valerie is the MOST experienced legislator in this race and has a proven record of winning tough fights and getting things done. 3. Every single dollar you contribute today will help us reach even more voters and win on May 17th. We can’t afford to take our foot off the gas now. = | = We don’t want to wake up the morning of May 18th and wonder if we could have done more. Valerie has dedicated her life to public service and is deeply committed to bettering the lives of North Carolinians. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your generous support. name: Heidi St. John
subject: I love my people!
body:
Dear Peter,

A HUGE THANK YOU to all the amazing
volunteers who came out this weekend for training and
doorbelling!

What an incredible group we have!

Tons of doors knocked, great interactions,
overwhelming support and new signs going up!

We thank God for the amazing weather, as it
allowed us to accomplish all that we did!

Please click here to chip in with whatever
you can afford to help us win!

For freedom,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress
www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com

Earlier this month, we asked you “What gives you hope for the 2022 midterms?” Here are just a few of our favorite answers:

__ _“People like you, and young fighters who refuse to just let the doom unfold without standing up to it.” — Melina
_ _ “There are many progressive voices out there running to fight for the people.” — Devine “The adamancy with which the left wing is holding onto their beliefs.” — Jack “Polls showing that most Americans actually want what the Progressive platform has on it.” — Mario _
---
All across the country, people are mobilizing behind progressive champions who will fight for working families. Voters understand that **_electing Democrats is not enough — we need BETTER, unbought Democrats who will fight every day for universal healthcare, climate action, voting rights, and more._**
We don’t have mountains of personal wealth, corporate donors or a millionaire donor network to prop up our campaign. We’re turning to our grassroots supporters to show that Big Organizing can defeat Big Money. Everything is on the line right now.Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a2833eb979249463/e6eee3fe92f97eb1c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

Peter, We’re reaching out to you with an URGENT MESSAGE today. Our end-of-month deadline is coming up on Saturday at midnight, and this is **_the most important deadline our campaign has ever faced._** Election Day is May 17th – just a few weeks away. And we must ramp up our critical get-out-the-vote efforts RIGHT NOW. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s plan to help the GOP reclaim power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

With Donald Trump off the ballot and out of office for the first election
in six years, it’s easy to overlook the fact that he’s raising millions of
dollars to help Republicans reclaim control of Congress while setting the
stage for his next run in 2024.

Trump’s PAC, the Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, brought in a
whopping $19 million during the first quarter of the year. Additionally,
his Super PAC, Make America Great Again, Again! Inc., (I know, I think
it’s ridiculous too) brought in $4.3 million. He has over $122 million
cash on hand. And Trump's using that money to tour the country — he’s
already held a half-dozen campaign-style rallies for his handpicked
candidates to rev up the MAGA base.

In many respects, despite being off the ballot and out of office, Trump is
the Republican Party. Candidates run their campaigns not in the hopes of
being noticed by their voters — but to be noticed by Trump. An audience of
one.

Some Republicans have run ads out of state just to make sure they are
broadcast on Fox News in South Florida, beaming into Trump’s television at
Mar-a-Lago. Many others have come to beg and grovel at his feet for an
endorsement, knowing it could turn the tide of their far right Republican
primary elections.

This is all part of Trump’s plan to help the GOP take back control over
Congress, so that when he runs for president in 2024, he’ll have
Republican majorities to overthrow the results of the election in his
favor.

Trump and the GOP are cold-blooded and calculated when it comes to the
2022 midterm elections. From passing voter suppression laws to radically
gerrymandered districts, Republicans know exactly what they’re doing.

So we have a job to do. We have to defend American democracy. Protect the
House and Senate. Because we cannot, under any circumstances, cede power
to the likes of this GOP — a party without a conscience and without
devotion to democracy. One that subjects itself to the whims of the worst
president this country has ever seen. Derek, this is why I have
to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]With Donald Trump raising millions of dollars to help the GOP take back
Congress and improve his chances in 2024, can you pitch in $10, $25, or
$50 right now to fuel our work upholding our democracy and helping
Democrats get elected across the map?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1006&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1007&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1008&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=200_5257348_AxT1Bm&akid=200%2E5257348%2EAxT1Bm ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your continued support.

All the best,

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

Peter,

_Biden and Kamala’s border crisis is spiraling out of control, and yet, their only real action is to use our Border Patrol agents as Uber to shuttle people into the country._

**Only when we take back the 50-50 Senate from Kamala’s control can we stop Biden’s lunacy and put an end to this crisis.**
---
But first, I want you to see what I saw at the border with your own eyes, Peter.

Friend,
---
Radical liberal Tony Evers isn’t just destroying common sense legislation on his vetoing spree, he’s vetoing YOU – the very people he’s supposed to be working for as governor.
---
From election security to our broken liberal school systems to the safety of our streets, Evers vetoed solutions to all of them on Good Friday!
---
_And now, after vetoing 43 bills in _just one day_ , he’s set the record with **126 vetoes**!_
---
What Evers is doing isn’t governing, he’s playing puppet to special interest cronies. But with your help right now, we can take the lead in this TOSS-UP governor’s race and end this madness.

It wasn’t enough for Evers to veto EVERY election security bill that came across his desk over the past year...
---
_...He then picked criminals over law-abiding citizens when he vetoed a new bill that would have established mandatory minimum sentences for rioters._
---
Then again, this should come as no surprise considering he’s the governor who sided with rioters over our police officers while the city of Kenosha was set ablaze.
---
At every turn, Tony Evers has chosen special interests over the people he is supposed to represent.
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:Hello,I don't believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success.From what I've seen, this isn't always the case. [**However, I want to know what you've seen.**](http://trk.readactnews.)[](http://trk.readactnews.-2m24vlks-_AmKg)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized."Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen!This year I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational "experts" across the country. **I'm going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://trk.readactnews.) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of America's Educational System by surveying people like you.I'd like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://trk.readactnews.)Thank you for your consideration.Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

clean_body: South Dakota, now North Dakota... where next!? | | Team: Another blatant attack on direct democracy and your voting rights just took a step towards reaching North Dakota’s ballot this November. Late Friday evening, the “Protect the North Dakota Constitution” campaign turned in signatures for a ballot measure that would gut majority rule and make ALL ballot measures require 60% approval to win moving forward. Sound familiar? That’s because South Dakota has an extremely similar measure already on the ballot for this June. subject: Ohio: Together we can end obstruction in our state, but we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Team,

When National Republicans started off 2022 by immediately working against us to win back the House majority, we got even more confirmation that this election year would be an especially challenging one.

We’ve seen more dark money and the lengths that the GOP will go to with extreme gerrymandering and unfair maps, which have cost Ohioans millions of dollars, and obstructionist candidates who will say anything to try and win Ohio. Even as we are months away from the election, we still don’t know what districts will look like, and Republican candidates are working full force against us.

And most recently...Donald Trump held a rally in our state. His priorities are clear: he is only concerned with spending more time furthering his own 2024 ambitions than focusing on his lackluster, phony endorsed candidate for U.S. Senate in 2022.

**But Team, there is something you can do to help us fight back.**

As April comes to an end, we are closing in on our important end-of-month goal of $15,000. And unlike our Republican opposition, we rely on this grassroots team to support our candidates and fight for a blue and fair Ohio.

**[Will you rush to make a donation of $5, $10, or whatever you can so that we can reach our crucial $15k goal and fight for Ohioans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546016/342064199/1375374031?refcode=em22_220425_eom1_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220425_eom1_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjVhZjc3Ni1kZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7FKD9thduhuZxdaJuDg1DsCY2nzyagWuKgXL4S73Ik=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Chip in $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546017/342064200/1375374031?refcode=em22_220425_eom1_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220425_eom1_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjVhZjc3Ni1kZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7FKD9thduhuZxdaJuDg1DsCY2nzyagWuKgXL4S73Ik=)**

We can let obstruction continue to run rampant in Ohio in the form of Trump-endorsed candidates like J.D. Vance, who Ohioans have made clear is not fit to represent them in Congress.

**[I know that we have what it takes to win back Ohio together, but I need your support if we’re going to keep up with big-money Republicans. Will you chip in whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546023/342064206/1375374031?refcode=em22_220425_eom1_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220425_eom1_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjVhZjc3Ni1kZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7FKD9thduhuZxdaJuDg1DsCY2nzyagWuKgXL4S73Ik=)**

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. clean_body: | Team, When National Republicans started off 2022 by immediately working against us to win back the House majority, we got even more confirmation that this election year would be an especially challenging one. We’ve seen more dark money and the lengths that the GOP will go to with extreme gerrymandering and unfair maps, which have cost Ohioans millions of dollars, and obstructionist candidates who will say anything to try and win Ohio. Even as we are months away from the election, we still don’t know what districts will look like, and Republican candidates are working full force against us. And most recently...Donald Trump held a rally in our state. His priorities are clear: he is only concerned with spending more time furthering his own 2024 ambitions than focusing on his lackluster, phony endorsed candidate for U.S. Senate in 2022. But Team, there is something you can do to help us fight back. As April comes to an end, we are closing in on our important end-of-month goal of $15,000. subject: This is a longer email, but it’s important

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546058/342064465/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIyYzdkZi1kZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSR0bq1y5Syll1LdNTui5hIHmScWSxSEK3XdrPynW2I=&emci=db04f2d7-ddc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=de22c7df-ddc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

I have a bit of free time this evening, folks, so I want to share something important with you. This is a longer email, but it’s important — so please read to the end if you can. Back in 2009, I was the first Democrat to ever represent New Mexico’s 1st Congressional District in the House after flipping it blue. It was an exciting time for Democrats — Barack Obama was president and we held the House and Senate majorities. We ran on healthcare reform and fixing the economy after a recession that devastated millions of families. We delivered on our promises — **passing the _Affordable Care Act_ to finally make quality healthcare coverage more affordable for more folks across the country and enacting a sweeping economic stimulus package.** But once the midterm elections came around in 2010, something changed. Less Democratic voters showed up to the polls and Republicans went all in to pick up House and Senate seats. We lost our House majority and six Senate seats that year, and we didn’t win back both majorities and the White House again until 2020. That brings us to today. We could lose the Senate and House majorities in a matter of months —**the party that holds the presidency historically has a tough time in the midterms, and a Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC is pouring a whopping $141 million into advertisements to tip the scales in the GOP’s direction.** Over the last year and a half, we’ve made historic investments in infrastructure, provided sweeping pandemic relief, strengthened our economy, and are so close to taking once-in-a-generation action on climate change. We can’t afford to let Republicans flip our majorities and roll back all we’ve accomplished, but **they only need to flip one Senate seat and five House seats to do it.** We need to make sure we hold on to critical Senate seats in Georgia, Arizona, New Hampshire, and Nevada. We’ve got to help Democrats like Gabe Vasquez flip battleground House seats. And we must elect Democrats at every level of government to ensure we have strong state and local leadership no matter what happens at the national level. **That’s why I’m asking you, personally: Can you chip in toward our campaign’s April fundraising goal to power our work to protect the Democratic majority and elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546059/342064466/394631092?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIyYzdkZi1kZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSR0bq1y5Syll1LdNTui5hIHmScWSxSEK3XdrPynW2I=)

name: Giffords.org
subject: When?!?!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The answer is actually pretty simple
#

Friends -
The most common question we get at Giffords is when will we pass universal background checks?
And the answer is pretty simple.
It’s when the minority of legislators blocking the bill realize they have more to fear from us than they do of the NRA.
That’s happening. Slowly.
But it happens more and more with every petition signature. Every social media post. And most importantly, every donation.
Because their fear of the gun lobby is all about money. But when we can afford to go toe-to-toe in election season on this issue—an issue most Americans agree with us on—we can start to flip some of those swing state holdouts.
So please. With our April fundraising deadline coming to a close, we’re asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today to help us pass legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence? Every donation is important. They all add up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1876_3935704_ag_F7V&akid=1876%2E3935704%2Eag_F7V)

subject: Marco won't let you down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
I couldn't be more excited to reach out on his behalf.
| | |
---
Friend – **my son, Marco Lopez, is running for governor of Arizona, and I couldn't be more excited to reach out on his behalf.**
It's been 50 years since Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona, and every day, Marco has reminded me why that was the right choice.
In Arizona, Marco became mayor of Nogales, the city where we raised him, where he gained the skills he needed to join the Obama administration and where he now runs his own small business (just like I have since we moved here).

**But under failed Republican leaders like Doug Ducey, Arizona has lost sight of its former promise. Marco is running to restore that potential – and he needs your help to defeat the GOP money machine and flip Arizona blue. [Can you chip in right now to help elect Marco governor and fight back against GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546496/342066399/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk590-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ4OTg4ZC1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGFbRGvDASGVhMtX6EgPLH4wE-Cgdknx1AFpmOC-Mv0=)**

I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican who cares more about her extremist agenda than about Arizona families. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm asking for your help. Our family has plenty of love and support to go around, but Marco's movement needs more than that. He needs to hit every single fundraising goal – but his team told me the next one ends tonight at midnight, and he's still a bit short.** [So Friend, I have to ask: Will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546497/342066400/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk590-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ4OTg4ZC1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGFbRGvDASGVhMtX6EgPLH4wE-Cgdknx1AFpmOC-Mv0=)**

Esther Lopez

* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546503/342066433/1235478392?refcode=&amounts=&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ4OTg4ZC1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGFbRGvDASGVhMtX6EgPLH4wE-Cgdknx1AFpmOC-Mv0=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546504/342066434/1235478392?refcode=&amounts=&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQ4OTg4ZC1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGFbRGvDASGVhMtX6EgPLH4wE-Cgdknx1AFpmOC-Mv0=)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Our democracy is on the ballot in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
I need to be frank, friend: **I FEAR for our democracy if Republicans retake the House in November. We simply cannot let this happen.**
Despite the lasting harm that COVID-19 has caused, Republicans are brazenly planning to cut Social Security, gut Medicare and Medicaid, and overturn the Affordable Care Act. And instead of seeing elections as an opportunity to win votes on the strength of their ideas, they're attacking voting rights to tip the scales in their favor.
**THIS is the GOP's dangerous agenda – and it's why our democracy is on the ballot in the upcoming midterm elections. Letting GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy take the gavel would be a _nightmare_ for our country. **But right now, Republicans are leading Democrats in key battleground races, and the GOP has raised record-breaking amounts of money to retake our narrow House majority. That's why I'm asking for your urgent help today.
**[Friend, your grassroots support couldn't be more critical to our success. Will you please donate $5 or more now – split between me and Jacky Rosen – to DEFEND our razor-thin Democratic majorities so we can continue making progress for the American people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546708/342067212/250050607?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1737-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzk2ZDg0My1lMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEAkMcM-3JU4uYxLaH-ExGhVEDiIqAd4bwd4VP0AbQA=)**

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: My trip to Europe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
I was heartened to spend time with US and NATO personnel in Germany and Poland.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546749/342067434/1992726811?refcode=EM_C_220425Europe_N_MK_90DO_5_G_N_logo_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk2ZDhmMS1lMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ccvla7AgV8YeR9eVQaKu5QBEaaQuOsDOXx3QwBtllDM=) Team, [**_This month, I had the privilege of visiting with our troops and allies in Europe._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546750/342067436/-2095354470?fbclid=IwAR2kbZBD_Uz3qcdtMdgp4XnJbhqRrC46sICHf3p1Z2UlsZcTZh8s13pGbOw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk2ZDhmMS1lMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ccvla7AgV8YeR9eVQaKu5QBEaaQuOsDOXx3QwBtllDM=&emci=871a6873-c8c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7d96d8f1-e0c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2814549)

Together with my colleagues from the Defense Appropriations Subcommittee, I traveled to Germany and Poland during Holy Week to assess the situation on the ground. In Germany, I met with US troops stationed at Grafenwoehr Army Base, and was thrilled to spend time with some of Toledo’s bravest. I then traveled to Poland, where I met with representatives of USAID and Polish organizations working day and night to welcome Ukrainian refugees, and ease their burden. Our ally Poland has provided a shining example of grace and human compassion while under the thumb of Putin’s violent siege.

Meanwhile, the United States is increasing aid to Ukraine, with an additional $800 million being approved by the Biden administration this month. **Together with our NATO allies, we are meeting this moment.** Putin’s desperation is apparent as nations of conscience rise up against him.

It is my sincere belief that he will soon be defeated, **and Liberty will once again reign from the Alps to the Caucasus.** As co-chair of the bipartisan House Ukraine Caucus, I pledge my unyielding support for achieving this objective. clean_body: I was heartened to spend time with US and NATO personnel in Germany and Poland. = Team, Together with my colleagues from the Defense Appropriations Subcommittee, I traveled to Germany and Poland during Holy Week to assess the situation on the ground. In Germany, I met with US troops stationed at Grafenwoehr Army Base, and was thrilled to spend time with some of Toledo’s bravest. I then traveled to Poland, where I met with representatives of USAID and Polish organizations working day and night to welcome Ukrainian refugees, and ease their burden. Our ally Poland has provided a shining example of grace and human compassion while under the thumb of Putin’s violent siege. Meanwhile, the United States is increasing aid to Ukraine, with an additional $800 million being approved by the Biden administration this month. Together with our NATO allies, we are meeting this moment. Putin’s desperation is apparent as nations of conscience rise up against him. It is my sincere belief that he will soon be defeated, and Liberty will once again reign from the Alps to the Caucasus. As co-chair of the bipartisan House Ukraine Caucus, I pledge my unyielding support for achieving this objective. # Principles Above Politics

| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success: promises kept.

Evil is called good and good is called evil. Down is up, boys are girls, indoctrination is education, fiction is fact. We must work together to share the message. Get involved. Speak with your neighbors. Hand out brochures. Wear your Ed gear out in public, spark up conversations, and MOST IMPORTANTLY, VOTE MAY 17th! | | | | If you want to secure the American Dream in Idaho, donate now! | == | | | | | If you want to abolish the income tax, cap property taxes, and implement school choice in Idaho, donate RIGHT NOW! | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | Lava Springs - Bear Lake - Idaho Falls - Weston - Boise - Eagle | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Burril?=
subject: Weekly Update from the Burril Campaign:
body:
What NC 11 voters are telling me. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/burrilforcongress/burril-campaign-update-april?e=80f8383115)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Burril For Congress Team,

We are down to the last days of the Primary campaign. Your prayers are continually felt by me, my team and my family.

When my wife Barbara and I committed to this campaign, I set a daily work timeline of 14 hours per day six days a week and 5 hours on Sunday. God continues to give Team Burril incredible endurance to work hard to reach the people of this district with our message. And our performance is showing up in real momentum into these closing weeks.

The TV and radio ads are working, and our name recognition is above our targets for this point in the campaign.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Here are some things I am hearing as I travel across our Western Counties:
**The Conservative, faith-based people of Western North Carolina are having difficulty defending Madison Cawthorn's language and behavior.** None of you are willing to call him a bad or evil person. Neither will I. But all of you are telling me he has underperformed and disappointed you and needs to be replaced.
**Conservative people are concerned about America.** Government does not feel accessible because we are Conservative and I walk into rooms facing a lot of furrowed brows.
**You are not giving up.** This is the strongest sentiment I am finding. You BELIEVE this Country is a network of smart, ambitious individuals who can be responsible for yourselves, who will protect your family and your belongings all while being respectful of others. Because this Nation has allowed you and your family to improve your life, your land, your livelihood and your good name, you are not giving up on America.
_Folks, this is why I am continuing this campaign to represent you as the Conservative, Christian, Businessman._
---
| Please continue to pray for our campaign team. They are full throttle committed to winning. I could not be happier with their effort. Don't forget to tell your friends and family about me and this [campaign](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=90e0b286c9&e=80f8383115). Follow us on [Facebook](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=19d0985810&e=80f8383115), [Instagram](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=5a99365fb0&e=80f8383115) and [Twitter](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=4989b39bb7&e=80f8383115). We upload photos and comments every day.

Lastly, here is a peek at our next TV advertisement:
---
| [ ](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=27cf02f4f2&e=80f8383115)
---
| **Romans 11:29....for God's gifts and his call are irrevocable.**

Remain resilient!
---
|
---
Matthew Burril
Luke 1:37
Candidate for U.S. Congress
| | | | | | | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=bcbbd19cfe&e=80f8383115)
---
| | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=e98e8aa9d8&e=80f8383115)
---
| | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=cadec6798c&e=80f8383115)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Burril for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Burril for CongressPO Box 1778Fletcher, NC 28732-1778
[Add us to your address book](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=064ccefa6e)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=064ccefa6e&e=80f8383115&c=97bc25249b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=064ccefa6e&e=80f8383115&c=97bc25249b).

name: Peter Welch
subject: Democracy is on the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
The right to vote and the peaceful transfer of power are core tenets of our nation’s democracy. The future depends on our fight to protect them.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=295%2E61531%2EbHkplE)
Hello,
It's easy to take democracy for granted in America, but ours is under attack.
It feels like every week we learn new, horrifying details about the January 6th insurrection. And we’re constantly seeing new, appalling anti-voting rights legislation being proposed across the country.
Let’s be clear: Trump-aligned state houses are making it harder to vote, gerrymandering congressional districts to further marginalize voters of color, and taking away the independent role of state authorities to certify election results in order to destabilize free and fair elections in the future.
**The right to vote and the peaceful transfer of power are core tenets of our nation’s democracy. The future depends on our fight to protect them.**
I’ve seen Vermonters work together in both big ways and small to protect our democracy. From talking to family and friends, registering people in their communities to vote, voting in local elections, educating people about legislation that can make a difference, and more. And I’m ready to bring that Vermont Way to the Senate each day.
Fighting for democracy is one of the core reasons I’m in this race. [**If you think protecting our democracy is one of the most important issues we face in this election, I’d appreciate it if you signed your name alongside other grassroots supporters.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-protect-democracy/?source=em_20220425_p_p_democracy&t=3&akid=295%2E61531%2EbHkplE)
Democracy is on the ballot in November, and we can't let it lose.
Thanks for being with me in this fight.
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22apr?refcode=em_20220425_p_p_democracy&refcode2=295_61531_bHkplE&akid=295%2E61531%2EbHkplE)
---

---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---

PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=295%2E61531%2EbHkplE).

We need Herschel Walker to win in November. | Peter, | FIRST: Our Democrat opponent, Raphael Warnock, announced that he raised $13.6 million in the first three months of 2022 - the most of any Senate candidate in the country! THEN: A Democrat Super PAC started an $8.5 million ad buy in 4 swing states - including Georgia - to boost President Joe Biden (!) and the most vulnerable Democrat senators. This is in addition to the $23 million of ads recently purchased by Chuck Schumer's Super PAC against us! NOW: Our opponent has released a new ad that places the blame anywhere but on his own terrible voting record for the state of our economy, gas prices, and the exorbitant cost of living. **
With a field of five candidates on stage, Marc deftly championed the values of faith, family, and freedom to an audience of hundreds who subsequently voted him the winner. Dorchester is the oldest political conference in the United States and a showcase for Oregon's conservative elite. Marc's message resonated with all attendees which carried him to victory by more than tripling the vote count of the next candidate.

clean_body: | | | | Hi Friend, Marc Thielman trounced the competition at the annual Dorchester Conference with a and won the gubernatorial straw poll with an astonishing 61% of the vote. With a field of five candidates on stage, Marc deftly championed the values of faith, family, and freedom to an audience of hundreds who subsequently voted him the winner. Dorchester is the oldest political conference in the United States and a showcase for Oregon's conservative elite. Marc's message resonated with all attendees which carried him to victory by more than tripling the vote count of the next candidate. | | | NOW is the time to take this momentum forward! Ballots for the May 17th Republican Primary are sent out this week and we need YOUR SUPPORT. Please help us bring home the victory with your and get the word out that****the time is now to flip the Governor's seat red. Times such as these call for decisive action, and Marc is our man to assume the mantle of leadership. | | | | | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. **Trump Rambles About Toilets Not Flushing During Ohio Rally ... Oh, and Also: Hijacking America’s Election Systems** Team

A few days ago, Trump held a rally to support his Ohio puppet J.D. Vance and spent his entire 90 minutes on stage senselessly ranting to the masses. From talking about dishwashers and his grievances with them to suggesting that Russian oil is being brought in through the backdoor of the United States, there was no shortage of the standard Trump bullshit.

**Trump's rantings are nonsensical and based on lies, but the sad truth is that there are people who really believe it all.** Most dangerously, Donald Trump is STILL pushing the lie that he won the election, the lie that led to an insurrection and the deaths of five Capitol police officers.

With Donald Trump back on the road and the members of the Treason Caucus still in power, we need to fight harder than ever to make sure that these people are held accountable for putting our democracy in danger.

[**Never Again PAC is building a war chest to unseat the members of the Treason Caucus in the coming elections and shut down Donald Trump's lies. body:
And it will NEVER happen again |

Republicans are scrambling right now. Their path back to power is by keeping Ron Johnson in the U.S. Senate, which explains why they’ve made our race a “top priority.”

The bad news is that Johnson outraised every candidate in this race last quarter, he went up with two brand-new TV ads, and Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just reserved $15 million in Wisconsin to prop him up even further.

Right now, Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat beating him in a recent head-to-head poll, and _The Washington Post_ considers her “the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.” But if we don’t have the resources to respond to GOP spending, they could end up tipping the scales and keeping this seat red.

To counter Johnson and McConnell’s TV ad blitz, we’ll need to fight back one grassroots donation at a time. Sarah isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs, so the only way we’re going to win is with your support.

**Please, rush a donation of any amount now so we can grow our lead against Ron Johnson and send Sarah Godlewski to the U.S. Senate:**

Friend, the Jan. 6 committee has been hard at work for more than a year, and they have a MOUNTAIN of evidence against Donald Trump.
A federal judge even ruled that it was** **_"more likely than not"_**that Trump's actions to overturn President Biden's victory in the 2020 election constituted criminal behavior.**

With everything the panel has uncovered so far – gaps in phone records, destroyed evidence – it's crystal clear Trump played a huge part in the deadly coup on our nation's Capitol that tragic day. **Yet, some panel members are unsure if they need to make a criminal referral against him.**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Let me explain please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44548066/342073173/1927938479?refcode=20220425_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlkZDkyMi1lNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebZh7Zq2i8IMGXHktw2v5NDDbu7xfXXVCfXuXZ8fLik=)
Team, In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a split contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances. Here’s the truth: Less than one week from today, we close the books on one of the final fundraising deadlines before people start voting. The pundits and our opponents will all be wondering how much money we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received. But what we’re trying to do is even more important than that: We’re building the kind of campaign that can take on the entire National Republican establishment and win. That requires considerable financial resources. And after this deadline hits, we’ll take stock of them and make a lot of important spending decisions — decisions that will decide the fate of this campaign. So with this deadline fast approaching, I’m asking: [**Can you please split a $20 contribution between our campaign and Seth Moulton before this end-of-month deadline comes to a close? I would not ask if it were not so important. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44548067/342073174/1927938479?refcode=20220425_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlkZDkyMi1lNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebZh7Zq2i8IMGXHktw2v5NDDbu7xfXXVCfXuXZ8fLik=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44548068/342073175/-1534947712?refcode=20220425_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlkZDkyMi1lNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebZh7Zq2i8IMGXHktw2v5NDDbu7xfXXVCfXuXZ8fLik=)
We are in a great position to win this race. The polls are close and our organization is strong. But the attacks we have yet to face will be unprecedented — and we have to be ready. And if you chip in to help, I know we will be. Thank you, Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44548069/342073176/-1534947712?refcode=20220425_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlkZDkyMi1lNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebZh7Zq2i8IMGXHktw2v5NDDbu7xfXXVCfXuXZ8fLik=)

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: TOMORROW: Demand Gov. McKee address unhoused crisis
body:
| | | Friend,
We are writing today to let you know about an important upcoming protest this Tuesday at 2:15 at the State House that is being organized by the Rhode Island Homeless Advocacy Project (RIHAP). Last December, Rhode Island faced an unprecedented houslessness crisis. In response to the Sleep Out protest led by Cynthia, Matt, and dozens of community leaders, the state created 400 winter shelter beds. **But now, the State is closing its winter shelters and because Governor McKee didn’t make a plan, the hundreds of unhoused Rhode Islanders will have nowhere to go. Friend, can you join us at the State House at 2:15 to demand Governor McKee to act?** The Rhode Island Homeless Advocacy Project has been working tirelessly to try to get Governor McKee to address this crisis, now they’re asking us to show up for them. Whether you can make it to the protest on Tuesday or not, can you sign their petition calling on the Governor to address this crisis? [**Sign RIHAP’s Petition to tell Governor McKee to address the unhoused crisis**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEMe-LG4_TdHoh7JoCGPevAvp75HxM-BIxYYDHydhcNyWAVPmroH7OqFgOVDHcuk8HDltp9x6KCT5HTkt2HS72cWg0mm9UaSqnoAsUlRGWb0dfp5zau5Rmkfq0MztZrLRWs80RIjMhUB4IA4p4aLzfA1kPm2Hf2yb2YJNbx3LSDo-jFvrTfy7N4vI7VlzueZybgbbRw2O6Nea9jjh2jNa6Oj5oCoFMX_gPlotvooDwI6XyWrHp6IC7zHm5sjqQ3-NgBk-_JHOGeT6GlkPvZtcCfe1TNTHs4Jim4rG_Ijk0Hy-WCMKshn7rHvkkT7XeBFao8p_VH-RwKxxH5ZSGnpDXVs0TFD0yP3PeBTPTfaFWLuQwwxYgu7beiGIGNqxvzwTkb_LCCfMC3RwGsgnPI1nzqGVQ8S5Aiptm2O5rWXnvY90uWDAsjjy_8QaybCiX0m4K6NuYhsOO8l4au0vhjYS11LuHDR3zY0kUz4ONPWQedGhFcugmIha-hwpcOd1tf4nvfrbLqoRyAEchW8laKeJPw/3li/MtTGrRVcRn-TIBOFjxh96g/h0/PJjaajhwt1-NzqCvlpvmqbCbn-nUxvrLTcFBTKUxznM) We hope to see you at the protest. In solidarity, Team Matt and Cynthia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Charlie=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Congressman John Peterson Endorses Charlie Gerow for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Charlie For Governor**
body:
| | | | April 25, 2022 For Immediate Release:

Contact: Peg Luksik
team@charlieforgovernor.com
814-244-8948
---
| [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=ab8423e2db&e=df21354de5)
---
| **Congressman John Peterson Endorses Charlie Gerow for Governor**
"It’s vital that we elect a Republican Governor this year who will quickly move us from the disastrous policies of the Wolf Administration. I believe the best person for the job is Charlie Gerow. I’ve known Charlie Gerow for many years and have worked with him to promote Pennsylvania oil and gas and to stop tolling of Interstate 80.

"We need a governor with management and marketing skills, not a former prosecutor. We have many choices but without hesitation I believe Charlie Gerow has the needed skill set to make Pennsylvania the Keystone State we were in the past.

"Pennsylvania was long known as the Keystone State. It is blessed with endless resources, beginning with the finest hardwood in the USA. It is also blessed with coal, oil & natural gas. It led the East in power generation with coal, hydro, nuclear & natural gas. Pennsylvania is one of the top Agriculture states and is one of the top tourism destinations in the country.

"I’m proud to endorse Charlie Gerow for Governor and hope you will join me in voting for him in the Republican Primary on May 17."

John E. Peterson
Member of Congress from 1997 to 2009
---

subject: We only selected 50 Patriots

body:
| | | | | | Peter,

This is unreal.
Out of the **74 MILLION** Americans who voted for President Trump, our team selected YOU to take the exclusive **Trump Identity Survey** , but your _response is missing._
We identified an elite group of 50 Trump Patriots from YOUR state to confirm their support for President Trump and the Republican party, and you are one of the very last patriots who has not sent their survey back.
_In fact, 45 out of the 50 patriots selected have already submitted their response._Where 's yours?__

After President Trump put America First and achieved historic success for our country, **how could you possibly abandon him?**

**[_URGENT.__Submit your response to the Official Trump Supporter Identity Survey right NOW._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60228785:JTnFevoNQ:m:1:3253819041:27D4A864A7E96FCB8F89CE1A7E4CCB9B:r)**

Trump Identity Survey Team

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Voting rights are under attack in North Carolina — we need someone to protect them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Erica Smith is the only candidate in this race who is committed to protecting voting rights — full stop.
#
**Voting rights are under attack across the country and North Carolina is no exception.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/50255?t=1&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)
Just last year North Carolina judges struck down a photo voter identification law due to racial bias. The judges said the law _intentionally discriminates against Black voters, violating their equal protections_.
Don Davis — Erica’s corporate-backed, so-called “Democrat”, anti-choice opponent —**is ALSO anti-voting rights and voted in favor of the voter photo ID law that was struck down for discrimination against Black voters.**
_Yeah... we REALLY can’t let this guy win._
[**_Donate now to help us send Erica to Congress where she’ll fight to protect North Carolinians' right to vote no matter their race »_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/50255?t=2&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)
The only way we’ll be able to protect voting rights fully is by electing a progressive champion like Erica who is committed to doing everything she can to protect North Carolinians in the NC-01 district and beyond.
Don doesn’t care about North Carolina’s working families — full stop. We don’t need any more corporate-backed or conservative Democrats in power. This year is a testament to that. We’re all frustrated with the way that just a few can block progress for the whole nation.
We can’t let this happen in North Carolina, not with our Democratic majority hanging by a thread. **We need every Democratic vote to be on the right side of progress**. [**_Can you contribute to our completely people-powered campaign today? We don’t take a dime of super PAC, corporate, or fossil fuel money._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/50255?t=3&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/50261?refcode=em20220425-1123&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)**
We know North Carolina is ready for change. Let’s make sure we get it.
Onwards,
Erica Smith HQ
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/50261?refcode=em20220425-1123-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/50261?refcode=em20220425-1123-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220425-1123-footer&t=25&refcode2=1123_3698_hK3BLs&akid=1123%2E3698%2EhK3BLs)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

subject: 26 Governors Create Border Strike Force
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Was our border governor one of them? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-7109557?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=1cd89a8bd6&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| The following is the opening line of a joint memorandum of understanding in which every single one of the **26 governors** who signed onto the **American Governors Border Strike Force** are Republicans:

_“_ _[In the absence of federal leadership](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=c8caf02f4c&e=102b599530)_ _, states are partnering together to create the American Governors’ Border Strike Force...”_

Mississippi Governor Tate Reeves has declared that _“We’re all border states now & we’re going to protect ourselves”. _
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=e9cdc482c4&e=102b599530)
---
| **Yet our Governor’s jurisdiction is on the frontlines in the battleground where our country is being invaded, and she’s too busy wielding her tyrannical power by extending COVID-19 emergency orders!**

_It is absolutely essential that we are victorious in electing a state leader who will uphold Conservative values such as national sovereignty_! Last month **210,000** migrants were arrested for attempting to cross the border, which is up **24%** from last year, and _is the highest monthly total for two decades. _

**As your next Governor** , I will immediately send the National Guard to our southern border and create a New Mexico Border Security agency upon entering office. I will unite with every America First governor to stop transnational crime organizations from being active in our communities. Your support of my campaign **with a donation of any amount today** will show incompetent politicians that their days of wielding abusive power are over!
---

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541458/342041734/-1294466778?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220425eom1_ES_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI5ZTY3Zi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19t4VVzBrjGet_iNDOuZA9M-dbBiyEbcpTgEJKbZ0io=)

It's actually really simple, Peter. To win this race and send a champion for Colorado families to Congress, **we have to reach every single voter in CO-08 we possibly can**. _Everyone_ has issues important to their families and challenges that we can fix together. Now that Dr. Caraveo has won the Democratic nomination, it’s our job to make sure they all have their voices heard. And right now, we have an incredible opportunity to invest in significant organizing infrastructure months before whichever far-right, anti-choice GOP opponent the Republican Party nominates. **We cannot let this moment slip away without capitalizing, so we’re turning to our grassroots supporters for help. ** _There are over 460,000 registered voters in CO-08. We have to start building our field program NOW so that we can hire organizers, set up events, and start to knock doors ahead of the general election. We need to raise $15,000 by the end of this month to lay that foundation so that we can reach every voter in CO-08._ [**Can Dr. Caraveo count on your help to reach every voter?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541459/342041735/-1294466778?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220425eom1_ES_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI5ZTY3Zi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19t4VVzBrjGet_iNDOuZA9M-dbBiyEbcpTgEJKbZ0io=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541460/342041736/-1294466778?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220425eom1_ES_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI5ZTY3Zi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19t4VVzBrjGet_iNDOuZA9M-dbBiyEbcpTgEJKbZ0io=)

We’re going to fight with everything we’ve got to make sure ALL voters in CO-08 have the information they need to cast their ballot — an effort that’s more important than ever at a time when extremists like Lori Saine are already spending thousands on TV trying to intimidate us from making our voices heard. [Can you pitch in to lay the groundwork for our critical field operations today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541461/342041737/-1294466778?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220425eom1_ES_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI5ZTY3Zi1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19t4VVzBrjGet_iNDOuZA9M-dbBiyEbcpTgEJKbZ0io=)

Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. clean_body: | = It's actually really simple, Peter. To win this race and send a champion for Colorado families to Congress, we have to reach every single voter in CO-08 we possibly can. Everyone has issues important to their families and challenges that we can fix together. Now that Dr. Caraveo has won the Democratic nomination, it’s our job to make sure they all have their voices heard. And right now, we have an incredible opportunity to invest in significant organizing infrastructure months before whichever far-right, anti-choice GOP opponent the Republican Party nominates. We cannot let this moment slip away without capitalizing, so we’re turning to our grassroots supporters for help. There are over 460,000 registered voters in CO-08. We have to start building our field program NOW so that we can hire organizers, set up events, and start to knock doors ahead of the general election. We need to raise $15,000 by the end of this month to lay that foundation so that we can reach every voter in CO-08. = | = We’re going to fight with everything we’ve got to make sure ALL voters in CO-08 have the information they need to cast their ballot — an effort that’s more important than ever at a time when extremists like Lori Saine are already spending thousands on TV trying to intimidate us from making our voices heard. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your help! name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dellicker Endorsed by Local Police Organization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
FOP Lodge 40 say Dellicker has been "stalwart in his support for law enforcement." | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e366d2404f&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Dellicker Endorsed by Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 40**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

I am pleased to announce that I’ve received the endorsement from Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 40, Joseph J. Haggerty Memorial Lodge, in Bethlehem. The Lodge represents current and retired police officers, especially Pennsylvania State Troopers, in Bucks, Lehigh, and Northampton counties.

**“Kevin Dellicker has been stalwart in his support for law enforcement in Pennsylvania,” said the President of FOP Lodge 40. “We are confident that Kevin Dellicker will continue to work to ensure the safety and justice of those who live and work in Lehigh County and beyond.”**

This endorsement from local law enforcement officers is more valuable than 100 endorsements from Washington politicians. Thank you, FOP Lodge 40!

In other news, we are now up to eight different public forums or debates that Lisa Scheller has declined to attend:
* WFMZ Business Matters Debate
* WLVT PBS 39 Debate
* WDIY 88.1 Public Radio Candidate Forum
* Carbon County GOP Debate
* Lehigh County GOP Women’s Meet & Greet
* Debate at the Steel Club in Hellertown
* Debate in Coplay
* Emmaus High School Student Forum

I've posed a series of questions to her that you can read at [www.AskLisaScheller.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4a77612abb&e=1090c5c412). She continues to dodge public discussion about her company's strategic partnership with Chinese Communists.

Last week, I traveled to all four PA-07 counties, and this week I’ll do the same. Highlights include a student forum at Emmaus High School, a stop at the West End Republican Club in Kresgeville, and lots of door knocking across the district. My complete schedule for the week is on listed below. You can also track updates on my website [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1594e9c542&e=1090c5c412).

It’s only three weeks until the primary election and mail in ballots are already being distributed. Thanks for your continued support to Keep America Free!

Sincerely,

---
|
---
| [Donate to Kevin's Campaign](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=6aaa086325&e=1090c5c412 "Donate to Kevin's Campaign")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d00f51e9b8&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | **Yard Signs are In!**
If you would like to show your support for Kevin Dellicker by displaying a Dellicker for Congress Yard Sign, please email: [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer) or click on the "Volunteer" button below.
---
| [Volunteer](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=2601d8eccf&e=1090c5c412 "Volunteer")
---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| Susan and I participated in the Bright Hope Pregnancy Centers Walk for Life on Saturday in Bethlehem Township. Bright Hope works to help women choose life for their unborn children when faced with unplanned pregnancies.

I’m often asked about my position on abortion, and I get some tough questions. I don’t arrive at my Pro-Life positions based on polls or politics, but by moral conviction, legal imperative, and scientific facts. Here is my position:

I support protecting all unborn children regardless of how they are conceived. I would vote to exempt rape and incest if required to pass legislation that protects unborn children. I support an exemption to save the life of the mother.

I want to pass legislation to protect unborn children, but I also want to change hearts and minds. That’s why honest, productive discussion is so important. My goal is to reach a point where public opinion is firmly Pro-Life, abortions are a thing of the past, and all human life is protected.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5018cd3ee7&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| Here’s an idea that will create American jobs and defund our enemies at the same time. When I get to Congress, I’ll propose a capital gains tax holiday for individuals and certain businesses to liquidate Chinese and Russian assets and reinvest the proceeds at home. Many Americans are appalled to learn that their mutual funds are filled with holdings tied to autocrats and communists, especially funds that invest in emerging markets and international equities.

I want to place warning labels on mutual funds that invest in our enemies and let people liquidate those assets without paying additional tax. Let’s stop investing in Russia and China and start creating local jobs for local workers.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b397f5ba72&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c4b7b5165b&e=1090c5c412)
---
| I’ve been named a “recommended candidate” by the Firearms Owners Against Crime. The FOAC describes themselves as “Pennsylvania Gun Owners Defending the Constitution.” That's me too. In Congress, I’ll be a resolute defender of our 2nd Amendment rights. Thanks to the FOAC for your work to protect freedom and for your strong statement in support of my campaign.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4f20d30118&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")

Thanks to the FOAC for your work to protect freedom and for your strong statement in support of my campaign. | "Learn More" | | | Kevin Dellicker in the Community Monday, 04/25: Volunteer Meeting 7:00 PM | Gin Mill, Northampton, PA Tuesday, 04/26: Emmaus High School Student Forum 2:30 PM | Emmaus, PA Tuesday, 04/26: West End Republican Club | 7:00 PM Cherry's Family Restaurant, 539 Interchange Road, Kresgeville, PA Wednesday, 04/27: Door to Door Location To Be Determined Thursday, 04/28: Ramadan Event, 7 PM Jesus Son of Mary Mosque, 6635 Tilghman Street, Allentown Friday, 04/29: Door to Door Location to Be Determined Saturday, 04/30: Shield of Truth Network Spring into Action Rally | 1 PM 2799 Gerryville PIke, Pennsburg, PA 18073 Sunday, 05/01: Jacobs Church, New Tripoli | 10:15 AM This is not a campaign event. Kevin will be delivering the sermon. All are welcome to attend. Email kevin@dellickerforcongress.com with questions or Visit our page: or Find us on Facebook: | | Get Involved! Please consider volunteering to help his campaign or making a donation to help him spread the message. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
Reporting deadline is rapidly approaching.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541623/342042942/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=)
Hey Team,

Maggie and the entire team have been hard at work all over the state this month – from big community events to stopping by local mom-and-pop shops to check in on local small business owners. We’re out talking to the people of New Mexico every day because we believe when our voters are engaged in their government, our state just works better for everyone.

Next week is an important fundraising deadline for us. On May 2, we’re facing a state reporting deadline. That means everyone will be able to see our numbers, and the amount of money we raise now will signal how much grassroots strength we have going into the primary.
[**_That’s why I’ve set a goal for us to raise $3,000 in grassroots fundraising by next week. I’m asking you, team, will you be one of the first donors to move us closer to that goal by giving $5 now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541624/342042943/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541626/342042945/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N_EB15&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=)
