[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541630/342042949/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N_EB35&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=) [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541632/342042951/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N_EB50&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=) [Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541634/342042953/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N_EBother&express_lane=true&amount=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=)
I see how hard Maggie works for the people of New Mexico and how voters respond to her at the doors.

But this is going to be a big year for anti-government, anti-voter rights candidates on the ballot. We can’t afford to ease up or let our guard down.
[**_We can’t let the Big Lie take over New Mexico. Voters trust our elections because Maggie has always put transparency and accessibility first. Let’s keep it that way →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541636/342042954/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=)
With your help, we can maintain our momentum and make sure New Mexico continues to be a bastion for voting rights.

Forward,

Dylan McArthur
_Campaign Manager_
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44541638/342042957/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220425ReportDeadline_EOM_DM_90DO_7_NG_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmMxNjhlOS1jOWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdd1PdKppkVUEpe-V7mQePcvYi95VsCzb8jjiQoJif4=)**_

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: My oath to serve you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b4580dbf3d62456e925aa0ab6ca4cc93&_e=dXSniU7RAwg1efkaeF53zKoySkc4gxpUdUj2AiEMwrozxcXi_bkcH3KTS3gazT71nqyiSd-O6C7ADmH590mhA4apqDkkqFJ3FdKnuHkN7wK50IUY8qWQCIbFfAxsX1dhr2n5RmmtNELaBEpPfkZ0MLAjF2V4dEgMhY5b89EUe9oJRfU1bXeAqWNU-EFuzTjXhaYks26krXPPaRQxX6ev9uEhlpQAVOeg7BDha3up44sucrXd5Gx4lNk6Yx3y5RTbMoLB39rxvBsPCuVkDtDmGABjQK-3_oy0-e-IfZ7VtsqwGTULdzHZXz2p4jjY1zUOQ-dK3e4fWhxFzK4fDGhyGGGcZwKpbPJa2v2qtdq14EYn4Ia3CnMPgLtFyV3J8a3X)

---
Fellow American,

When I joined the Marine Corps in 2011, it became apparent that my calling in life was service: _Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans._

I decided there and then that my purpose was to do something that mattered – beyond myself. Something that would help people.

So, I did just that. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed.

Before you click out of this email, allow me to persuade you not to; My name is Tyler Kistner and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time today. **As a favor to a veteran, please read this entire email.**

The year that I joined the marines was coincidentally the same time that I became increasingly concerned about the direction our country was headed towards.

_Politicians that only served themselves._

_A currency that was becoming meaningless due to inflation._

_Restrictions enforced by unelected bureaucrats._

I’m 34 years old; a husband and a father to two beautiful children. I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s **because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes** in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election.

[**When I decided to run for Congress the first time, I knew things would be tough.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b4580dbf3d62456e925aa0ab6ca4cc93&_e=dXSniU7RAwg1efkaeF53zKoySkc4gxpUdUj2AiEMwrozxcXi_bkcH3KTS3gazT71nqyiSd-O6C7ADmH590mhA4apqDkkqFJ3FdKnuHkN7wK50IUY8qWQCIbFfAxsX1dhr2n5RmmtNELaBEpPfkZ0MLAjF2V4dEgMhY5b89EUe9puvdtsaBszgnAhCq9oGBk4T0EbdoyyekkzkIs7y3JvajpuX4f7OANHZkctIsh6UrQdeR0JMErsmvOoEk-oCuCFwzrJ2bTSw-uiDfNmaEA0uzdxZ8d9a0RRJuF4Zv5Wx4i4Ez1-Q_vfOp13z_qfEsmPZXBrmmRtCOSaBeKhYKmBLo5k2oxT-exb5Nsx5jzC3oiEwblVr6DX2NvsorKNG4o5) I didn’t have the resources, knowledge, or background in politics. Heck! I didn’t even have a campaign manager. But as it turns out, other Americans were on the same page as me – we didn’t need another self-serving politician in Washington! My message resonated with people, and we ran a historic campaign, losing to a well-funded Democrat by just 2%.

I’m running to unseat the same Democrat once again – and like last time, she’s very well-funded. In fact, [**her latest report to the Federal Elections Commission indicated she has more than $3 million to use in attacks against my campaign.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b4580dbf3d62456e925aa0ab6ca4cc93&_e=dXSniU7RAwg1efkaeF53zKoySkc4gxpUdUj2AiEMwrozxcXi_bkcH3KTS3gazT71nqyiSd-O6C7ADmH590mhA4apqDkkqFJ3FdKnuHkN7wK50IUY8qWQCIbFfAxsX1dhr2n5RmmtNELaBEpPfkZ0MLAjF2V4dEgMhY5b89EUe9pQxIUL8Xezw1Tkgm0aUn8Ls0g2VoZ9XFHrgcD2apB-u8xjCkODNITHSIAZV9Q8y8njxCbbwnTwyJQ54ffxY_eFoTzrzMDdd2fh9akwI9gxPYzXkM43WmN7ZfGFJCBaqwboR-7h0GGGw-lhCLi4VjDpAD_vNCQkk1p96Yb9pUAUzYedbHxWpXlgXWfsFuPP8w41U1K2czPTO_f8ZoCUaKjt)

[**In a district with as many Republican voters as Democrats, this race could go either way. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. clean_body: I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. | Fellow American, When I joined the Marine Corps in 2011, it became apparent that my calling in life was service: Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans. I decided there and then that my purpose was to do something that mattered – beyond myself. Something that would help people. So, I did just that. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed. Before you click out of this email, allow me to persuade you not to; My name is Tyler Kistner and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time today. As a favor to a veteran, please read this entire email. The year that I joined the marines was coincidentally the same time that I became increasingly concerned about the direction our country was headed towards. Politicians that only served themselves. A currency that was becoming meaningless due to inflation. Restrictions enforced by unelected bureaucrats. I’m 34 years old; a husband and a father to two beautiful children. I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. I didn’t have the resources, knowledge, or background in politics. Heck! I didn’t even have a campaign manager. But as it turns out, other Americans were on the same page as me – we didn’t need another self-serving politician in Washington! My message resonated with people, and we ran a historic campaign, losing to a well-funded Democrat by just 2%. I’m running to unseat the same Democrat once again – and like last time, she’s very well-funded. In fact, The Marines taught me to never give up and that everything is achievable if one works hard enough for it. Over the past two years I’ve laid in bed wondering what might have been if I had an adequately funded campaign. I’ll never know. I do know that I’m running against the same Democrat who beat me in 2020 and this race is likely going to be even closer than the one from two years ago. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: I’d hate to get so close to victory again and run out of money just before Election Day. I don’t trust the current politicians leading this country to do what is best for my children, or yours. Here’s what I do trust: Today, I’m asking for your help – because I know that this mission will take a strong team, and that no man can win alone. I’m never going to be the loudest conservative in the House – nor the most colorful – but I’ll put my head down and work diligently to get the work of the people done. Isn’t that worth something anymore? I know that service starts with protecting our nation and putting law-abiding citizens first – not opening our border, defending criminals, and defunding the police. In 2011, I took an oath to defend our nation, and I intend to keep that promise. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. | Tyler Kistner * Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: We weren’t sure what to expect...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
When we launched this campaign nearly a year ago, we weren’t sure what to expect.
#

When we launched this campaign nearly a year ago, we weren’t sure what to expect.
Cheri promised to reject corporate PAC money knowing it could hurt our fundraising – but also knowing that was the right way to run a campaign focused on the people. It’s a big deal in a race where GOP super PACs have already committed to spending at least $40 million.
North Carolina has never seen a nominee for U.S. Senate like Cheri.
But we knew we had to try something new to win in North Carolina — as Cheri has done statewide twice before. So Cheri put her faith in this grassroots team and the people of North Carolina and launched this campaign.
The response was immediate and overwhelming. Right after Cheri announced, Sonya, a teacher from Charlotte, chipped in $5. Then Catherine from Boone, a health care worker, made a $20 recurring contribution, and moments later, Anna, a social worker from Durham, gave $50... and we were off.
But now, we are facing another important challenge in just two days: our official pre-primary FEC deadline. We haven’t reached our goal yet, so we need a lot of people to pitch in today.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to our campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal before our FEC deadline? As you can see, when each of us plays a role, it adds up in powerful ways.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-1-t1&refcode2=774.357359.5-E8UI&t=1&akid=774%2E357359%2E5-E8UI)

| | Derek, I wanted to provide an update on some important job-creating legislation I’m working on in the Senate. This is probably one of the wonkier emails I’m going to send you, but it’s about a subject that is critical to both our economic and national security, and I want to make sure my friends and supporters know what I’m working on. The truth is, the United States has allowed China and other countries to out-invest us in the manufacturing and innovation sectors. A key area – semiconductor manufacturing – has been especially challenging for our manufacturers and our economy at large to overcome. That’s why I sponsored a bipartisan bill called the _America COMPETES_ Act. It will deliver a record $52 billion investment in emerging tech manufacturing, like semiconductor production. This historic investment would be felt across the innovation economy and would be a true game changer for Americans manufacturing everything from airplanes to smart phones to household appliances and more. Moreover, it would be a major incentive for semiconductor manufacturers to produce their products domestically. For Virginia and the rest of the country, that would mean good-paying jobs and a stronger supply chain. We can’t afford to miss this opportunity. Already, we’ve passed versions of this legislation in both the House and the Senate, but we still need to reach a final agreement reconciling the versions before it can become law. And I’m pleased to share with you, Derek, that I’m joining the conference committee tasked with negotiating this final deal on our key bipartisan economic competitiveness legislation and getting it to President Biden’s desk. We can’t let this moment go to waste. Derek. I’m committed to getting this done and I look forward to sharing more details with you all as we advance this legislation and get it signed into law. Thank you, Mark **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44549682/342079121/452523800?refcode=mw_em_220425_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWVlZjNkMC1lY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nas0JjCcAoNOj87xAXcVsaDhCPrtRdyimWYjclDh52s=)**

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44549686/342079210/-714857058?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220425patientpartisanship_DKJ_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODc3YzA0Mi1lZGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vw-wAuLj2MUO9Qe06oiYiSWDHrpSec-Z4hIowPvCwJ8=)

**Friends, when I’m treating a patient, I don’t ask if they’re a Democrat or Republican, Green Party or Libertarian. I just ask how I can help.** Because when you’re in need, you deserve to have an advocate, no matter who you voted for in an election. As a doctor, I’m that person for my patients. And as a Congressman, I’ll be that person for all of my constituents. The outrageous cost of prescription drugs doesn’t impact just one political party. The forest fires and smoke-filled air threatens us all. _**I’m a proud Democrat, but as a representative, my office will be open to all CA-03 residents.**_ I pledge to always listen, and to be available. Unlike our last Congressman, I won’t cancel town halls to avoid tough questions. I’m putting myself forward for a role to serve, and if you hire me, I will strive to do right by you and the serious responsibility that comes with it. clean_body: Can you put one up in your front lawn? | | Hey Peter, Our yard signs are here! Can you put one up in your front lawn? | Do you believe in the promise of America? Do you want to put our country back on track? If the answer is YES–Will you support my campaign by displaying a yard sign? We are days away from the May 17 primary, and I need your help to spread the word that I’m the Guy to beat Chrissy Houlahan. Together we are going to give Chester and Berks counties the representation they deserve! Thank you, Guy Ciarrocchi | | | ---|---|--- | | | | PAID FOR BY OUR GUY FOR CONGRESS Our Guy For Congress, P.O. Box 515, Glenmoore, PA

I told 45 he could count on us.
Let's rise to the occasion, answer Trump's call, and defend our movement!

body:
This is the home stretch. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542157/342045391/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2MWQ5MC1jY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSC-sjlrIBMOGdGVo0sdLakM1wg_qE6X867BmGG7ok=) Friend,

Ohio is home. It’s where I was born and raised – where Dena and I chose to put down our roots and raise our son.

Once upon a time, it was also a state that produced presidents and astronauts and automobiles. It was a state that led the nation in manufacturing – one where innovation thrived and a middle-class, working family could count on a good living.

But years of Republican control in our state have seen our state driven into a ditch, and frankly, I’m fed up. The GOP, under Mike DeWine, has looked out for itself and its special interest donors over and over – even at the expense of Ohio taxpayers, as was revealed in a $64 million bribery scandal.

Enough is enough, and what our state needs most right now is a clean slate – a fresh start, a comeback. Teresa and I can bring that comeback to our state in November, but first, we have to clear this primary. We have to knock on every door, make every phone call – anything to reach every voter. **And friend, we can only do that if you stand with us every step of the way, especially now in the eleventh hour.**

That’s right – our primary is a week from tomorrow, which means this is it. This is the home stretch. What our team is able to achieve this next week could determine the next four years of Ohio’s future, and if we ever needed your support, it’s right now, friend.

[**This is our last big push before the primary, and we need the strongest Democrats in Ohio, the ones who’ve decided they’re fed up and want change, to step up right now. If that’s you, please, rush a donation right now to help Teresa and I deliver it this November >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542158/342045392/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2MWQ5MC1jY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSC-sjlrIBMOGdGVo0sdLakM1wg_qE6X867BmGG7ok=)

Thanks for all your support so far. Now, let’s get our hands dirty – we’ve got work to do.

John Cranley **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542159/342045393/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2MWQ5MC1jY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSC-sjlrIBMOGdGVo0sdLakM1wg_qE6X867BmGG7ok=)** **[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542160/342045394/817536172?recurring=true&refcode=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.70161d90-ccc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2MWQ5MC1jY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSC-sjlrIBMOGdGVo0sdLakM1wg_qE6X867BmGG7ok=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: This is the home stretch. | = Friend, Ohio is home. It’s where I was born and raised – where Dena and I chose to put down our roots and raise our son. Once upon a time, it was also a state that produced presidents and astronauts and automobiles. It was a state that led the nation in manufacturing – one where innovation thrived and a middle-class, working family could count on a good living. But years of Republican control in our state have seen our state driven into a ditch, and frankly, I’m fed up. The GOP, under Mike DeWine, has looked out for itself and its special interest donors over and over – even at the expense of Ohio taxpayers, as was revealed in a $64 million bribery scandal. Enough is enough, and what our state needs most right now is a clean slate – a fresh start, a comeback. Teresa and I can bring that comeback to our state in November, but first, we have to clear this primary. We have to knock on every door, make every phone call – anything to reach every voter. And friend, we can only do that if you stand with us every step of the way, especially now in the eleventh hour. That’s right – our primary is a week from tomorrow, which means this is it. This is the home stretch. What our team is able to achieve this next week could determine the next four years of Ohio’s future, and if we ever needed your support, it’s right now, friend. = Thanks for all your support so far. Now, let’s get our hands dirty – we’ve got work to do. John Cranley = = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

Team, It’s almost the end of April, which means **we’re coming up on yet another important fundraising deadline as we build our movement to unseat Yvette Herrell and flip NM-02 blue.[Before I ask if you can pitch in before Saturday’s deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542185/342045505/-241209467?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220425eom1_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI4ODhiMy1jY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk_jXKm5Le1p_08FVnPlY6Crdk0e5NIdga8l1nLtUcg=)**, I hope you’ll take a moment to let me explain why your contribution matters so much right now. We’re currently eight months into this campaign to give the people of NM-02 true leadership in Congress, and just over a month away from the New Mexico primary election. Since far-right Republican Yvette Herrell flipped this seat red in 2020, she has made her priorities extremely clear: buddy up with Donald Trump and his loyal supporters in the QAnon Caucus, play partisan politics, and serve the best interests of corporate CEOs and Wall Street, not the people who elected her. She’s voted time and time again against legislation that would improve the lives of so many in our district. I launched this campaign last September because I believe our district deserves better from our member of Congress: someone who will fight for more affordable healthcare and lower prescription drug prices, a higher minimum wage and greater economic opportunities, the conservation of our public lands, bold action on climate change, a stronger democracy bolstered by voting rights, and a district where all are welcome. We’ve come a long way since I first set out to run for this House seat, meeting with New Mexicans all across the district, earning numerous endorsements from local, state, and national leaders, unions, and organizations, winning a majority of support at the New Mexico Democratic Party’s Pre-Primary Convention, becoming a DCCC-endorsed “Red to Blue” campaign, and getting out into the communities to knock doors and register voters. We have just over a month left before New Mexicans make their voices heard and choose who will officially go up against Herrell in November. With your support, I know we’ll win both of these races and bring progress back to NM-02. **[But with the costs of running this campaign rising, we need more grassroots support to do it. With our next deadline approaching in five days, can you chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to support our people-powered movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44542187/342045506/-241209467?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220425eom1_gv_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI4ODhiMy1jY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk_jXKm5Le1p_08FVnPlY6Crdk0e5NIdga8l1nLtUcg=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I have bad news to share:

A super PAC just bought $215,133 of TV airtime for THIS WEEK to destroy my chances of winning.

_That’s $30,733 worth of ads a day._

I have one of the best shots in the country to win a safe-blue seat for Progressives, and they are terrified of a young, Muslim, progressive woman. [**_I only have until 11 pm today to raise $8,403 for our next ad buy to catch up. name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Proud
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
tens of thousands of people standing together for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, Medicare for All, and so much more.
#

Hey friend,
You might have seen in the news recently that one of Alex’s opponents — a self-described billionaire and defense contractor — has spent more than $2 MILLION dollars on television ads over the past couple weeks.
That is a HUGE amount of money to spend with more than a month until the primary. And based on what he’s telling the media, it seems likely he’ll spend much more than that before Election Day.
Needless to say, Alex is not a billionaire, and he will not be writing any million-dollar checks for TV ads.
Instead, we’re going to win this race by building a truly people-powered campaign. A campaign made up of tens of thousands of people standing together for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, Medicare for All, and so much more.
**We’re proud of the type of campaign we’re building together, no doubt about it. But that means that in order to match up with the billionaire spending in this race, we have to ask:**
[**Can you please make a contribution to Alex’s campaign? It’s going to take a LOT of individual donations to match up with the almost unlimited sums our opponent has to pour into this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-1-30&t=1&refcode2=760_159979_TF_dqc&akid=760%2E159979%2ETF_dqc)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-1-30&t=2&refcode2=760_159979_TF_dqc&akid=760%2E159979%2ETF_dqc)**
It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for everything you do — it means so much to Alex to be alongside you in this fight.
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=760%2E159979%2ETF_dqc)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: here’s what you won’t hear on the GOP stage tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You probably aren’t going to like what is said at tonight’s GOP debate...
#
Hey Derek,
**Tonight, for the first time, Dr. Oz and David McCormick will go head-to-head on the debate stage.**
We’re not fortune tellers, but we have a pretty good idea of what you probably *won’t* hear at tonight’s GOP debate.
→ If campaign finance reform, taxing the rich, or any other topic connected to special interests comes up, we’re sure both candidates will stay pretty quiet. Especially since both candidates are backed by corporate special interests + super PACs.
→ You’re probably not going to hear clear and unwavering support of the LGBTQ+ community. In the past, Dr. Oz has even promoted harmful (and sometimes deadly) conversion therapy for queer youth.
→ You’re almost certainly not going to hear Oz or McCormick defend a person’s right to access an abortion, and you’re definitely not going to hear them support codifying _Roe v. Wade_ to make it the law of the land.
→ It’s unlikely that they’ll bring up the ridiculously low minimum wage, let alone argue for increasing it to _at least_ $15/hour. These guys are both millionaires — we’re not even sure if they know what the minimum wage is currently. 🙄
→ And when it comes to preventing gun violence, reversing climate change, or supporting the union way of life? Well, let’s just say we don’t think we’re going to see eye to eye.
Derek, our GOP opponents may stay quiet on these important topics, but John will always be a loud + proud advocate for the issues that affect so many working people and families across Pennsylvania.
**[John Fetterman hasn’t had to evolve on the issues and you’ll always know how he’ll vote — like a Democrat. If you’re ready to flip this Senate seat blue + elect someone who will fight like hell for you and your community, please consider chipping in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220425-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220425-5529&refcode2=5529_434096_38NwHN&akid=5529%2E434096%2E38NwHN)**
**[Contribute $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220425-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220425-5529&refcode2=5529_434096_38NwHN&akid=5529%2E434096%2E38NwHN)**
Keep an eye out for our recap of tonight’s GOP debate, Derek — we can’t wait to compare our predictions with what they do and don’t say.
More soon,
Team Fetterman
P.S. We’re on the track to flip Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat as long as we keep our momentum going strong. **[Can you make your first $5 donation to help John secure the Democratic nomination once and for all on May 17?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220425-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220425-5529&refcode2=5529_434096_38NwHN&akid=5529%2E434096%2E38NwHN)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220425-5529-footer&t=1&refcode2=5529_434096_38NwHN&akid=5529%2E434096%2E38NwHN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=5529%2E434096%2E38NwHN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5529%2E434096%2E38NwHN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Slotkin
subject: What the Michigan GOP Convention tells us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220425&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220425&amount=28]
Team,
This weekend, the Michigan Republican Party held their official nominating convention at the DeVos Place in Grand Rapids, and it was a rocky gathering, to say the least. Amidst major party infighting, Donald Trump’s two endorsed candidates for Michigan Secretary of State and Attorney General secured their respective nominations among a crowded field of candidates.
The main takeaway from the convention? The Michigan Republican Party appears fractured, and Trump’s hold over the party is significant. On display at the convention were two camps: conservatives alarmed at the direction their party is headed, and then others who have chosen to fully lean into the conspiracies and the extreme rhetoric.
This division was most clearly on display when it came to relitigating the results of the 2020 election. The Trump-backed Attorney General candidate, who has made a name for himself by promoting lies about election security, prevailed in a runoff election after a day ironically filled with apparent ballot issues.
Elissa’s opponent was in the mix at the convention, and has a connection to questioning the results of the 2020 election: he was part of a small group of Michigan lawmakers that flew to Washington, D.C. in 2020 to meet with President Trump before the results were certified. Days before the January 6th insurrection, he signed on to a letter with 10 other members of the Michigan State Senate asking Congress to investigate claims of election fraud.
The Michigan GOP has officially thrown their weight behind Trump-backed candidates that peddle in division and conspiracy. Elissa’s opponent is right there in that mix, refusing to condemn false claims of fraud even as braver members of his own party — in a very public way at the convention — try to beat back the lies and move forward. Elissa is a Democrat, but knows that our country is better off when we have two parties that may have different views, but always have democracy and decency at their core.
If you support elected officials who support the most basic foundations of democracy – will you chip in to support Elissa today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220425&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220425&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

The Trump-backed Attorney General candidate, who has made a name for himself by promoting lies about election security, prevailed in a runoff election after a day ironically filled with apparent ballot issues. Elissa’s opponent was in the mix at the convention, and has a connection to questioning the results of the 2020 election: he was part of a small group of Michigan lawmakers that flew to Washington, D.C. in 2020 to meet with President Trump before the results were certified. Days before the January 6th insurrection, he signed on to a letter with 10 other members of the Michigan State Senate asking Congress to investigate claims of election fraud. The Michigan GOP has officially thrown their weight behind Trump-backed candidates that peddle in division and conspiracy. Elissa’s opponent is right there in that mix, refusing to condemn false claims of fraud even as braver members of his own party — in a very public way at the convention — try to beat back the lies and move forward. Elissa is a Democrat, but knows that our country is better off when we have two parties that may have different views, but always have democracy and decency at their core. If you support elected officials who support the most basic foundations of democracy – will you chip in to support Elissa today? [] CONTRIBUTE [] Team Slotkin [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [] and Twitter. [] Contact Elissa P.O. House Leadership PACs, special interest groups, even the ‘squad’ are all throwing Hayes lifelines to keep her in Congress. These dollar amounts are honestly quite gross. Yet, this doesn’t even represent the total amount of how much she’s raised. She raked in over $1.1 MILLION last quarter from other deep-pocketed elites! Peter, the majority of my campaign is funded through grassroots donors like yourself, and that’s why I’m reaching out. You shouldn’t have someone in office who is getting financial aid from Wall Street; it should be from our everyday supporters. | | | | | | I appreciate what you can give, George S. name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Add your name today - petition to hold politicians accountable
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44542952/342051129/-725262505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2E4NjQ3LWQyYzQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PqYpl4hRRmo0HoVeJTrpxa8zYd8SZW8Mml5hbIs5MfA=&emci=0cc0aa2e-89c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f3ca8647-d2c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) |
---|---
| | Hi Peter, We all remember when Republican lawmakers walked out to kill climate action in Oregon–how frustrating it was to see politicians walking out on their jobs, even leaving the state, and not being held to the same standards as the rest of us. By refusing to show up for work, Republican lawmakers denied quorum and prevented groundbreaking climate legislation from passing–in 2019 and 2020. They brought the legislative session to a standstill, and refused to do the jobs they were elected to do, killing incredibly important bills like the Clean Energy Jobs bill, and bills to provide wildfire relief, prevent gun violence, fund public schools, and more. It’s time to make a change and hold our lawmakers accountable. It’s time to ensure our democracy is not held hostage every time Republican lawmakers don’t get their way. OLCV is supporting a petition that will help get this issue on the ballot this fall–[**will you sign it?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44542953/342051130/-725262505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2E4NjQ3LWQyYzQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PqYpl4hRRmo0HoVeJTrpxa8zYd8SZW8Mml5hbIs5MfA=&emci=0cc0aa2e-89c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f3ca8647-d2c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) The measure will ensure that any politician who has ten unexcused absences from the job they were elected to do won’t be able to run for re-election. Ten strikes, and you’re out! There are just three easy steps to sign the **Hold Politicians Accountable** petition:
1. Go to **https://www.holdpoliticiansaccountableor.org/sign-the-petition** and click ‘Download and Sign the Petition.’
2. Print out the form, fill it out, and sign it.
3. Mail the form to **Hold Politicians Accountable P.O. Box 8338 Portland, OR 97207**.

Please [**sign the petition today**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44542954/342051132/-725262505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2E4NjQ3LWQyYzQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PqYpl4hRRmo0HoVeJTrpxa8zYd8SZW8Mml5hbIs5MfA=&emci=0cc0aa2e-89c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f3ca8647-d2c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) so we can get this on the ballot this fall! It’s past time that we hold our lawmakers accountable for showing up to work. The deadline to send in your signature is May 10th, so please don’t wait too long. We can’t do this without you! Thank you,

Lindsey Scholten
Deputy Director, OLCV |
---|---
|
|

name: Warnock, Raphael
subject: lessons from my Dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
My father taught me so much – from the meaning of hard work to the value of serving others – and I bring these lessons with me wherever I go, including the U.S. Senate.
| | |
---
My dad used to wake me up at 6 a.m. each morning and say, "Put your shoes on, son. Get ready. There's something for you to do."
He was many things throughout his life: a veteran, a small businessman, and a preacher. He spent his days fixing junk cars that other folks had discarded – and then on Sundays, he preached to folks who felt discarded.
One of my last memories of my dad was calling him the day Barack Obama was inaugurated as the 44th president of the United States. I heard the pride and joy in his voice – the ways in which he saw the arc of history bending a little closer towards justice. Two years later, my dad was gone. As the senior pastor at Dr. King's church, I had the sad duty and honor of eulogizing him.
My father taught me so much – from the meaning of hard work to the value of serving others – and I bring these lessons with me wherever I go, including the U.S. Senate. He's a big reason why I'm in this fight to build a better, brighter future for all people, not just the lucky few.
**But keeping up this fight in Washington won't be easy:_CNN_ is calling me and Senator Hassan two of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection – in races that experts say could decide Senate control. The only way we can fight back and defend our critical seats is if folks like you chip in now. **
**[That's why I'm personally asking, friend: Please, will you give $3 or more right now to help me and Senator Hassan keep Georgia and New Hampshire blue, defend our Senate majority, and build a better future for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44550769/342086240/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk940-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY5NmY4Ni1mNGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qPIBuhsy1BOYa5f-vS5ElQLXnGikhdZ43uC1mCncKY=)**

_A photo of dad and me. I was so lucky to have him in my life._
Thank you for all of your support, friend.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
Check out this video where John discusses how we built a team that's out-energized, out-organized and outworked our opponents. | | | |
---
| | |
### Redefining what a successful campaign looks like.
We're now less than 50 days away from the Primary. We’ve already contacted over 10,000 voters, raised over $100k, and have the support of over 100 local committee members.
---
| [ ](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=a5d23855b8&e=0a69e2b984 "John Isemann | Redefining what a successful campaign looks like.")
---
|
###
The Easiest Way to Help - Follow & Share on Social

[Check out this video](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=84134dd78b&e=0a69e2b984) we just released, where John discusses our campaign strategy, and how we built a team that's out-energized, out-organized and outworked our opponents.

**We're excited to keep you updated as we make our final get out the vote effort before June 7th - We'll continue campaigning in 95 towns and speaking with thousands of voters over the next month.**
---

name: Charlie Crist
subject: thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
so can I count on your support as this campaign heats up? |
---

| | Hi friend,

Can you believe it’s already April 25th? Before we know it, it’ll be Election Day, Floridians will be casting their votes, and we won’t be able to do anything else but wait for the results.

But the election isn’t here just yet — and frankly, what we do _today_ , and _tomorrow_ , and the day _after_ that will determine what happens on Election Day.

My team and I have been meeting with folks from every corner of Florida and working to earn each and every vote. But I know we can’t defeat Gov. DeSantis and build a Florida for All on our own.

**_[As the clock ticks down toward Election Day and this campaign heats up, I hope I can count on your continuing support. If you can spare a few dollars, please donate today to my campaign for governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44550935/342088806/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220425_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGZhMzllYi1mNWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hsmBYJ9oU5IdK3NE3ish7YbayeMgGPchWky1W19LG0w=)_**

Charlie

name: Laura Loomer
subject: EXPOSED: RINO McCarthy ABANDONED Trump!
body:
Did you hear the BREAKING NEWS? GOP Leader and EXPOSED RINO McCarthy, in leaked audio, to Never Trumper Liz Cheney, said Trump should RESIGN as our POTUS!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ)Did you hear the BREAKING NEWS? House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy was just caught on leaked audio telling Never Trumper Liz Cheney that President Trump should have RESIGNED as our POTUS following Janury 6th 2021!

I wish I could say I'm surprised, but . . . **I was RIGHT**!

McCarthy is an embarrassment and a traitor to the GOP, and he is as spineless as they come in this pathetic political climate.

You know me as an America First conservative, a fighter, and the woman who the Left FEARS most! That includes the Big-Tech Tyrants, the Communist Squad, and RINO POSTER-CHILD KEVIN MCCARTHY! That's why Kevin is going all in for my opponent, Do Nothing Dan Webster.

The Establishment knows I'm leading the America First [HOSTILE TAKEOVER OF THE GOP](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ). And they know that you and millions of other patriots around the nation are [ready to join me,](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ) so we can take back our party, and take back our country!

**[Chip in today and join my movement, to help me win a seat in Congress so I can take this fight directly to the Establishment in Washington!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ)**

Back in January, when I arrived at the Ritz Carlton and confronted and exposed Kevin McCarthy at his NRCC Donor Retreat, I shook his hand firmly. I didn't let go of his hand until I was done speaking . . . and continued to clench it harder and harder as I looked deep into his eyes and told him, "**I look forward to serving in Congress next year.** "

When Kevin asked me why I'm primarying Dan Webster, I returned a question, asking, "You know that Dan Webster didn't support President Trump in the second impeachment, right?"

McCarthy didn't seem to care, and he excused Webster's lack of support for President Trump and his chronic absenteeism. Now we know why! **McCarthy, the NRCC, and Webster were in with the Democrats in wanting Trump GONE!**

Yeah, you heard that right; McCarthy (who is ALL IN on my opponent) wanted President Donald J. Trump GONE! That is inexcusable, and **it 's way past time we start cleaning house in the GOP.**

McCarthy is a fake, pathetic, and weak establishment puppet. He is far from America First, and he has NEVER supported President Trump.

**I did, I do, and I will!**

It's time we elect Constitutional conservative fighters like myself who will stand up for the people they were elected to serve, not the DC Elite. Not the powerful lobbyists. Not the special interests. **We should only serve YOU!**

This is [OUR Republican Party, folks](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ).

The GOP is full of self-serving politicians who could not care less about the America First base, and **they are completely out of touch with our country, our founding principles, and reality**.

We need to rid the Republican Party of these globalist, Country Club RINOs and their "let them eat cake" mentality.

They embrace turncoats and protect RINOs every chance they get, and they actively stab President Trump and the American people in the back with zero regard for the everyday working-class voter!

**America is on life support, which is why[it's time to REPEAL and REPLACE Republicans who have turned their back on us](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ)!**

And that's exactly why I'm running against RINO incumbent Daniel Webster in Florida.

He's one of them, and I'm one of you**. . . are you in?**

[Donate here and join the Hostile Takeover of the GOP!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/sMk7X6J2PG763zrgfvyrGm7Q/cbIPxX1HpzTC3HNlZt6pJQ)

Thanks so much for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Social Security 2100: A Sacred Trust makes urgently needed improvements to the program and protects it long-term.
#
Peter,
We have a chance to protect and expand Social Security, the most important anti-poverty program in America. Pramila is advocating for Democrats to do just that, and right away.
**Social Security 2100: A Sacred Trust makes urgently needed improvements to the program and protects it long-term.** The bill would expand Social Security benefits by ensuring millionaires and billionaires are paying their fair share into the program.
Americans depend on Social Security and we must strengthen the program while we have the majority in Congress. **Can you help Pramila build critical support for this bill so it gets a vote in the House and Senate?**
[**Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of Social Security 2100: A Sacred Trust today. Together we can strengthen the social safety net in America.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/social-security-2100/?source=em20220425-1214&t=1&akid=1214%2E420207%2EEWNEBH)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/social-security-2100/?source=em20220425-1214&t=2&akid=1214%2E420207%2EEWNEBH)**
The bill would:
* Increase retirement, disability, and dependent benefits
* End the 5-month waiting period for disability benefits
* Improve benefits for public servants, including teachers
* Extend benefits to students
* And much more

But like many policy proposals that are good for the people, it won’t pass without a fight. Millionaires and billionaires, and their GOP allies, will lobby against this bill.
Right now, the wealthy in America stop paying Social Security taxes on their income at $400,000 earned per year. So the richest Americans are not paying the same percentage into the critical anti-poverty program as the vast majority of folks in this country.
It needs to stop and we need to fight for these changes alongside Pramila.
[**Peter, become a citizen co-sponsor of this major Social Security bill today. Building a social safety net for the 21st century is a huge task, and this bill will go a long way towards that goal.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/social-security-2100/?source=em20220425-1214&t=3&akid=1214%2E420207%2EEWNEBH)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/social-security-2100/?source=em20220425-1214&t=4&akid=1214%2E420207%2EEWNEBH)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220425-1214-footer&t=5&refcode2=1214_420207_EWNEBH&akid=1214%2E420207%2EEWNEBH)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Earlier today, news broke that Marjorie Taylor Greene texted Trump’s Chief of Staff asking him to declare martial law.
#
Derek —
Earlier today, news broke that Marjorie Taylor Greene texted Trump’s Chief of Staff asking him to declare martial law.
She said, “In our private chat with only Members, several are saying the only way to save our Republic is for Trump to call for “Marshall (sic) law.”
You’ll recall just last week while on the witness stand, under oath, she said she never recalled calling on the president to declare martial law.
Here is the truth. You know, we know, and everyone outside the insurrection caucus knows it: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene is a danger to our country.
She incited violence at the Capitol and she asked the president to declare martial law to overturn an election result she didn’t like.
At VoteVets we are working hard to defeat members of the Insurrection Caucus (Greene, Boebert, Cawthorn, Biggs and more) and to make sure their ranks don’t grow. But we can’t do it alone:

name: George Bochetto
subject: Tonight's Debate
body:
|
---
Peter, This evening, on broadcast stations across Pennsylvania, Nexstar Communications is staging a debate between certain Republican primary candidates for the United States Senate.

Unfortunately, I was not invited. Nexstar chose to resort to an out-of-date poll (with a small sample and a large margin of error) to determine that our campaign would not be extended an invitation to participate. While I am disappointed with the anti-democratic decision of the organizers, we must recognize that politics is a contact sport. Anyone who enters the fray must know and understand the dynamics of campaigning. Often, politics can be unfair and involve big-money influences and back-room deals, but we cannot cry in our soup - we must carry on fighting the battles worth fighting.

**I got into this race because I am deeply concerned about the erosion of the values and institutions in our Country.** Movements like “Cancel Culture,” “Defund the Police,” and “Critical Race Theory,” to mention just a few, are appalling affronts to our basic freedoms and Constitutional Rights, and if carried out, will bring down the greatness and promise this Country has always offered its citizens.

[ ](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18S1XtC6E9JzsjRStvyZwwfQ&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_nexstar&n=1) America has never been perfect, and reform of our racial practices, criminal justice systems, and educational opportunities are important, but the proposals of the “extreme left” and “woke” advocates are destructive, un-American, and dangerous to a free society.

No society can exist without police protection and public safety. No educational system can thrive teaching our children to hate our parents and regard them as racists white-supremacists. And no cultural heritage is safe if we simply allow mobs to tear down statues and cancel holidays.

I entered the race for United States Senate to stand up for all of us who work hard, pay our taxes, respect the rule of law, and who want our children to have the best possible opportunities to succeed in life. **I am running to protect our sacred Constitutional rights, promote prosperity and economic independence, and to be a voice for families and religious freedom in America. To not stand up is, in my view, tantamount to surrendering. It simply is not within me to do so.** [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18S1XtC6E9JzsjRStvyZwwfQ&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_nexstar&n=2)
**These are the reasons I entered the race, and I am proud of the race we have waged**. I will continue to fight in this Primary to become your next United States Senator, and thereafter fight in whatever way I can to advance the principles and ideals we share. I will not be deterred by arbitrary exclusion from any debate. **This is what I believe, and why I will continue to fight like hell**.

[](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18I_MJcBlHlgF-q6xyBvXftg&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_nexstar&n=3)
Thank you for your friendship and support! George Bochetto
Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_nexstar&n=4).
clean_body: | Peter, This evening, on broadcast stations across Pennsylvania, Nexstar Communications is staging a debate between certain Republican primary candidates for the United States Senate. Unfortunately, I was not invited. Nexstar chose to resort to an out-of-date poll (with a small sample and a large margin of error) to determine that our campaign would not be extended an invitation to participate. While I am disappointed with the anti-democratic decision of the organizers, we must recognize that politics is a contact sport. Anyone who enters the fray must know and understand the dynamics of campaigning. Often, politics can be unfair and involve big-money influences and back-room deals, but we cannot cry in our soup - we must carry on fighting the battles worth fighting. I got into this race because I am deeply concerned about the erosion of the values and institutions in our Country. Movements like “Cancel Culture,” “Defund the Police,” and “Critical Race Theory,” to mention just a few, are appalling affronts to our basic freedoms and Constitutional Rights, and if carried out, will bring down the greatness and promise this Country has always offered its citizens. America has never been perfect, and reform of our racial practices, criminal justice systems, and educational opportunities are important, but the proposals of the “extreme left” and “woke” advocates are destructive, un-American, and dangerous to a free society. No society can exist without police protection and public safety. No educational system can thrive teaching our children to hate our parents and regard them as racists white-supremacists. And no cultural heritage is safe if we simply allow mobs to tear down statues and cancel holidays. I entered the race for United States Senate to stand up for all of us who work hard, pay our taxes, respect the rule of law, and who want our children to have the best possible opportunities to succeed in life. I am running to protect our sacred Constitutional rights, promote prosperity and economic independence, and to be a voice for families and religious freedom in America. To not stand up is, in my view, tantamount to surrendering. It simply is not within me to do so. These are the reasons I entered the race, and I am proud of the race we have waged. I will continue to fight in this Primary to become your next United States Senator, and thereafter fight in whatever way I can to advance the principles and ideals we share. I will not be deterred by arbitrary exclusion from any debate. This is what I believe, and why I will continue to fight like hell. Thank you for your friendship and support! George Bochetto Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States

name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: Let’s talk about Title 42 →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We don’t need to elect another Democrat who will bend to the will of the GOP and prejudice.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220425-997-footer-ak&t=2&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)
Hey,
You might have seen Title 42 in the news recently – it’s an emergency public health measure related to COVID to temporarily halt asylum seekers. The CDC and the Biden administration want to end Title 42 next month.
**Donald Trump was in Ohio this weekend and says he wants to keep Title 42. Guess who agrees with Trump? Tim Ryan.**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32783?t=3&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)
Tim Ryan says _“the administration’s decision to roll back Title 42 is wrong and reckless.”_
Now here’s the truth. Title 42 is a policy that has blocked people fleeing from wars, genocide, political repression, and persecution from lawfully applying for asylum at the U.S.-Mexico border.
The CDC says we don’t need the policy anymore, so why the rallying around keeping Title 42 in place? **Tim Ryan and other so-called “Moderate Democrats” are disingenuously framing Title 42 as an immigration border control measure, rather than a public health issue, and perpetuating a racist double standard for asylum seekers at the southern border.**
[**_Can you chip in $5 to send Morgan to the Senate where she’ll proudly stand by the Biden administration and fight for what’s right?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32783?t=4&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32789?refcode=em20220425-997&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)**
We don’t need Democrats in the Senate who will fall for the GOP’s dog-whistle politics. This is hugely disappointing and disturbing. With a razor-thin Democratic majority, every Democratic vote counts. We don’t have room for “Moderate Democrats” who will side with GOP conservatives when push comes to shove.
Ohio deserves a Senator who will be on the right side of history.
Ending Title 42 is an urgent issue and it can’t wait. [**_Donate $5 today to elect a Senator who will fight back against discrimination and support progress — not block it._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32783?t=24&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)
Thank you for your support,
Team Morgan Harper
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220425-997-footer&t=25&refcode2=997_90090_Z3AHnQ&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=997%2E90090%2EZ3AHnQ)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Kevin McCarthy is a liar. Plain and simple.
body:
All McCarthy cares about is power -- even if it comes at the cost of the truth, country, and our democracy. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. In a moment, I'm going to ask you for a donation of **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551193/342095098/-674430938?refcode=em-4.25.22-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGE4ZWU4ZS1mOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lp5wZvIX50WuUyJ3CG0cAcxw50Xo15IwDJKQCBSAbWM=)** to oust Kevin McCarthy from the halls of Congress forever. McCarthy has been on the hot seat this week, so I hope you'll let me explain why this request is so urgent.

Let's recap:

As you know, Kevin McCarthy has long defended Trump's actions after Jan 6th. He called the Democrats' investigation a witch hunt, and tried to shut it down at every turn.

**This week, reports emerge that McCarthy privately planned to call on Trump to RESIGN after Jan. 6th. He (of course) denied the allegations, but the audio recordings tell exactly what he said to colleagues – _“My recommendation is that he should resign.”_**

McCarthy lied -- plain and simple. He did it to cover for Trump, and he did it to keep his chances of becoming Speaker of the House alive. All McCarthy cares about is power -- even if it comes at the cost of the truth, country, and our democracy.

**[We're coming up $11,013 short of our weekly goal to DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy. That means we need to see A TON of supporters chip in for a grassroots donation. I've been following McCarthy's career for sometime now.

_**I can say that this is one of the most disgusting acts he's done as our representative.**_

While our Central Valley community is being left behind, Kevin McCarthy is laying waste to our democracy so he can stand on top of the rubble. It's sickening, friend, and we here in CA-20 will not stand for it.

**If everyone reading this email chips in $10 right now, we'd hit our goal instantly and CRUSH McCarthy. We can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team:**

**[Can you chip in $3 before 11:59 PM to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551201/342095106/-674430938?refcode=em-4.25.22-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGE4ZWU4ZS1mOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lp5wZvIX50WuUyJ3CG0cAcxw50Xo15IwDJKQCBSAbWM=)**

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: 🏞 It's a beautiful day! 🏝
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
Friend —
Earth Day may have been officially last week, but Earth Day should really be every day... especially in this beautiful state of ours! From our beautiful coastlines to our shining mountains, California has so much to offer.
That's why preserving our wild spaces will be one of my top priorities in the California State Assembly.
But just celebrating our beautiful outdoors isn't enough. I'll also make sure we're investing in clean energy solutions, holding corporate polluters responsible, and making our parks accessible for everyone .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_042522_EOM_A [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_042522_EOM_A]
I spent 12 years holding corporate polluters in San Diego neighborhoods accountable. I promise to bring that exact same commitment to Sacramento.
I have a BIG end-of-month fundraising deadline in just five days. Will you help my campaign hit our goal so I can keep fighting for environmental justice and green solutions? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_042522_EOM_A]
Thank you!
-- Georgette
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_042522_EOM_A [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_042522_EOM_A]
http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly [http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly] http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80 [http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80] https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us.
Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race.
Can you give now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_Footer]
Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
Georgette Gómez
5445 Madison Avenue
Sacramento, CA 95841
United States

name: Matt West
subject: My opponent has only 12 donors from Oregon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Fight against billionaires buying elections. | Friend, I’m so proud of the grassroots movement we’ve built. With hundreds of Oregonians supporting my campaign, we are within striking distance of winning our primary.
But not all of my opponents care about representing everyday Oregonians. Carrick Flynn, my billionaire-backed opponent, has _**less than a dozen**_ donors from Oregon.
_**[Grassroots support like yours is the backbone of my campaign. subject: Important: Happening THIS WEEK!
body:
The primary election is just weeks away. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d8acffaf8915/important-happening-this-week?e=7e91be8cad)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=9c138b4d96&e=7e91be8cad)
---

| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=fcf24ce71b&e=7e91be8cad)

| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=b57d557eaa&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | | | | | | | Dear Friends,

We all know that Oregon is in crisis. But the last year of campaigning across the entire state has left me even more optimistic about our future. Oregonians are fired up and ready to restore balance to our state government. _**And that process begins in earnest THIS WEEK when ballots drop!**_

Everything we've worked toward in the last year is coming to a head, and I'll need you behind me to make it through this crowded primary and _defeat the Salem politicians who will only bring us more of the same failed leadership._

There are plenty of **FREE** ways you can help out the campaign. _From hosting a lawn or field sign, telling your friends and family about our grassroots campaign, or staying up to date on our social media, there are plenty of easy ways to help us keep the momentum on our side._

---
| [Get Involved!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=991bc23f8b&e=7e91be8cad "Get Involved!")
---
| | | If you're as excited as I am about the prospect of flipping our state RED this November, [will you help me finish this race strong](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=212f96ca04&e=7e91be8cad)[ in the last few weeks before the primary](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=8d6ae19b43&e=7e91be8cad)?

Thank you for your support,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

**[P.S. Chipping in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign will help us reach the many undecided voters in this race!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=bffdd79a4d&e=7e91be8cad)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Weekly Update, Backroom Deals, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Throughout my lifetime of service, I’ve always been a straight shooter. I’ll tell you where I stand on issues. | | | |
---
| | |
### Convention, Backroom Deals and More
---
|
---
| Peter:

I’m coming off a great weekend in Grand Rapids at the Michigan Republican Convention. Met a lot of great folks, did a number of media interviews, and basically did a lot of campaigning.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
Proud to have sponsored the "Trump Unity Bridge" at the Convention.
| |
---
Prior to the convention, I was in Lansing for a media interview where I took a picture on this deserted street.

While I am smiling, the empty storefronts and absence of employees downtown, as well as the violence and crime in our state capitol, is shocking and disappointing.
---
| My commitment to you is that as Governor, not only will I make law enforcement a _**top priority**_ to ensure our streets and communities are safe, but I will **_insist that all state workers get back in their offices._** We will stop this work from home scheme of Whitmer’s and bring efficiency and productivity to our state operations.

Throughout my lifetime of service, I’ve always been a straight shooter. I’ll tell you where I stand on issues. No bull. No expensive “spin doctors.” Just me and my common sense, conservative principles.

_I’m not one of the millionaire’s trying to buy the election_. My nose is to the grindstone and I’m earning every vote.

So when **_rumors were swirling around last week about a certain millionaire candidate_** making a secret backroom deal to influence the election, I thought we’d have a little fun. Hope you enjoy it.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=1664007779&e=0636b97700)
---
| It will take a new kind of governor to get the state back on track. I’m up for the task. Join me. You won’t be disappointed.

As always, I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT MICHAEL “CAPTAIN MIKE” BROWN](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=e9038bedf3&e=0636b97700 "LEARN MORE ABOUT MICHAEL “CAPTAIN MIKE” BROWN")

name: Petition (via Team LBR)
subject: Reigning in drug companies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
We need to lower the price of insulin and help millions of working families.
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551441/342103787/-1281563454?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551442/342103788/-1281563454?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=) Far too many Americans with diabetes face an impossible choice: pay for their insulin, or pay for other basic living essentials.

**LBR believes that _no one_ should be forced into a situation like that, and she's taken action to do something about it.**

**[Will you join LBR and sign your name to support legislation that lowers the cost of insulin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551443/342103789/-670493897?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=)** | | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551444/342103790/-670493897?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=)**
---
A few weeks ago, LBR proudly voted with her Democratic House colleagues to cap the price of insulin at $35 — making it more affordable for millions of working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551445/342103791/-670493897?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=)
We need to do everything we can to power this legislation through the Senate and to President Biden's desk.

No one should have to pay a fortune to afford life-saving medication, and the drug companies currently taking advantage of Americans need to be reigned in. This bill is a key part of how we do that.

**[So please, add your name to our petition. We need 5,000 signatures in order to amplify our call to action →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551446/342103792/-670493897?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=)**
| **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551447/342103793/-670493897?refcode=em_pet_220425ins_n_pt_actives_6_g_n_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M2MjA1NS1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfgSCjwMcMvCYr_l2aogRcyUiqfVnnD14gNM831BmBQ=)**
---
Thanks,

Team LBR
** **
