clean_body: We need to lower the price of insulin and help millions of working families. Here’s where we are. = = Far too many Americans with diabetes face an impossible choice: pay for their insulin, or pay for other basic living essentials. LBR believes that no one should be forced into a situation like that, and she's taken action to do something about it. = | | = A few weeks ago, LBR proudly voted with her Democratic House colleagues to cap the price of insulin at $35 — making it more affordable for millions of working families. = We need to do everything we can to power this legislation through the Senate and to President Biden's desk. No one should have to pay a fortune to afford life-saving medication, and the drug companies currently taking advantage of Americans need to be reigned in. This bill is a key part of how we do that. = | = Thanks, Team LBR Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. **= Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. **

subject: Urgent: Input Needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551501/342105720/2079079226?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk860-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZhZTJlNy1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7W4Pm5qlOBj0sz7VB2f1TPrtCPrAI6zA7Xq-KhGl4=&emci=41b6cce9-80bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0fae2e7-fcc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334)
Hi there, Peter, it's Abby. Just reaching out for some input on what keeps you up at night as we continue this race to finally defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley. You see, one of the biggest lessons I was taught early on in public service is that you show up, but you also listen. To win, to do this right, we need you.
There's so much at stake in this election: women's health care, prescription drug pricing, access to a living wage, protections for our unions, the strength of our democracy, affordable health care – the list goes on.** I know there is so much more that keeps America up at night.**
So-called leaders like my opponent, Sen. Grassley, aren't doing their jobs, so Iowans worry about whether our jobs are secure; whether we'll be able to afford our prescription drugs this month; whether we'll have access to the right to choose; whether we'll be able to pay for our bills, rent and new clothes for our kids this month.
In his 47 years in Washington, Sen. Chuck Grassley has forgotten where he’s come from and he’s failed to address these critical issues – the ones that matter most to families across Iowa. **Iowans deserve a senator and a working Senate that make them feel safe and help them sleep soundly.**
Tackling problems like these are why I'm running for U.S. Senate and why it's so important that I hear from people like you. You see, the only way to truly make progress on these issues is by listening to the people who are dealing with the effects – the people who are up right now worrying about them. People like you and your family. **[So please, can you spare just a minute to take my grassroots survey and tell me what you and your family are worried about? It'd mean a lot to hear from you. Your response is really, really important to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551502/342105721/2079079226?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk860-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZhZTJlNy1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7W4Pm5qlOBj0sz7VB2f1TPrtCPrAI6zA7Xq-KhGl4=&emci=41b6cce9-80bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0fae2e7-fcc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551503/342105722/2079079226?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk860-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZhZTJlNy1mY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7W4Pm5qlOBj0sz7VB2f1TPrtCPrAI6zA7Xq-KhGl4=&emci=41b6cce9-80bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0fae2e7-fcc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334)
---
Thanks for your time. I really appreciate it.

– Abby

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The most conservative Democrat in the House and Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Joe
Manchin’s PAC recently donated $2,500 to Henry Cuellar’s runoff campaign
against Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros.

It’s not a surprise that the most conservative Democrat in the Senate
would donate to the most conservative Democrat in the House. Cuellar and
Manchin are funded by Big Oil, Wall Street, and Republican mega-donors.
We’re fueled by grassroots donors like you.

If we’re going to defeat corporate Democrats in our primaries this year,
we need your help right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103914?refcode=em20220425-23039&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc ]Rush $3 to Justice Democrats right now to help us match
Manchin’s big $ donation to Cuellar. We have a live tracker to see our
progress towards our $2,500 goal »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103914?refcode=em20220425-23039&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc ]Help us raise $2,500 »

Manchin has received the most money this election cycle from the oil and
gas industry. Cuellar rakes in plenty from fossil fuel companies too. Both
corporate Democrats have spent their time in Congress, especially the last
year, blocking legislation to fight climate change.

Manchin and Cuellar were big reasons that the main plank of the Democratic
agenda — the Build Back Better Act — was weakened and then left behind.
These corporate Democrats are blocking the Democratic agenda. And yet they
still have the backing of Democratic leadership in Congress. It doesn’t
make sense.

As long as Democrats like Manchin and Cuellar remain in Congress, we will
not win the big, progressive legislation we need to make a material
difference in people’s lives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103914?refcode=em20220425-23039&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc ]Peter,
will you help us fight the corporate
Democratic Party today? Whether you can give $3, $27, or more, you
chipping in right now will help us match what Manchin’s PAC just sent to
our opponent in the runoff elections in Texas on May 24.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103914?refcode=em20220425-23039&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc ]Contribute

Together, we can win major upsets over the Democratic establishment and
rock the political world, fueled by the grassroots.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220425-23039-footer&t=1026&refcode2=23039_1203867_IlCoTc&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=23039%2E1203867%2EIlCoTc

We have a live tracker to see our progress towards our $2,500 goal » [ ]Help us raise $2,500 » Manchin has received the most money this election cycle from the oil and gas industry. Cuellar rakes in plenty from fossil fuel companies too. Both corporate Democrats have spent their time in Congress, especially the last year, blocking legislation to fight climate change. Manchin and Cuellar were big reasons that the main plank of the Democratic agenda — the Build Back Better Act — was weakened and then left behind. These corporate Democrats are blocking the Democratic agenda. And yet they still have the backing of Democratic leadership in Congress. It doesn’t make sense. As long as Democrats like Manchin and Cuellar remain in Congress, we will not win the big, progressive legislation we need to make a material difference in people’s lives. [ ]Peter, will you help us fight the corporate Democratic Party today? Whether you can give $3, $27, or more, you chipping in right now will help us match what Manchin’s PAC just sent to our opponent in the runoff elections in Texas on May 24. [ ]Contribute Together, we can win major upsets over the Democratic establishment and rock the political world, fueled by the grassroots. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Charles Booker
subject: What happened at Hillbilly Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Yesterday, we made some history,
Peter.

For the first time ever, a Black Kentuckian seeking federal office spoke
at the iconic Hillbilly Days in Pikeville, Kentucky. I am honored.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220425?refcode=em20220425-1812&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1812_346206_8_NVuu&akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu ][IMG]

It was so good to be with my family in Appalachia. This moment was proof
that we’re building a movement from the hood to the holler. Together, I
know we have the power to replace Rand Paul this election with a champion
for working families.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220425?refcode=em20220425-1812&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1812_346206_8_NVuu&akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu ][IMG]

But first we need to overcome a critical hurdle: winning our upcoming
primary.

The primary election is in 22 days. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220425?refcode=em20220425-1812&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=1812_346206_8_NVuu&akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu ]Will you chip in $22 or anything
you can today to support our people-powered campaign? Every dollar you
give helps us contact more voters from the hood to the holler so we can
grow our movement.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220425?refcode=em20220425-1812&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1812_346206_8_NVuu&akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu ]DONATE NOW →

I can feel it in my heart,
Peter. This movement is on the
verge of making history. But there’s still a lot of work ahead of us to
reach out to Kentuckians from all 120 counties and make sure we all raise
up our voices this election to vote Rand Paul out of office.

That’s why we’re driving to different parts of Kentucky and meeting voters
where they’re at. We’re dedicated to having conversations with as many
Kentuckians as we can to talk about the issues that matter most to us and
the crises our communities face. There’s so much we need to talk about
together.

Campaign stops like the one we made this past weekend are a powerful
opportunity to reach people that know our leaders have not been working
for us.

People that believe that we deserve a future where visiting the doctor
doesn’t bankrupt you, where teachers are paid what they’re worth, where
folks don’t risk their lives crossing a failing bridge. People that
believe that if we stand together, we can send a young Black man from the
hood to the United States Senate and replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220425?refcode=em20220425-1812&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1812_346206_8_NVuu&akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu ]Will you chip in $22 or anything you can so we can meet as many
Kentuckians as possible leading up to our primary election on May 17? This
campaign and all of our travels are funded by grassroots supporters like
you, Peter.

Let’s do this,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220425-1812-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1812_346206_8_NVuu&akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1812%2E346206%2E8_NVuu

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Gian DeFilippis, Team Mondaire
subject: Hi, I’m Mondaire’s Finance Director.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hey team,
Gian here, Team Mondaire’s Finance Director. Month after month, I’ve seen donors just like you chip in a dollar or two when you can, and I’m so grateful to you and this entire grassroots team for supporting Mondaire’s efforts to build a brighter future for NY-17 and our entire country.
Since taking office last year, Mondaire has fought to ensure every family has affordable housing, deliver critical COVID-19 relief, and restore balance and integrity to the Supreme Court.
Mondaire has never been afraid to stand up for what’s right, and he will continue fighting to pass more transformational legislation, but with two GOP opponents looking to undo all of his hard work in this year’s midterm elections — that will be easier said than done.
The GOP has shown that they will stop at nothing to halt our progress, and with a fragile majority in the House, we can’t take anything for granted.
**[So team, will you chip in a donation as small as $1 to support Mondaire’s fight to run a re-election campaign free of corporate PAC money? clean_body: Hey team, Gian here, Team Mondaire’s Finance Director. Month after month, I’ve seen donors just like you chip in a dollar or two when you can, and I’m so grateful to you and this entire grassroots team for supporting Mondaire’s efforts to build a brighter future for NY-17 and our entire country. Since taking office last year, Mondaire has fought to ensure every family has affordable housing, deliver critical COVID-19 relief, and restore balance and integrity to the Supreme Court. Mondaire has never been afraid to stand up for what’s right, and he will continue fighting to pass more transformational legislation, but with two GOP opponents looking to undo all of his hard work in this year’s midterm elections — that will be easier said than done. The GOP has shown that they will stop at nothing to halt our progress, and with a fragile majority in the House, we can’t take anything for granted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = So many folks are standing behind Mondaire’s work to get big money out of politics, including End Citizens United, a campaign finance reform group that recently endorsed Mondaire for his commitment to standing up against corporate interests. Our broken campaign finance system has excluded people of color, working families, and young people from fully participating in our democracy, but this diverse grassroots movement is fighting to build a more representative democracy where every American's voice is heard. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thank you for always having Mondaire’s back, Team Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Josh Riley
subject: Working families deserve a voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
I’ll never forget my first big case as a lawyer.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546455/342066130/-351331676?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ2NTcxYS1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_NpMtVj-C3MCmTTvJikGJlJhj20nl-jJEtLE4FEeag=)
---
| Peter,

I’ll never forget my first big case as a lawyer.

After I graduated from law school, I had job offers to work with the big banks on Wall Street.

I turned them down. Instead, I moved down to Florida to work for several years with the American Academy of Pediatrics on a landmark civil rights lawsuit representing children from low-income families who were unable to access the healthcare services they needed.

I argued in federal court then, and believe in my heart and soul today, that health care should be a civil right in America, not a source of corporate profits and shareholder dividends.

In Florida, our efforts set important legal precedent and made a real difference for working families — and our team was honored to receive the Thaddeus Stevens Award from the Public Interest Law Center in recognition of our work.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546456/342066131/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220425-z-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ2NTcxYS1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_NpMtVj-C3MCmTTvJikGJlJhj20nl-jJEtLE4FEeag=)
Today, the big banks on Wall Street still have a front-row seat at the table in Congress, but working families don’t.

I’m running for Congress to fix that – and put working people’s voices front and center in every conversation in Washington.

That’s why I’m not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money in our campaign for Congress, and instead relying on grassroots support to fuel this effort.

But, it also means we need a _lot more_ individual donors to step up to make sure we have what it takes to share our message with every voter.

[_**So, Peter, if you’re in this fight with us all the way, I hope you’ll pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to help us win this thing!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546457/342066132/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220425-z-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ2NTcxYS1kZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_NpMtVj-C3MCmTTvJikGJlJhj20nl-jJEtLE4FEeag=)

After I graduated from law school, I had job offers to work with the big banks on Wall Street. I turned them down. Instead, I moved down to Florida to work for several years with the American Academy of Pediatrics on a landmark civil rights lawsuit representing children from low-income families who were unable to access the healthcare services they needed. I argued in federal court then, and believe in my heart and soul today, that health care should be a civil right in America, not a source of corporate profits and shareholder dividends. In Florida, our efforts set important legal precedent and made a real difference for working families — and our team was honored to receive the Thaddeus Stevens Award from the Public Interest Law Center in recognition of our work. = Today, the big banks on Wall Street still have a front-row seat at the table in Congress, but working families don’t. I’m running for Congress to fix that – and put working people’s voices front and center in every conversation in Washington. That’s why I’m not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money in our campaign for Congress, and instead relying on grassroots support to fuel this effort. But, it also means we need a lot more individual donors to step up to make sure we have what it takes to share our message with every voter. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m so humbled by all of your support, and grateful to have you on the team. With gratitude & high hopes, Josh Riley * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. name: Team AOC
subject: Unprecedented victory for Amazon workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The unprecedented victory of these Amazon workers comes as workers across industries – from Starbucks baristas to medical residents – are organizing at a growing rate.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220425-2976-header&t=1&akid=2976%2E2526796%2EceifNJ)
Alexandria joined Senator Bernie Sanders for a visit to Staten Island, New York on Sunday to meet with workers who successfully organized the first union in the country at an Amazon facility!
They also spoke to workers at a separate Amazon facility who will be voting _this week_ on whether to join a union.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/4255?source=em20220425-2976-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=2&akid=2976%2E2526796%2EceifNJ)
**The unprecedented victory of these Amazon workers comes as workers across industries – from Starbucks baristas to medical residents – are organizing at a growing rate.**
Earlier this month, Alexandria joined Starbucks workers in Astoria, Queens to celebrate them becoming the first unionized Starbucks in New York City and the tenth election won by Starbucks Workers United.
**If you're inspired by these efforts and wondering how to organize at your own workplace, we're here to help!**
[If you as a worker are concerned about your workplace and are interested in talking to your coworkers about organizing, click here to check out our list of resources and organizing kits.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/4255?source=em20220425-2976-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=3&akid=2976%2E2526796%2EceifNJ)
Amazon, which is owned by one of the wealthiest men on the planet, reportedly spent over $4 million to defeat the union drive at the Staten Island warehouse. Yet, Amazon Labor Union, an independent union running a completely grassroots campaign, won 55% of the vote — a true testament to worker power.
The act of organizing means coming together to address issues important to you as a worker — from sexual harassment to management, workplace bullying, wages, and benefits. It's not about a single person or single store, it's about building community to improve the lives of everyone.
[Knowing when and how to organize your co-workers can be a daunting task. Click here for a list of tips, resources, and virtual trainings to help you get started in formulating a strategy and winning.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/4255?source=em20220425-2976-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=4&akid=2976%2E2526796%2EceifNJ)
Happy organizing!
Team AOC
Alexandria is stepping up for workers by fighting on the ground to keep up pressure on corporations like Amazon and Starbucks to support their workers, and in Congress to pass legislation like the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act and more.
[Can you help us keep up the fight for workers' rights by donating to Alexandria’s reelection? Any amount makes a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220425?refcode=em20220425-2976-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&refcode2=2976_2526796_ceifNJ&akid=2976%2E2526796%2EceifNJ)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220425?refcode=em20220425-2976-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&refcode2=2976_2526796_ceifNJ&akid=2976%2E2526796%2EceifNJ)**

clean_body: The unprecedented victory of these Amazon workers comes as workers across industries – from Starbucks baristas to medical residents – are organizing at a growing rate. Alexandria joined Senator Bernie Sanders for a visit to Staten Island, New York on Sunday to meet with workers who successfully organized the first union in the country at an Amazon facility! They also spoke to workers at a separate Amazon facility who will be voting this week on whether to join a union. The unprecedented victory of these Amazon workers comes as workers across industries – from Starbucks baristas to medical residents – are organizing at a growing rate. Earlier this month, Alexandria joined Starbucks workers in Astoria, Queens to celebrate them becoming the first unionized Starbucks in New York City and the tenth election won by Starbucks Workers United. If you're inspired by these efforts and wondering how to organize at your own workplace, we're here to help! Amazon, which is owned by one of the wealthiest men on the planet, reportedly spent over $4 million to defeat the union drive at the Staten Island warehouse. Yet, Amazon Labor Union, an independent union running a completely grassroots campaign, won 55% of the vote — a true testament to worker power. The act of organizing means coming together to address issues important to you as a worker — from sexual harassment to management, workplace bullying, wages, and benefits. It's not about a single person or single store, it's about building community to improve the lives of everyone. Happy organizing! Team AOC Alexandria is stepping up for workers by fighting on the ground to keep up pressure on corporations like Amazon and Starbucks to support their workers, and in Congress to pass legislation like the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act and more. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

Double down your support to defeat Henry Cuellar. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4kYsfV3El05Xi_bN7VXCML8ZxgZG2uCelA9KcygvGng72TKgQmUw5ZpqjKazvBrT_CWAdtMx30SihHrwP4zY5nIbciIIofpYVlAnrCr8WDou3b0Xqvob3gczM7eAvfaQxLOBb9eTypu5d5tl_yCoO51mjcQMf0a3gdqkiZQW_1LwP-FQ8z9hlamap2U1gzjveYIKH_BOmNISONrtzXGML9IiJnRC5F-zYuH1YK0lks7Qy3tX9o7ocTqFYpjmHAl3UTNMPT5fIN0vz5bP1OyxWYoDvv-cXbW9Tm0CwoGDlNocg/3li/T82NGJMCTR6g65_YMaACbg/h0/gQW-nHKxIjpBHf3IE1b0H3MHDsMRwCCWZoMABl_SnPo) When Jessica Cisneros first started her campaign, she made a promise to never take a dime from any corporate PACs or special interests groups. **And she’s committed to upholding that promise.**

That means our team is on high drive to fundraise as much as we can in the next four weeks until the runoff to compete with our opponent's corporate PAC donors. **And to close the fundraising gap, we’re launching a goal to raise $60,000 by midnight on April 30.** [_**Can you help us get a headstart on our goal progress by making a contribution of any amount today?**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCsGURlWJdhRTDrc9HGMcViloy6JxcYHNvo0tHoesjz9Z1ivp4TrgG-ivPmSYASSKcIm_b1uyLIhsmILdNAjA45uDXdms0xHmR-eEyfk0ka_op4l7cH7EdeBgkvc5anLP2CFWkxmwFY4OiMTG-eyBGKWAk3LBV19hUZJEcpLHSD1J-RkXCHNcFXETw0roqzKgHq34m285_2XYMt59W3Y1H0r4OMYqHPiCVeVxFrRvjw2DGpwjyPrjSJtjLTbpnY8ooIY9cewL9zVP5g5qfNHX_DpDS-ysytUPq2e5BrPle-iUh6nrjPlvB7w0E0kz0vYDRGxsAkRGUEJTkUqTtmkRhfmIiYht87cA1ObziyfuhILvKfK7QwO3e4hviQ2lqMpALvDGDH-uLir0IieAlWbQGQg/3li/T82NGJMCTR6g65_YMaACbg/h1/1caBl8C1qWSxoG2XtnjnDifgAZjqE5YOrGZq_rPW7hY) [Contribute »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCsGURlWJdhRTDrc9HGMcViloy6JxcYHNvo0tHoesjz9Y30rhtOfSBGC8aochhjtmEwUb2I97pMXzgfq3aKr35lEn_k29qrFFMR1hp9aXv_hXL9HEGT9GA8nAzIggPfnE4HAOkIufZ-ozpytjaiIWmOCyjw4bca1l3OtvXa1AXPgxrTlSgNHsWwi9iP5sKoLjSieLqO-LzvsVA9cy_jYPt_GuDELq07rKmd2PIepMKpLqPIED5_-HhrtnHR6V_7XcZFffyNWncDHe1lqpewbPsrb5tjE0RlZJrrHGuEHL2KMPET9olV8KFs8OtZJuaHZpRhVdI7yUQKl8nscBpT9QNW8kWl1dEzDSk5XIVq4Jalk0I1HbfVPS3RBcRXjgdyEgQcYZ31bm5PSR1PbqnE-dK-g/3li/T82NGJMCTR6g65_YMaACbg/h2/Ud2vQ5W76Bnu45Hgc2Nm9-0KubwGbs9DLZ0JS0dIm1E) All eyes are on the TX-28 House race. Jessica has an opportunity to defeat an incumbent and bring progressive change to South Texas. The more we raise, the more we can propel our campaign to victory. But the less we raise means we won’t be able to compete with Henry Cuellar’s corporate donors. We know that our grassroots power can beat Cuellar. In 2020, we fell just 2,746 votes short of winning and that was _after_ being outspent by $700,000.

**We can make up that difference for the runoff.** And the more we close the fundraising gap with Henry Cuellar, the wider our path to victory will be.

[_**Because Jessica isn’t accepting any corporate PAC money, we need your help to close that gap. clean_body: Double down your support to defeat Henry Cuellar. | | | When Jessica Cisneros first started her campaign, she made a promise to never take a dime from any corporate PACs or special interests groups. And she’s committed to upholding that promise. That means our team is on high drive to fundraise as much as we can in the next four weeks until the runoff to compete with our opponent's corporate PAC donors. And to close the fundraising gap, we’re launching a goal to raise $60,000 by midnight on April 30. All eyes are on the TX-28 House race. Jessica has an opportunity to defeat an incumbent and bring progressive change to South Texas. The more we raise, the more we can propel our campaign to victory. But the less we raise means we won’t be able to compete with Henry Cuellar’s corporate donors. We know that our grassroots power can beat Cuellar. In 2020, we fell just 2,746 votes short of winning and that was after being outspent by $700,000. We can make up that difference for the runoff. And the more we close the fundraising gap with Henry Cuellar, the wider our path to victory will be. Thanks, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

| Growing up, I saw firsthand the struggles facing many Arizona residents because they were also my struggles.

I grew up in Tempe. A single mother raised me. I lived in public housing. My family used food stamps. And there were times we went without health insurance.

So I know what the people of Arizona are going through. And now, I’m running to make change and create a better future for everyone in Arizona, but I can’t do it alone. [_**Will you rush a donation to our movement before it’s too late?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44546843/342067917/-1304906161?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220425-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDYzNGNkYy1lMWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPVatPVuRRi-MGkRQ-xDbPg_weO7BMQjiiommhMuxnE=)

subject: No one should be…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, I’m running for Congress because in the richest country on Earth, no one should be hungry, homeless, without healthcare, or in poverty. The planet shouldn’t be burning while corporate politicians like my opponent take money from Chevron. [**I am the ONLY candidate in my race supporting a $30 minimum wage, Medicare for All, a national jobs program, and Housing for All. Can you send a small donation now to help me win, so I can fight for that vision in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551629/342111643/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTBiYzE4My0wM2M1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RNaFSZv9LV0AEmLMx8KHBR6_rCt3RHqiQZk79f2_g0=) I co-founded Tacoma Housing Now and helped occupy empty buildings to get housing for our homeless neighbors. We got the city to add 200 shelter beds — 200 people who didn’t freeze to death that winter. As a commissioner on the Tacoma Commission on Disabilities, I revived the push for a Wheelchair Accessible Taxi (WAT) service in the city. Hundreds of thousands of dollars had been set aside for the project a decade before, but the project hadn’t moved forward. I got the city to commission a report on how to implement a WAT in Tacoma, and we just received the report. Now we know where to seek additional funding and how to get this program off the ground, so EVERYONE in Tacoma can get a taxi when they need it. I’ve gotten results as an organizer and a commissioner. Now I want to get results in Congress. Chip in here to help me win and fight for housing, healthcare, and good jobs for all: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rp-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44551630/342111644/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTBiYzE4My0wM2M1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RNaFSZv9LV0AEmLMx8KHBR6_rCt3RHqiQZk79f2_g0=) name: UPDATE: AZ Action Alert (via VPP)
subject: We begged, we pleaded, and we FAILED…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re sick to our stomachs >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-)._
---
| Yesterday, we BEGGED for Democrats to fight back for vulnerable Senators like Mark Kelly by rushing [**just $5**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10159?t=7&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-) to our EMERGENCY fund...
**BUT SADLY, ONLY [3] DEMOCRATS STEPPED UP!!**
We thought that the latest HORRIBLE prediction out of Arizona would kick-start Democrats into action...** _but we still fell $5,942 short of our emergency goal:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10159?t=8&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-) **So we’ve taken the exceedingly rare step to EXTEND our deadline to MIDNIGHT TONIGHT in order to save our fragile Senate Majority!**
[**Please, friend: We won’t get this opportunity again! Rush $5 NOW to help us hit our midnight goal to protect Democrats like Mark Kelly and SAVE the Senate! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10159?t=9&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-) **DEADLINE: EXTENDED TO MIDNIGHT TONIGHT || GOAL: $5,942** | [SAVE DEMOCRATS LIKE MARK KELLY! RUSH $5 NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10159?t=10&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-)
---

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1939%2E878179%2EPafpG-).**

name: Amanda
subject: We just left the Pinellas County Election office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
We passed an exciting milestone for our campaign | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=75a4d54d89c6434c84a029c1c163ecf6&_e=2f0rnMEKeTW6Ewq2CaLvs6sXk4vh97RxYRoT_xsA96tqugIfm-pa_-6hXUgMoH7vvXCqWvpBj05w9F0k-iwNKFwmCYlc9KX9xN0JkVE4EWWB6mVg5NgYCTAhCAqbDcDhW3NdflD9AP5E1brSamPNf28qxJiBhWiERdflEaZD-KSs46Z4VAOdrcdyNH-C6Z9Scs6nXk5_cQIYikpMG6PtB9PQTXmVP8N5anbB1vKQIOEIKt-IJeDAS4LXS2QIbMiT_DVdvKtoGPuVBues7RAIQikBhVcSB3dYRi-5pZDGxSu4tf9G6WC0Lp_pI5zlSmPRl8neYN9Bvf7lRcCmGS6WEMkhPI-jiXI4Zgn4wnKCWPmG38Jvy_FyE6Dvk0qZx2QtOU-SUnfF4wA2uTNpMlO43PGdoZpEd27PYQN5kPb58MLMMtZmEfqhPDRE3qvZXZYG6Vg8lkgXx__obrdVyQBBng%3D%3D)
---

Hey, Peter - It's Amanda with some exciting news!

We stopped by the Pinellas County Election office and dropped off all 2,500 signed petitions. **This means we are officially on the ballot for Florida's 13th Congressional District!**

### ⬇️ WATCH MY NOMINATION ANNOUNCEMENT ⬇️
[ ](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=75a4d54d89c6434c84a029c1c163ecf6&_e=2f0rnMEKeTW6Ewq2CaLvs6sXk4vh97RxYRoT_xsA96tqugIfm-pa_-6hXUgMoH7vvXCqWvpBj05w9F0k-iwNKFwmCYlc9KX9xN0JkVE4EWWB6mVg5NgYCTAhCAqbDcDhW3NdflD9AP5E1brSamPNf28qxJiBhWiERdflEaZD-KSs46Z4VAOdrcdyNH-C6Z9Scs6nXk5_cQIYikpMG6PtB9PQTXmVP8N5anbB1vKQIOEIKt-IJeDAS4LXS2QIbMiTkZ8ShZLFwforxajxpl5SoHcMpSY0y8p9RvDpEQuKp5Pz4xminiQvDyKLyuPB8op94FqBbAyioppr2462UHqC4QChx1daPNayjmaq9Ac7ChacOPo5oEFWzNa0VrEJ-SRPaQw3nt0X-6evJ0KvffMsKIZtLQG-dJN9GAJziKq0I4mS_UsLonuT9fgc9_W2wQ5adwvz5QLZHkvoLKUhkFiIyw%3D%3D)
[** ****SUPPORT AMANDA NOW**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=75a4d54d89c6434c84a029c1c163ecf6&_e=2f0rnMEKeTW6Ewq2CaLvs6sXk4vh97RxYRoT_xsA96tqugIfm-pa_-6hXUgMoH7vvXCqWvpBj05w9F0k-iwNKFwmCYlc9KX9xN0JkVE4EWWB6mVg5NgYCTAhCAqbDcDhW3NdflD9AP5E1brSamPNf28qxJiBhWiERdflEaZD-KSs46Z4VAOdrcdyNH-C6Z9Scs6nXk5_cQIYikpMG6PtB9PQTXmVP8N5anbB1vKQIOEIKt-IJeDAS4LXS2QIbMiTE-j4r7CFFsld9ShjdoO56NVjoBYRsQVvSoawc0q9Uxq2KwAmP0OntFYWJbvQPT3bB4QqKWAMnWojC10Zmo_eF5aqZkz-sK0Dj6Dz4a5SeI93QQOnPsC9ZZ9uAEFKxH-UOEJ1M9SEqnKjyoEzW8PC7EmX5olPF10w3Fcrc7hHgUDYI6WUyLyVdP0qbErW4qFm9lYBmKnRvSpZdpl9exyCNQ%3D%3D)
**Passing this exciting benchmark means we have about 120 days left until our primary and 110 days before early voting starts!**

Right now, I am the ONLY candidate - Republican or Democrat- on the ballot, _but unfortunately,_ that doesn't mean we will automatically win. More candidates will jump into the race soon, **and I need your help to stay in the lead as we head into early voting.**

Republicans are undoubtedly fighting one of the toughest battles for freedom we've ever seen. This past year and a half has shown us that our nation could be on the brink of destruction if we allow Democrats to control the House for another two years.

My family escaped religious persecution to immigrate here LEGALLY, so I can't stand by and watch that happen to our adopted home country. We passed an exciting milestone for our campaign
clean_body: We passed an exciting milestone for our campaign | Hey, Peter - It's Amanda with some exciting news! We stopped by the Pinellas County Election office and dropped off all 2,500 signed petitions. This means we are officially on the ballot for Florida's 13th Congressional District! ⬇️ WATCH MY NOMINATION ANNOUNCEMENT ⬇️ Passing this exciting benchmark means we have about 120 days left until our primary and 110 days before early voting starts! Right now, I am the ONLY candidate - Republican or Democrat- on the ballot, but unfortunately, that doesn't mean we will automatically win. More candidates will jump into the race soon, and I need your help to stay in the lead as we head into early voting. Republicans are undoubtedly fighting one of the toughest battles for freedom we've ever seen. This past year and a half has shown us that our nation could be on the brink of destruction if we allow Democrats to control the House for another two years. My family escaped religious persecution to immigrate here LEGALLY, so I can't stand by and watch that happen to our adopted home country. | | | ---|---|--- With such a short amount of time left before voting begins, we cannot miss a goal. We need every resource we can get to ensure that a true conservative takes this seat and helps take back the Republican House majority. Thanks! Amanda Makki Conservative Republican for FL-13 | Amanda Makki is an America First candidate for Congress in Florida's 13th District. A legal immigrant, attorney, and conservative national commentator, Amanda is a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that made America the greatest country in the world! ---|--- | Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6e065cf670bf49099c17f0cfa4fb13e6&_e=wz411uSbqy5cpow8YYHGEwSVVMaI_TNPjU9tI84XuKRmkoR0hw0VbVvVK26b_i8jbhl3o7mKWpSTpiekoeYQU-nJWxV7E3ZT9MRFHZMmeDwlPOBqVpMpvkcr0yXGfgPPRIRmsXLZaW6_bVXyvgfUvLzQQxL61Bw60EfwENTwz_2jzGKh1iLMOgmUYP08RwIYeUdC0j7NV2YkuNnVyRl4-hoo47zLJFBTNMypkw5umtH4PenEmMo-T8m7_5emWkKN5IhLLvOLRuTh_3N3drPYcfDbToJBj63FxUwU9HPP9vGe__HXARfJo8fvq7MFmx3hYIh-9l48xPUJWmOSpENPJ6y1xM1tmBnxuovf5ri8Iyg%3D)

Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6e065cf670bf49099c17f0cfa4fb13e6&_e=wz411uSbqy5cpow8YYHGEwSVVMaI_TNPjU9tI84XuKRmkoR0hw0VbVvVK26b_i8jbhl3o7mKWpSTpiekoeYQU-nJWxV7E3ZT9MRFHZMmeDwlPOBqVpMpvkcr0yXGfgPPRIRmsXLZaW6_bVXyvgfUvCioVcutSwFbIPP237d9hZP4kMBiu-aMmsvA-QI3yWc3jy4jwvQsTivLPp9uPdyfrzPGHWUPgX9UFMuCcpuXQF98tBRSyM93sQWeMzzCrNkvc0wpSL2i8uxAIF35DtLw3tKxBVuuq0LmHd2YTZtr-qv1KBGDaKSNp8kmIY_mlfRpV-MN55rPHJ7JgsCGW4-s6A24t6fmuoiB7n2BRXY7aYI%3D)

When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6e065cf670bf49099c17f0cfa4fb13e6&_e=wz411uSbqy5cpow8YYHGEwSVVMaI_TNPjU9tI84XuKRmkoR0hw0VbVvVK26b_i8jbhl3o7mKWpSTpiekoeYQU-nJWxV7E3ZT9MRFHZMmeDwlPOBqVpMpvkcr0yXGfgPPRIRmsXLZaW6_bVXyvgfUvBBdwrLNqu584Z3ZbMYy1Cf99c93WtVOxETeLdj5TKT3h84trFmkPGAiGZ4Jrl1KpgLgj3jeJQ8nKGORWFR5T1iGYnPVKZMyD5g3rsydnIJaT-aPPG3YywjK0eCqZ9zZMu3JV01VeqL_QmBFzCTm3S7WenvU0UTk59PtTKIO-P2fdkWUfG1RG3hPxGOjY-RvARPbZngPGVV1TS-LegKIvEE%3D)

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more. clean_body: Election day is just under a month from today and I can feel the momentum across the commonwealth! Thanks to your support we’ve been making non-stop campaign visits to local GOP Committees. I’m also pleased to announce that a fellow Trump appointee and renowned conservative author, Nick Adams, has announced his official endorsement of my campaign! I am so grateful that Nick has joined the team and lent his voice of support. With just 4 weeks left to go, our team is working harder than restore Pennsylvania and a send a true America-First conservative to the U.S. Senate. But here’s where the rubber meets the road. We cannot afford to let up for a single second between now and 8:00 pm on May 17th. I cannot thank you enough for your continued support. Yours Truly, Carla Sands President Donald Trump's Ambassador to Denmark Candidate - United States Senate P.S. We desperately need your help. Our opponents are currently caught up figuring out how to bury their left-wing past with MILLIONS of $ in television ads. While they’re busy covering their true beliefs, I need your help to share my America-First beliefs. | Paid for by Sands for Senate

subject: First bus of illegal immigrants arrived at Joe’s doorstep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We're doing everything we can to bring back Trump's border wall and reinstate his America First agenda.
**FIRST:** Biden canceled President Trump's border wall project...
**THEN:** Illegal migrant crossings from the Southern border went through the roof...
**AFTER:** Texas officials pleaded for help...
**AND:** Border agents were left defenseless...
**NOW:** Texas Governor Greg Abbott sent buses of illegal immigrants to Joe Biden's doorstep in Washington, DC.
We're doing everything we can to bring back Trump's border wall and reinstate his America First agenda. The only way we have any hope of restarting building the border wall is to get 1,500 signatures by tonight!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jenni=2C=20Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Did you see last night's debate?
body:
| | | |
---
| | | During last night’s WSB-TV debate, David Perdue hammered Brian Kemp for being a weak Governor who sold us out and cost Republicans the U.S. Senate Majority. **In case you missed it, here are three key moments from the debate: ** _**KEMP CHANGES TUNE: "THERE'S FRAUD IN EVERY ELECTION"**_ Brian Kemp has spent 18 months claiming Joe Biden won fair and square. But now, under pressure from David Perdue, Kemp is trying to change his tune admitting, “There’s fraud in every election.”

Even worse, Kemp wants Republicans to just accept the fraud, shut up, and move on. That’s outrageous. We need leaders who will enforce the law and protect our elections.

**KEMP: "I've always said there's fraud in every election."

PERDUE: "What?!"**

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=9a54b5a436&e=89fb4d5220) to watch. **_"GOVERNOR, YOUR TRUCK BREAK DOWN?"_** Over 70% of counties in Florida have formal agreements with ICE to help identify and deport illegals. In Georgia, less than 3% have that arrangement.

There are more illegal immigrants in Georgia than Arizona, and our Governor hasn’t done a thing about it, despite his pledge to round up criminal illegals in his pickup truck.

**Perdue said, "Governor, what happened? Your pickup break down?"**

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=e83f490de5&e=89fb4d5220) to watch. **_"KEEP MY POWDER DRY KEMP"_** People are being shot on the streets of Buckhead, but Brian Kemp wants to keep his "powder dry."

The only reason Buckhead wants to break off is because crime is out of control, but Kemp refuses to give the people of Buckhead a vote because he’s controlled by the corporations and the establishment in Atlanta.

**PERDUE: "Keeping your powder dry? People are getting killed. Of course they need to have this vote, and I personally support it."

KEMP: "I’m going to continue to keep my powder dry."**

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=8d85fa10f9&e=89fb4d5220) to watch.
###

name: Odessa Kelly
subject: Marsha Blackburn’s border wall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
This nonsense is just trying to get attention. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-YvbIDUWL_Ck34jrdoK3wNGbRfz6p9oLnd-kdV_ddz8dUih8uaHdR2Quj0HMZC76svgTa_v-Z69Sluk6OSsPP3Zp1-e7C4prK_wIIIFWBWmfBL9WVunX7QG0NY7bwFIzwEPJKOdSJjMpsPcp0XRaSAagXBYUtsEuRgSzg4uKWmDQm9RrmWWnoGW0lAmTg1fbv5MjLi_UPEuNIoTsafwrw4n/3li/yk7QsJo_S6y7lk90DkwKPg/h0/yOY0Vm4INdzgphDV3b4U_eWITG-0vuOmdrfzhKzHxNU) Senator Marsha Blackburn said Tennesseans want a border wall on “our southern border,” — and Peter, she probably didn’t consider how Mississippi, Alabama, and Georgia felt about it. Peter, listen, this nonsense posturing on immigration is just Marsha trying to get attention online. People like her are trying to divide us based on where we come from so they can continue cutting taxes for their wealthy friends. Folks here in Tennessee don’t need representatives trying to build GOP clout online — we need representatives who fight to make our country better for working families. Marsha Blackburn and Rep. Mark Green aren’t up for the job. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for your support! Together, Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

Thank you, Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. Now, he’s taking on the politicians in D.C. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY. Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Watch today’s debate and cheer on Malcolm:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#
Friends:
Malcolm is taking the stage soon for the next debate of our race, and we wanted to make sure you had the information on how to watch!
The debate starts at 7 P.M. and can be watched on Pennsylvania Cable Network or for free via livestream. [The stream will be available here when it begins.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lxzk5rK5lbk/?refcode2=3fd086d9-e5c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a)
**[WATCH THE DEBATE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lxzk5rK5lbk/?refcode2=3fd086d9-e5c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a)**
This is a critical moment for our nation, and Pennsylvania is facing an important choice in this Senate election. The majority could come down to our race.
If we’re going to finally have a government that works for working families like ours, we’ve got to fundamentally change who is in the Senate. We must win the fight to make America's basic bargain accessible to every family across this country.
Thank you for tuning in and showing your support for Malcolm and this grassroots movement today!
\- Team Malcolm
[P.S. – if you’re able to, please consider making a donation before the debate to power our fight ahead of next month’s primary. It will help us show the world that the people are with Malcolm.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44548026/342072988/-347403939?refcode2=3fd086d9-e5c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220425-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQwODZkOS1lNWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCQafPbZrlXZ3wLK2GxYhDXK1pbGFTGFVYDobz1ZWGI=)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I will never back down
body:
[****](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d358b81e61db47679047de61be235fe9&_e=fA960e44I-WHXaTinehdt-DUqxmvVpPJf4TzfgLsXspFbZypmnR0eVgVKNgmiON_CLa-YpYfOTIXUiKUMjEt4NUX6KO57kCnqA89x2sE4Q_c_iDfYPj-_azENFPoPCGp6rs2qGfXKOU20UH6LRdw1Yhq9_Z9yAzlEjHWeSuGNsrcveU-FeU3Kk2J0vc9ZF73J0LHdLgpmUUjhvoYw3s84irO-7qDPlapJQGwohq7GSIB6DYgbNK_BFzJ6K3nSxdDa-tx7aUGjMO27nM4YaISrKRJSZqUbLNpVdnKNxF_V2_1fYMMCZGNjQGUehuMxzUPgbNdTlLy0INpwgEurQWxo18LWmPFG0EWUUpLSqU3eOo02zauXLluvhjlyrWxl59-fBs-PkuUnwPN-TyfTnLAVg%3D%3D)

Peter,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d358b81e61db47679047de61be235fe9&_e=fA960e44I-WHXaTinehdt-DUqxmvVpPJf4TzfgLsXspFbZypmnR0eVgVKNgmiON_CLa-YpYfOTIXUiKUMjEt4NUX6KO57kCnqA89x2sE4Q_c_iDfYPj-_azENFPoPCGp6rs2qGfXKOU20UH6LRdw1Yhq9_Z9yAzlEjHWeSuGNsrcveU-FeU3Kk2J0vc9ZF73ejHm79YeP53SI2x-_kZKpZ3HiLe6FSSem0IevQn19e7FWqtsTLgGXn65iGb9N74stPefGus5eZ0o-ognZx-MXhTcQTCPZshDxIXoI2zbWYwjM6Ksq0St0LwGUN1p8Ln0xl_GhiSz7XF_Zdo3SOanViXT3s5P1nbYoglubbD-ZvITDNaStxtEqtcs4FC9i6mYBlNEvYZpWxR7BtZBImqNSQ%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**

clean_body: Peter, Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me. But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right. I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. Their dishonesty knows no bounds. If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. And the chances of me backing down to ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that. Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years. Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. I 'm not backing down. "" Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. **TAKING MTG TO COURT**

US Rep. **Marjorie Taylor Greene** was grilled under oath for three hours Friday on her role in January 6th — because of our members who stood up to file the initial challenge and one brave, patriotic veteran, **Michael Rasbury** working with **Our Revolution**.

Together, we’re making history — this is the first time any of the insurrectionists in office have been cross-examined. “The outcome of this case will reverberate beyond Georgia,” [CNN](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5416?t=17&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) wrote, referencing our other challenges, “and could be lodged against former Trump if he runs again in 2024.”

As a helicopter pilot in Vietnam, **Rasbury** took the same oath as Rep. Greene “to protect democracy against all enemies foreign and domestic.” He said “she has flippantly ignored her oath of office and disqualified herself from the ballot.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=18&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator **Hal Ginsberg** was in the courtroom as Greene repeated she didn’t remember saying many things, including that she opposed the peaceful transfer of power to **Joe Biden** — right before lawyers played a video of her saying just that.

Our work clearly got under the skin of **Trump** , who whined that our lawsuit has Greene “going through hell.” Our members are also taking on US Reps. **Madison Cawthorn** in NC and others who literally joined the mob on January 6th and breached the Capitol.

**Our Revolution** members are also asking secretaries of state to investigate whether **Matt Gaetz** in Florida, **Jim Jordan** in Ohio, **Doug Mastriano** in Pennsylvania, and **Dan Cox** in Maryland should be eligible for the ballot in 2022.

[The far right is going to come at us with everything they have now that our lawsuits are working. Chip in here to help us fight back and ban insurrectionists from ever running again!](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=19&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=20&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

On May 3rd, we’re holding a special **Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy** with our partners at **Free Speech for People**.

We’ll speak with the courageous **Our Revolution** members - and their legal team - who are taking the fight directly to these far-right extremists in office. **And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight!**

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=21&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**2022 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE KICKOFF!**

To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For **$10 a month** , we’ll throw in our **sticker 6-pack** , and at **$15** , you’ll get the stickers _and_ a **poster** , too. For **$27** , get both and a **tote bag** , or join at the **$50** level to **get it all _and_ a T-shirt**.

As _committed_ **Movement Builders** , we know **the real reward is taking action to make a better world** , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks.
