**NINA + THE PEOPLE vs THE MACHINE**

Billionaires, Big Oil and Big Pharma are pouring BIG money into the Ohio-11 race trying to buy the seat again and block Nina from Congress — but **Our Revolution** and **Team Turner** are one step ahead!

The SuperPAC, **Democratic Majority For Israel** , has kicked off an aggressive campaign with ads and mailers smearing Nina as anti-semitic, the Jewish independent outlet [Forward](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5417?t=26&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) reports.

DMFI spent $1.9M against her in August, and now, according to [Lever News](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5418?t=27&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL), oil mogul **Stacy Schusterman** gave the SuperPAC another $2M to try to crush Nina, a leading proponent of a Green New Deal, and promote her opponent Shontel Brown, who has declined to co-sponsor the **Climate Emergency Act**.

Meanwhile, Nina continues to **build trust and relationships with Jewish residents** across the district, and our volunteers have been on the ground connecting with voters and raising grassroots funding to combat the lies.

**Marty Gelfand** , a former South Euclid councilman, called the attacks against Turner “lashon hara,” or “evil speech” in Hebrew, a grave sin under Jewish law. “**These kinds of attacks have an effect** ,” he said.

Gelfand is hopeful given the **different terrain in the primary** compared to the special election in August — when Nina’s race was alone on the ballot and around **8,000 Republicans voted for Brown** , nearly double her winning margin. Now, there are GOP races on the ballot, and new district lines include **all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points**.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5419?t=28&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

“We’ve got to be disciplined, more agile and never underestimate the other side. We’ve got to _know_ they’re going to fight dirty,” Nina told Maximilian Alvarez of [In These Times](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5420?t=29&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL). “**We need to bump back against these forces with similar force**.”

“We gotta coalesce, find those issues we have in common, find those candidates who will fight for them, and then **fight like hell** to get them elected and get change,” she said. “This is about having allies in _activist groups_ , not just in the realm of electoral politics — **that’s what Our Revolution is doing right now**.”

**With early voting underway and just over a week left to vote** , we’re going all out to bring home this win. “**The energy on the ground is palpable!** ” Nina told us. “The primary is **May 3rd** — now is the time to maximize our efforts together.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=30&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

SPECIAL EVENT TO FUND NINA’S RUN!

**Our Revolution** will host a **Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner** at **8pm ET** /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing **Medicare for All** with Nina and other leading healthcare justice advocates.

Joined by **Michael Lighty** , **RoseAnn DeMoro** and Dr. **Ron Birnbaum** , Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator **Anna-Marta Visky** will talk about our work to pass Medicare for All resolutions in cities and states across the country. With a donation, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call.

[RSVP NOW](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5421?t=31&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

“**We’re not taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt Super PACs** , which means we’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we have the resources to run and win,” Nina said. “If you can’t donate, that’s okay! You’re needed in this fight.” [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4901?t=32&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=33&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**ANDY LEVIN vs BIG MONEY**

**DMFI** and **AIPAC** are also pouring money into the race for Michigan’s 11th, backing conservative Dem **Haley Stevens** against one of our strongest working class fighters in Congress - US. Rep. **Andy Levin**.

But Andy has our movement. [The New Republic](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5422?t=34&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) said he has the backing of a group “that the most unapologetic progressives in Congress seek out: **Our Revolution**.”

AIPAC is backing 37 Republicans who refused to certify Biden’s election and has now moved $300,000 to Stevens, who says she “went to a predominantly Jewish summer camp.” Andy, who is Jewish, says: “**The path to a secure, peaceful future for a democratic homeland for my people requires the political and human rights of Palestinians**.”

Despite being portrayed as the most “loyal” to the party establishment, both **Haley Stevens and Shontel Brown are now being rewarded by dark money groups** for opposing President Biden’s plan Iran Nuclear Deal.

Voters who want to see government work for their lives and serve their interests should vote for Andy. “**This is about working people having power and prosperity** ,” he said. “I’m a co-sponsor of **Medicare for All** and the **Green New Deal**. I’m the **union organizer in the Congress** , and I authored the resolution to allow our own staff to unionize.”

We can’t let big money back us down in these critical races across the country.

[VOLUNTEER FOR ANDY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5383?t=35&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=36&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**SEGAL’S RUN IN RHODE ISLAND**

Our ally in the fight against corporate power, **David Segal** , has officially announced his candidacy for Congress in RI-2! He’s up against the Clinton machine, but **his momentum is starting to build**.

“**We have the people-power** to reach the voters, we have the money to compete, and we have the urgent case to make that **we deserve leaders who can bring people together and ensure their voices are heard** ,” David said. “That’s what I’ve done for 20 years, and that’s the only kind of leadership that can affect real positive change.”

[Uprise RI](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5423?t=37&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) reports: “Segal has already earned some high profile endorsements in his bid. **Joseph Geevarghese** , the Executive Director of Our Revolution, pointed to Segal’s work building broad coalitions ‘to fight monopoly power, advance democratic reforms, and more.’”

David’s opponent, **Seth Magaziner** , a former asset manager, has $1.3M in the bank, [The Providence Journal](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5424?t=38&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) reports, noting most of it came from the state’s political and business elite. He also seems to be very popular with his own family — raising $27,400 just from people with the last name Magaziner.

David led **Demand Progress** for a decade, and he will be a partner with us and champion for Medicare for All, the Fight for $15, A Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, and more.

[VOLUNTEER FOR DAVID](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5385?t=39&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=40&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**CISNEROS vs CUELLAR**

The race in Texas-28 is getting heated between **Jessica Cisneros** and **Henry Cuellar** — the worst Democrat in Congress and the corrupt incumbent we must defeat.

**Our movement has catapulted Jessica to the top fundraiser among all federal candidates in Texas** — including Cuellar and Ted Cruz, [The Texan](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5425?t=41&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) reports. But, Cuellar’s cash-on-hand sits at $1.4M, and he is running a new TV ad against Jessica.

**Our Revolution Texas** and the Cisneros team are building on years of deep organizing in Texas communities, and now it comes down to this runoff election. [Become a member](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=42&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) of **Our Revolution** to help power this campaign!

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=43&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Join thousands of **Our Revolution** volunteers to elect working-class fighters like **Andy Levin** , **David Segal** , **Jessica Cisneros** , and of course **Nina Turner**! We must replace the enemies of progress up and down the ballot with **working-class fighters**.

If you have just one hour a week - or two! - **you can help power these critical campaigns** as part of our [2022 Phonebank Force](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=44&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you **make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power**!

[JOIN THE FORCE!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=45&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=46&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**JUMAANE & ANA MARÍA RELEASE CLIMATE PLAN**

Our Revolution-endorsed **Jumaane Williams** and **Ana María Archila** \- who are running for NY Governor and Lt. Governor - released their Climate Plan on Earth Day Friday.

Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator **Jennyfer Almanzar** joined the press conference in Brooklyn and rallied support for our climate candidates.

“Utility bills are out-of-control across NY and we are already feeling the grave impacts of climate change,” Ana María [told the crowd](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5426?t=47&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL). “**Our plan lowers utility costs and delivers a clean energy future for our state**.”

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=48&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=49&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**Democrats must deliver for the material conditions of voters’ lives** ahead of the 2022 midterms if they want to avoid another “shellacking,” as former President Obama famously described the 2010 elections that cost the Party control of Congress.

“**Americans are being price-gouged. Inflation is hitting their bottom line, and the number one job of any politician is to raise the standard of living of their constituents** ,” Our Revolution executive director **Joseph Geevarghese** told [The Guardian](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5427?t=50&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL).

Looking to the midterms, Joseph said: “It’s already going to be very difficult to win. And then you’ve got obstructionists in the Democratic party making it harder for the president and our party to prevail.”

**The progressive agenda is deflationary and would reduce costs to the majority of people in the country**. The Biden Administration has the power and opportunity to meet the moment through executive action, and **time is ticking**.

[Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution today to help our movement be heard in this critical moment.](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=51&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=52&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**BERNIE ON THE ROAD WITH WORKERS**

Rumors of **Bernie 2024** are circulating, but the truth is — **Our Revolution** and the progressive movement are doing the work _today_ to build the worker power we need to forge a better present and future for all of us.

One rumor is true: **This weekend, Bernie’s hitting the road!** And, we’re joining him to [rally](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5428?t=53&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) with **Amazon Labor Union** on Sunday ahead of their 2nd election for a union at LDJ5 in Staten Island.

Then, we’ll rally with **Starbucks Workers United** Sunday evening in Richmond, Va., where they went 5 for 5 in union elections last week!

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=54&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us, fighting back. It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward.**

This is how we build momentum. We’re taking on American oligarchs and winning key battles — but now we need to take our political revolution to the next level.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=55&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

In observance of 4/20 and the need to achieve **marijuana legalization** and **cannabis justice** in America, we’re releasing a **special edition Our Revolution sticker** to add to your collection!

Become a sustaining member of **Our Revolution** today for the _discounted price_ of just $4.20 and get this sticker with your membership. **It’s high-time for change**.

[GET YOUR STICKER!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5428?t=56&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=57&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Monday was **Tax Day** , and **Our Revolution** joined with **Americans for Tax Fairness** in a national call to pass a Billionaires Tax. It’s time to **#TaxBillionaires**.

While working people pay income taxes on our wages in every paycheck, [ProPublica](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5429?t=58&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) has exposed that many billionaires pay no income taxes at all on billions of dollars of investment gains.

**Even when billionaires do pay taxes, their tax rate is far below what nurses, teachers, and firefighters pay**. As folks struggle to afford groceries, healthcare and rent, billionaires are buying superyachts and going to space — there’s never been a better time for a **Billionaires Income Tax**.

Billionaires have gained $2T since the start of the pandemic, and it’s long past time for Congress and the Biden Administration to act.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=59&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**CALLING FOR WAR POWERS RESOLUTION**

**Our Revolution** joined 68 national organizations Thursday in a call for Congress to pass the **War Powers Resolution** to end all U.S. involvement in the Saudi-led war in Yemen. Our [letter](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5430?t=60&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) was sent to every member of Congress and covered in [Forbes](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5431?t=61&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL).

In 2019, **Bernie** and **Ro Khanna** were instrumental in passing the War Powers Act in the House and Senate — for the first time in history. Trump vetoed it then, but the Biden Administration has a chance to do differently now.

The humanitarian crisis remains desperate, and a resolution is more essential than ever to **maintain momentum for the fragile two-month truce** and **block U.S. support for any renewed hostilities**.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=62&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**MAKING MARYLAND MORE DEMOCRATIC**

In a new op-ed in [Maryland Matters](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5432?t=63&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL), **Our Revolution Montgomery County Co-Chair Ed Fischman** argues the need to reform the state’s anti-democratic legislative appointment process — which currently leaves voters out of the equation.

Del. **Al Carr** (D) **waited until the filing deadline to withdraw** from re-election and file for a different race. “**The timing of his switch worked to ensure there would be no contest for his seat in the July 19 primary** ,” Ed explained.

**Our Revolution is calling this out because we need democracy in this system**. Now, the candidate will be _selected not elected_ by a committee Tuesday. “This worked to prevent voters from having any choice to fill the seat. A quarter of the General Assembly were first selected by committees, not voters,” Ed said.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=64&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=65&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**Our Revolution** will host a **Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner** at **8pm ET** /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing **Medicare for All** with Nina and healthcare justice advocates **Michael Lighty** , **RoseAnn DeMoro** , Dr. **Ron Birnbaum** , our very own **Anna-Marta Visky**!

[RSVP NOW](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5421?t=66&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL) — With your donation to Nina’s people-powered campaign, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=67&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Don’t miss our **National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast** next Monday, April 25, with US Rep. **Ro Khanna**! Topics will include Taxing Billionaires and Taking on Big Oil. Sign-up to join the live Zoom call at **8:30p ET** /5:30p PT.

Then, mark your calendars for May 9th, when we’ll be joined by progressive powerhouse **Rashida Tlaib**! This is how we organize with our partners in office to fight for change.

[RSVP TODAY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=68&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=69&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Join thousands of **Our Revolution** volunteers to elect working-class fighters and **replace the corporate-aligned politicians** up and down the ballot.

If you have an hour or two a week, you can **power our movement** as a caller with the [2022 Phonebank Force](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=70&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)! Our crew will be there to help you **make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power**!

[We’re hitting the phones early and often — and we need YOU to SIGN UP!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=71&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=72&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

On May 3rd, we’re holding a special **Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy** with our partners at **Free Speech for People** and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

We’ll speak with courageous **Our Revolution** members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like **Marjorie Taylor-Greene**. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight!

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=73&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=74&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Are you a member of **Our Revolution**? For **$5 a month** , you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our **new 2022 Membership Card**.

To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For **$10 a month** , we’ll throw in our **sticker 6-pack** , and at **$15** , you’ll get the stickers _and_ a **poster** , too. For **$27** , get both and a **tote bag** , or join at the **$50** level to **get it all _and_ a T-shirt**.

[BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER!](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=75&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=76&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

Join **Our Revolution Maryland** at 10am Saturday, April 30th for a virtual forum with four Democratic gubernatorial candidates: **Monique Anderson-Walker, Rushern Baker, Ashwani Jain, John King** , and candidate for Lt. Governor **Tom Perez**.

They will be with us to discuss their platforms, goals, and records — and you’ll have a chance to ask them questions directly on the Zoom call. Don’t miss this!

[SIGN UP](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5412?t=77&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=78&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

**OUR 4-POINT PLAN TO WIN!**

**Our Revolution** is the largest grassroots-funded political action group in the country, and our members’ investment in this movement is producing _results_.

Inspired by Bernie, we’ve **laid the groundwork** and now we’re poised to build on over five years of organizing and movement building to **take our inside-outside strategy to the next level**. We know what we’re up against, but we’re proving that **organized people beat organized money**. As we keep growing, so will our victories.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=79&akid=2821%2E5885482%2Ekx70iL)

For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders , we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ NINA + THE PEOPLE vs THE MACHINE Billionaires, Big Oil and Big Pharma are pouring BIG money into the Ohio-11 race trying to buy the seat again and block Nina from Congress — but Our Revolution and Team Turner are one step ahead! The SuperPAC, Democratic Majority For Israel , has kicked off an aggressive campaign with ads and mailers smearing Nina as anti-semitic, the Jewish independent outlet reports. DMFI spent $1.9M against her in August, and now, according to , oil mogul Stacy Schusterman gave the SuperPAC another $2M to try to crush Nina, a leading proponent of a Green New Deal, and promote her opponent Shontel Brown, who has declined to co-sponsor the Climate Emergency Act. Meanwhile, Nina continues to build trust and relationships with Jewish residents across the district, and our volunteers have been on the ground connecting with voters and raising grassroots funding to combat the lies. Marty Gelfand , a former South Euclid councilman, called the attacks against Turner “lashon hara,” or “evil speech” in Hebrew, a grave sin under Jewish law. “These kinds of attacks have an effect ,” he said. Gelfand is hopeful given the different terrain in the primary compared to the special election in August — when Nina’s race was alone on the ballot and around 8,000 Republicans voted for Brown , nearly double her winning margin. Now, there are GOP races on the ballot, and new district lines include all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points. “We’ve got to be disciplined, more agile and never underestimate the other side. We’ve got to know they’re going to fight dirty,” Nina told Maximilian Alvarez of . “We need to bump back against these forces with similar force.” “We gotta coalesce, find those issues we have in common, find those candidates who will fight for them, and then fight like hell to get them elected and get change,” she said. “This is about having allies in activist groups , not just in the realm of electoral politics — that’s what Our Revolution is doing right now.” With early voting underway and just over a week left to vote , we’re going all out to bring home this win. “The energy on the ground is palpable! ” Nina told us. “The primary is May 3rd — now is the time to maximize our efforts together.” SPECIAL EVENT TO FUND NINA’S RUN! Our Revolution will host a Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner at 8pm ET /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing Medicare for All with Nina and other leading healthcare justice advocates. Joined by Michael Lighty , RoseAnn DeMoro and Dr. Ron Birnbaum , Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky will talk about our work to pass Medicare for All resolutions in cities and states across the country. With a donation, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call. “We’re not taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt Super PACs , which means we’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we have the resources to run and win,” Nina said. “If you can’t donate, that’s okay! You’re needed in this fight.” ★ ★ ★ ANDY LEVIN vs BIG MONEY DMFI and AIPAC are also pouring money into the race for Michigan’s 11th, backing conservative Dem Haley Stevens against one of our strongest working class fighters in Congress - US. Rep. Andy Levin. But Andy has our movement. said he has the backing of a group “that the most unapologetic progressives in Congress seek out: Our Revolution.” AIPAC is backing 37 Republicans who refused to certify Biden’s election and has now moved $300,000 to Stevens, who says she “went to a predominantly Jewish summer camp.” Andy, who is Jewish, says: “The path to a secure, peaceful future for a democratic homeland for my people requires the political and human rights of Palestinians.” Despite being portrayed as the most “loyal” to the party establishment, both Haley Stevens and Shontel Brown are now being rewarded by dark money groups for opposing President Biden’s plan Iran Nuclear Deal. Voters who want to see government work for their lives and serve their interests should vote for Andy. “This is about working people having power and prosperity ,” he said. “I’m a co-sponsor of Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. I’m the union organizer in the Congress , and I authored the resolution to allow our own staff to unionize.” We can’t let big money back us down in these critical races across the country. ★ ★ ★ SEGAL’S RUN IN RHODE ISLAND Our ally in the fight against corporate power, David Segal , has officially announced his candidacy for Congress in RI-2! He’s up against the Clinton machine, but his momentum is starting to build. “We have the people-power to reach the voters, we have the money to compete, and we have the urgent case to make that we deserve leaders who can bring people together and ensure their voices are heard ,” David said. “That’s what I’ve done for 20 years, and that’s the only kind of leadership that can affect real positive change.” reports: “Segal has already earned some high profile endorsements in his bid. Joseph Geevarghese , the Executive Director of Our Revolution, pointed to Segal’s work building broad coalitions ‘to fight monopoly power, advance democratic reforms, and more.’” David’s opponent, Seth Magaziner , a former asset manager, has $1.3M in the bank, reports, noting most of it came from the state’s political and business elite. He also seems to be very popular with his own family — raising $27,400 just from people with the last name Magaziner. David led Demand Progress for a decade, and he will be a partner with us and champion for Medicare for All, the Fight for $15, A Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, and more. ★ ★ ★ CISNEROS vs CUELLAR The race in Texas-28 is getting heated between Jessica Cisneros and Henry Cuellar — the worst Democrat in Congress and the corrupt incumbent we must defeat. Our movement has catapulted Jessica to the top fundraiser among all federal candidates in Texas — including Cuellar and Ted Cruz, reports. But, Cuellar’s cash-on-hand sits at $1.4M, and he is running a new TV ad against Jessica. Our Revolution Texas and the Cisneros team are building on years of deep organizing in Texas communities, and now it comes down to this runoff election. of Our Revolution to help power this campaign! ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters like Andy Levin , David Segal , Jessica Cisneros , and of course Nina Turner! We must replace the enemies of progress up and down the ballot with working-class fighters. If you have just one hour a week - or two! - you can help power these critical campaigns as part of our ! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ JUMAANE & ANA MARÍA RELEASE CLIMATE PLAN Our Revolution-endorsed Jumaane Williams and Ana María Archila \- who are running for NY Governor and Lt. Governor - released their Climate Plan on Earth Day Friday. Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar joined the press conference in Brooklyn and rallied support for our climate candidates. “Utility bills are out-of-control across NY and we are already feeling the grave impacts of climate change,” Ana María . “Our plan lowers utility costs and delivers a clean energy future for our state.” ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Democrats must deliver for the material conditions of voters’ lives ahead of the 2022 midterms if they want to avoid another “shellacking,” as former President Obama famously described the 2010 elections that cost the Party control of Congress. “Americans are being price-gouged. Inflation is hitting their bottom line, and the number one job of any politician is to raise the standard of living of their constituents ,” Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told . Looking to the midterms, Joseph said: “It’s already going to be very difficult to win. And then you’ve got obstructionists in the Democratic party making it harder for the president and our party to prevail.” The progressive agenda is deflationary and would reduce costs to the majority of people in the country. The Biden Administration has the power and opportunity to meet the moment through executive action, and time is ticking. ★ ★ ★ BERNIE ON THE ROAD WITH WORKERS Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is — Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better present and future for all of us. One rumor is true: This weekend, Bernie’s hitting the road! And, we’re joining him to with Amazon Labor Union on Sunday ahead of their 2nd election for a union at LDJ5 in Staten Island. Then, we’ll rally with Starbucks Workers United Sunday evening in Richmond, Va., where they went 5 for 5 in union elections last week! Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us, fighting back. It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward. This is how we build momentum. We’re taking on American oligarchs and winning key battles — but now we need to take our political revolution to the next level. ★ ★ ★ In observance of 4/20 and the need to achieve marijuana legalization and cannabis justice in America, we’re releasing a special edition Our Revolution sticker to add to your collection! Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution today for the discounted price of just $4.20 and get this sticker with your membership. It’s high-time for change. ★ ★ ★ Monday was Tax Day , and Our Revolution joined with Americans for Tax Fairness in a national call to pass a Billionaires Tax. It’s time to #TaxBillionaires. While working people pay income taxes on our wages in every paycheck, has exposed that many billionaires pay no income taxes at all on billions of dollars of investment gains. Even when billionaires do pay taxes, their tax rate is far below what nurses, teachers, and firefighters pay. As folks struggle to afford groceries, healthcare and rent, billionaires are buying superyachts and going to space — there’s never been a better time for a Billionaires Income Tax. Billionaires have gained $2T since the start of the pandemic, and it’s long past time for Congress and the Biden Administration to act. ★ ★ ★ CALLING FOR WAR POWERS RESOLUTION Our Revolution joined 68 national organizations Thursday in a call for Congress to pass the War Powers Resolution to end all U.S. involvement in the Saudi-led war in Yemen. Our was sent to every member of Congress and covered in . In 2019, Bernie and Ro Khanna were instrumental in passing the War Powers Act in the House and Senate — for the first time in history. Trump vetoed it then, but the Biden Administration has a chance to do differently now. The humanitarian crisis remains desperate, and a resolution is more essential than ever to maintain momentum for the fragile two-month truce and block U.S. support for any renewed hostilities. ★ ★ ★ MAKING MARYLAND MORE DEMOCRATIC In a new op-ed in , Our Revolution Montgomery County Co-Chair Ed Fischman argues the need to reform the state’s anti-democratic legislative appointment process — which currently leaves voters out of the equation. Del. Al Carr (D) waited until the filing deadline to withdraw from re-election and file for a different race. “The timing of his switch worked to ensure there would be no contest for his seat in the July 19 primary ,” Ed explained. Our Revolution is calling this out because we need democracy in this system. Now, the candidate will be selected not elected by a committee Tuesday. “This worked to prevent voters from having any choice to fill the seat. A quarter of the General Assembly were first selected by committees, not voters,” Ed said. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution will host a Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner at 8pm ET /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing Medicare for All with Nina and healthcare justice advocates Michael Lighty , RoseAnn DeMoro , Dr. Ron Birnbaum , our very own Anna-Marta Visky! — With your donation to Nina’s people-powered campaign, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call. ★ ★ ★ Don’t miss our National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast next Monday, April 25, with US Rep. Ro Khanna! Topics will include Taxing Billionaires and Taking on Big Oil. Sign-up to join the live Zoom call at 8:30p ET /5:30p PT. Then, mark your calendars for May 9th, when we’ll be joined by progressive powerhouse Rashida Tlaib! This is how we organize with our partners in office to fight for change. ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters and replace the corporate-aligned politicians up and down the ballot. If you have an hour or two a week, you can power our movement as a caller with the ! Our crew will be there to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ On May 3rd, we’re holding a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot. We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! ★ ★ ★ Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month , you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster , too. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. ★ ★ ★ Join Our Revolution Maryland at 10am Saturday, April 30th for a virtual forum with four Democratic gubernatorial candidates: Monique Anderson-Walker, Rushern Baker, Ashwani Jain, John King , and candidate for Lt. Governor Tom Perez. They will be with us to discuss their platforms, goals, and records — and you’ll have a chance to ask them questions directly on the Zoom call. Don’t miss this! ★ ★ ★ OUR 4-POINT PLAN TO WIN! Our Revolution is the largest grassroots-funded political action group in the country, and our members’ investment in this movement is producing results. Inspired by Bernie, we’ve laid the groundwork and now we’re poised to build on over five years of organizing and movement building to take our inside-outside strategy to the next level. We know what we’re up against, but we’re proving that organized people beat organized money. As we keep growing, so will our victories. ★ ★ ★ | | | | | **Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. | ** PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Laurie Teper
subject: SCHLEY BREAKFAST ON SATURDAY and then head to Durham
body:
**Courtney Geels is willing to stand up to career politicians and fight to put people over politics. Are you willing to do the necessary?**

SHOW UP SATURDAY!
SCHLEY GRANGE HALL
HWY 57 & SCHLEY RD
6:30AM-9:30AM
Adults - $9.00
Children 10 and under $5.00

**HERE 'S THE CATCH! **
**WEAR YOUR COURTNEY GEELS SHIRT AND SPEND AN HOUR FROM** **7:30-8:30** **AND COURTNEY WILL COVER THE COST!** Feel free to go earlier (Courtney will be there at 7:30)
The building is on Schley Road about 200 yards north of the intersection of Schley Road and NC Highway 57 North. See attached Flyer _<http://www.schleygrange.org/aboutus.html>_
_If you need a shirt, Courtney will have them available!_
_
_
**AFTER BREAKFAST, head to Durham County to Canvass! WE NEED YOU!**
**Door Knocking from 9:15-12:00. The meeting location will be determined this week. Look for another email on Thursday. It is important to sign up for planning purposes!**

Sign up HERE: <https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>
Scroll down to the other dates in Orange County, and please sign up ahead of time!

**ATTENTION POLL WORKERS for MAY 17---ELECTION DAY!!**
There are a lot of open slots in all 5 counties for people to plug into. Please CALL, TEXT OR EMAIL ME YOUR PREFERENCE OF COUNTY AND TIME SLOT
6:30am-9:30am, 9:30am -12:30pm, 12:30pm-4:00pm, 4:00pm-7:30
Pass out Courtney Geels palm cards to voters entering the polls. VERY SIMPLE, BUT OH SO IMPORTANT! Preferably 2 people per county per shift. Instructions will be given.

EFLAND SEAFOOD FESTIVAL - FRIDAY NIGHT AND ALL DAY SATURDAY
Courtney has a tent. PLEASE STOP BY!
_<https://www.wsfl.com/amp-events/2022-efland-seafood-festival/>_
_
_
**Can Courtney Geels count on you for your help?**

**
**
**__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__**

Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

Yesterday, an article about the congressional race in Virginia’s 8th was published in the Washington Post! The article discussed our campaign extensively, prompting readers to consider what I have been saying throughout this race: it is time for my opponent to pass the torch . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=wapo] This race is getting more recognition each day, and all eyes are on us to make change in Virginia’s 8th District.
As our campaign continues to gain momentum, I would like to give all my thanks to supporters like you . Without your help, everything we have accomplished so far would not be possible. I am filled with both gratitude and hope for what is to come!
We must raise awareness of this campaign now more than ever. If you are able, a contribution to Victoria Virasingh for Congress would go a long way. We can win this race if we work together!

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.

subject: Thank you!

body:
These are huge endorsements
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMFqhDAU_Jp4U-LTGD142K7dSymUwvYqMYlr2iQGjRT79Y3WLbQQBt7MyzDzRF10lSgiVQMGwDkQyHCW0yStRJ-nDFPaYSZSiXJskndlJmkZ5yrho4mGmpYSc15UvEuZ6IggeS8DCEIKVhLMI10P3rsZZScEl_D-OqDssnjTGinUEoZGGqY0gmIj53GZuAyk5bplxmnVr4fEw8jUzQbxnjreoPUDsx_tOi73xdF6af2PSXx1T19nxl3JgtxarUQQ_pGDEiFs04xv1xfA0VQL96m0VnNBwwVuW769-hGoRvQBAey_APaWkK-n59eBrI7EwSZm1jxuGpwD-tXJ38XDIzlaA6LNN2_BfR0)
---
| | **NINE ENDORSEMENTS IN 3 DAYS**
---
| | Friend,

In just **3 days** we’ve received endorsements from the most Conservative organizations in Ohio.

Our strong anti-abortion stance has been praised by the top pro-life organizations in the State- Dayton Right to Life and The Right to Life Action Coalition of Ohio.

_"Mr. Renacci has been a strong supporter of life throughout his career and understands the importance of this issue among Ohioans."**-Margie Christie, Executive Director Dayton Right to Life**_
** _ _**
_"We are confident Mr. Renacci will provide true pro-life leadership through his statewide appointments and policies."**-Gary Whitted, Dayton Right to Life Board Chair**_
_ _
Latest endorsers:

√ The Cuyahoga Valley Republicans
√ Dayton Right to Life
√ The Right to Life Action Coalition of Ohio
√ Middleburg GOP in Logan County

**And more!**

It is my honor to receive endorsements from such highly respected fellow Conservatives and champions of life.

name: Dory MacMillan, CheriBeasley.com
subject: (bump) onslaught
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
With Cheri as Democrats’ presumptive nominee, it is no longer a question of if Republican super PACs are going to attack us but when.

Republican super PACs just doubled down on North Carolina’s Senate race — upping their initial ad buys to over $40 million.
Senate Republicans know that their plan to give tax breaks to billionaires and corporations by raising taxes on working families isn’t a winning playbook – so they’re trying to sling mud and buy this seat.
[**Your $3 donation today is critical to help us prepare for the onslaught of desperate attacks. We have to report our numbers publicly after Wednesday’s final pre-primary FEC deadline, so this is urgent.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-2-t1&refcode2=777.357359.tqIM8y&t=1&akid=777%2E357359%2EtqIM8y)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-2-t1&refcode2=777.357359.tqIM8y&t=2&akid=777%2E357359%2EtqIM8y)**
When the desperate and false attack ads start, they will not stop. That’s why we have to get ready right now. Thanks for having our backs.
— Dory MacMillan
Communications Director
* * *
#
$3.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today Here’s why:
With Cheri as Democrats’ presumptive nominee, it is no longer a question of _if_ Republican super PACs are going to attack us but _when._
This is one of the closest, most competitive Senate races in the country, and our opponents will stop at nothing to win.
One far-right super PAC is already spending $14 million to prop up Ted Budd’s campaign just in the Republican primary, and the GOP’s Senate Leadership Fund just bought $27 million in TV ads to try to buy this seat for whichever Republican wins the primary.
And these are only initial investments. Just imagine what Mitch McConnell and these super PACs are willing to spend before Election Day attacking us.
Our campaign is going to face an onslaught of millions of dollars of false attack ads. So we need to fight back and make sure we have the resources to get Cheri’s message in front of voters.
[**Please donate $3 or any amount you can today. Our official pre-primary FEC deadline is 2 days away, and we need as many donations as possible before then to prove we can compete with the corporate and dark money heading our way.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220425-2-t1&refcode2=777.357359.tqIM8y&t=3&akid=777%2E357359%2EtqIM8y)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: I want to send a strong message to Republicans that I am here to advocate for my constituents. | = | We’re just five days from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, so I wanted to take a moment to let you know what we’re facing. We’re going head-to-head against a Republican who is eager to get me out of Congress. I understand his opposition. After all, I am a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. = | = I want to send a strong message to Republicans that I am here to advocate for my constituents, and I’m not going anywhere. body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ][IMG]

Folks, I wasn’t expecting Trump to come to Ohio and play nice,
but wow—that rally really was a special kind of awful, wasn’t it?

Donald Trump attacked me personally this weekend, saying Republicans
"can't take a chance" when it comes to running against me.

Trump knows how important winning Ohio is. His wading into our race means
more attack ads, more dark-money, and a tougher environment in an already
competitive race.

So I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me respond to the
far-right’s outlandish lies and baseless attacks. We need to hit our
$30,000 goal in less than 24 hours to compete with JD Vance and Trump’s
MAGA fundraising machine.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us cut through the
noise and flip Ohio blue? There’s never been a more important time for you
to give:

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Donate $50

Trump's rally really tells us everything we need to know about JD Vance.
If he wins we sure as hell know that it won’t be hardworking Ohioans in
the driver’s seat—it’ll be his rich far-right buddies.

But that doesn’t change our goal: we need to stay focused on talking to
folks all across the state and show them that there’s a better way
forward.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]But folks, getting our message in front of voters isn’t cheap. Will you
pitch in toward our fundraising goal so we can flip Ohio blue and FINALLY
cut workers in on the deal?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11123?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=30&akid=3450%2E3611125%2Ee2yEcF ]Other Amount

We knew this was going to be a tough race—and with Senate control on the
line, the stakes truly couldn’t be any higher.

Thanks for always being in my corner, folks.

Tim

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Folks, I wasn’t expecting Trump to come to Ohio and play nice, but wow—that rally really was a special kind of awful, wasn’t it? Donald Trump attacked me personally this weekend, saying Republicans "can't take a chance" when it comes to running against me. Trump knows how important winning Ohio is. His wading into our race means more attack ads, more dark-money, and a tougher environment in an already competitive race. So I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me respond to the far-right’s outlandish lies and baseless attacks. We need to hit our $30,000 goal in less than 24 hours to compete with JD Vance and Trump’s MAGA fundraising machine. [ ]Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us cut through the noise and flip Ohio blue? There’s never been a more important time for you to give: If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Trump's rally really tells us everything we need to know about JD Vance. If he wins we sure as hell know that it won’t be hardworking Ohioans in the driver’s seat—it’ll be his rich far-right buddies. But that doesn’t change our goal: we need to stay focused on talking to folks all across the state and show them that there’s a better way forward. [ ]But folks, getting our message in front of voters isn’t cheap. Will you pitch in toward our fundraising goal so we can flip Ohio blue and FINALLY cut workers in on the deal? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount We knew this was going to be a tough race—and with Senate control on the line, the stakes truly couldn’t be any higher. name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: We Did It!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/caa96444029a/we-did-it?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=05ae87a571&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Friend,

We did it! The state GOP convention was a success!

I am **overjoyed by the support** our campaign received on Saturday.

It has always been my highest commitment to **make real connections with voters, engage them on issues that impact them most, and have some fun** **in the meantime** —convention was no different.

I am thankful for the opportunity I had to **engage with voters from all backgrounds and walks of life! **Those of you who **dedicated your weekend to engaging with candidate** s are among the **most committed voters in the country,** and the chance to have a treat, snap some polaroids, and share some laughs with you was a pleasure. **Thank you!**
---
|
---
| **Challenging a two-term incumbent is no easy task,** but earning the second-place spot in this weekend’s convention is confirmation that** we are the leading Republican challenger in this race!**

We have already gathered and submitted enough signatures to secure our spot on the primary ballot, and **our focus will stay on the Republican primary on June 28th. **

Support for this campaign grows every day, and with our momentum stronger than ever, **a couple of boos won’t slow us down. **
---
|
---
| If you visited the Becky Booth party on Saturday, thank you! I hope you’ll **share photos on social media and sport your new swag!** If you missed it, I hope you’ll **attend an event with #TeamBecky soon! **

With the end of convention season, **we enter the final stretch to the primary.** I am **committed to engaging with as many voters as possible,** and I hope to have an opportunity to hear from you soon.

**Want to stay up to date on the campaign and attend #TeamBecky events near you? Follow us on social media @beckyforutah.**

As always, thank you for your support.
---
|
---
|
---

body:
Join us May 10th | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7149335b1862/i-am-running-for-congress-8951957?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=433e6f7277&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hey there,

**[Join me Tuesday, May 10th at the Neighbors Bar& Grille in Waukesha to support my campaign!](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=2df5fce9a9&e=356c0699dd) **

I’m working tirelessly to out-work Fitzgerald and to #FlipThe5th this fall. We deserve a leader in Congress who is dedicated to serving all of us, while working to foster a strong middle-class, as opposed to extreme partisan politics and pitting us against each other.

**I am committed to unifying and leading, and I have concrete plans to make the 5th Congressional District a place where all families can have a chance at the American Dream.**
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=10a7a1d1ff&e=356c0699dd)
---
| **Tuesday, May 10 | 5:30 - 7**
[The Neighbors Bar & Grille](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=0f2cac7351&e=356c0699dd)
S16W22255 Arcadian Ave
Waukesha, WI 53186
_**Levels of Support**_
$1,000. $500, $250, $100
Open communication and transparency are important to me, and I want to talk more about what you expect out of our Congressperson. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join me on Tuesday.

**If you’re free, come meet me at the Neighbors Bar & Grille and hear my plans for our district and state, because the era of polarization and extreme party politics has to come to an end. [RSVP HERE.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=e4d344f565&e=356c0699dd)**

I am working to make sure that every American family has the opportunity to enjoy the American Dream, and with your support we CAN do it!
---
| [RSVP](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=0f1ca51112&e=356c0699dd "RSVP")
---
| See you May 10th!

Mike Van Someren

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Let’s re-elect Tammy, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
With only one seat standing between us and a Republican majority in the Senate, we can’t take any election for granted.
#
Peter,
As you might know, my good friend and fellow Illinoisan Tammy Duckworth is up for re-election this November. **[I’m asking for your help to re-elect Sen. Duckworth, but first, let me explain why:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44550244/342081936/1399839418?refcode=dd_em_220425_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTI1ZjlkZC1mMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1LkBtsxVbIoA4tZNyeLMlBJbY4H04BEtkTuvJfqZ_E=)**
Over the course of the pandemic, I’ve worked hand in hand with Tammy to deliver for working families and communities across Illinois.
She’s been a key ally in the fight to bolster child care programs, deliver federal funding to Illinois, strengthen our state’s infrastructure, support small businesses, and much more.
**But Mitch McConnell’s GOP has a different vision for Illinois and the United States and they’re promising to dismantle all of our progress if we give them the opportunity.**
With only one seat standing between us and a Republican majority in the Senate, **we can’t take any election for granted.**
**[Tammy is a partner I can’t afford to lose, Peter. Will you split $5 now to help us continue fighting for Illinois in Washington, D.C.?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44550245/342081937/1399839418?refcode=dd_em_220425_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTI1ZjlkZC1mMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1LkBtsxVbIoA4tZNyeLMlBJbY4H04BEtkTuvJfqZ_E=)**
She and I share a simple philosophy when it comes to public service: we champion the issues that make life easier and better for everyone.
And we know there’s more to do in 2022 and beyond. But with Senate Republicans promising to take us in the wrong direction by hiking taxes and cutting funding to vital programs like Social Security and Medicare, we need to win this re-election.
**[So that’s why I’m asking: can I count on your support in the fight to re-elect Tammy by splitting a $5 contribution now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44550246/342081938/1399839418?refcode=dd_em_220425_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTI1ZjlkZC1mMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1LkBtsxVbIoA4tZNyeLMlBJbY4H04BEtkTuvJfqZ_E=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin
